In addition, as new dexterous embodiments appear rapidly, collecting data for each becomes costly and impractical, creating a need for scalable cross-embodiment learning. We introduce XL-VLA, a vision-language-action framework integrated with a unified latent action space shared across diverse dexterous hands. This embodiment-invariant latent space is directly pluggable into standard VLA architectures, enabling seamless cross-embodiment training and efficient reuse of both existing and newly collected data. Experimental results demonstrate that XL-VLA consistently outperforms baseline VLA models operating in raw joint spaces, establishing it as an effective solution for scalable cross-embodiment dexterous manipulation.
tldr: The paper introduces XL-VLA, a vision-language-action framework with a unified latent action space for diverse robotic hands, enabling cross-embodiment training and efficient data reuse for dexterous manipulation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了XL-VLA，一个具有统一潜在动作空间的视觉-语言-动作框架，适用于不同的机器人手，从而实现跨具身训练和高效的数据重用，以进行灵巧操作。
summary_zh: 灵巧操作对于现实世界中的机器人自主性至关重要，它反映了人类手部协调在日常活动中的核心作用。人类依赖于丰富的多模态感知——视觉、声音和语言引导的意图——来执行灵巧动作，这推动了基于视觉、语言条件下的机器人操作系统的发展。然而，训练用于灵巧操作的可靠的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型需要跨多个机械手的海量演示数据。此外，随着新的灵巧机构的快速涌现，为每个机构收集数据变得成本高昂且不切实际，因此产生了对可扩展的跨机构学习的需求。我们引入了XL-VLA，一个与统一的潜在动作空间集成的视觉-语言-动作框架，该空间在各种灵巧机械手之间共享。这种机构不变的潜在空间可以直接插入到标准的VLA架构中，实现无缝的跨机构训练，并高效地重用现有和新收集的数据。实验结果表明，XL-VLA始终优于在原始关节空间中运行的基线VLA模型，从而确立了其作为可扩展的跨机构灵巧操作的有效解决方案的地位。

title: AR-VLA: True Autoregressive Action Expert for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: We propose a standalone autoregressive (AR) Action Expert that generates actions as a continuous causal sequence while conditioning on refreshable vision-language prefixes. In contrast to existing Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models and diffusion policies that reset temporal context with each new observation and predict actions reactively, our Action Expert maintains its own history through a long-lived memory and is inherently context-aware. This structure addresses the frequency mismatch between fast control and slow reasoning, enabling efficient independent pretraining of kinematic syntax and modular integration with heavy perception backbones, naturally ensuring spatio-temporally consistent action generation across frames. To synchronize these asynchronous hybrid V-L-A modalities, we utilize a re-anchoring mechanism that mathematically accounts for perception staleness during both training and inference. Experiments on simulated and real-robot manipulation tasks demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively replace traditional chunk-based action heads for both specialist and generalist policies. AR-VLA exhibits superior history awareness and substantially smoother action trajectories while maintaining or exceeding the task success rates of state-of-the-art reactive VLAs. Overall, our work introduces a scalable, context-aware action generation schema that provides a robust structural foundation for training effective robotic policies.
tldr: The paper introduces AR-VLA, an autoregressive action expert for vision-language-action models that maintains a long-lived memory for context-aware action generation, addressing the reactive nature of existing VLA models. It demonstrates superior history awareness and smoother action trajectories on robotic manipulation tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了AR-VLA，一种用于视觉-语言-动作模型的自回归动作专家，它维护长期记忆以实现上下文感知的动作生成，解决了现有VLA模型的反应性问题。它在机器人操作任务中展示了卓越的历史感知能力和更平滑的动作轨迹。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种独立的自回归（AR）动作专家，该专家生成动作作为连续的因果序列，同时以可刷新的视觉-语言前缀为条件。与现有的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型和扩散策略（它们在每次新观察时重置时间上下文并被动地预测动作）不同，我们的动作专家通过长时记忆来维护其自身的历史，并且本质上是上下文感知的。这种结构解决了快速控制和慢速推理之间的频率不匹配问题，从而能够对运动学语法进行高效的独立预训练，并与重型感知骨干网络进行模块化集成，自然地确保跨帧的时空一致的动作生成。为了同步这些异步的混合V-L-A模态，我们采用了一种重锚定机制，该机制在数学上解释了训练和推理过程中的感知滞后。在模拟和真实机器人操作任务上的实验表明，所提出的方法可以有效地取代传统的基于块的动作头，用于专家和通用策略。AR-VLA表现出卓越的历史感知能力和明显更平滑的动作轨迹，同时保持或超过了最先进的被动VLA的任务成功率。总而言之，我们的工作引入了一种可扩展的、上下文感知的动作生成模式，为训练高效的机器人策略提供了稳健的结构基础。

title: Safe RLHF Beyond Expectation: Stochastic Dominance for Universal Spectral Risk Control
summary: Safe Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) typically enforces safety through expected cost constraints, but the expectation captures only a single statistic of the cost distribution and fails to account for distributional uncertainty, particularly under heavy tails or rare catastrophic events. This limitation is problematic when robustness and risk sensitivity are critical. Stochastic dominance offers a principled alternative by comparing entire cost distributions rather than just their averages, enabling direct control over tail risks and potential out-of-distribution failures that expectation-based constraints may overlook. In this work, we propose Risk-sensitive Alignment via Dominance (RAD), a novel alignment framework that replaces scalar expected cost constraints with First-Order Stochastic Dominance (FSD) constraints. We operationalize this constraint by comparing the target policy's cost distribution to that of a reference policy within an Optimal Transport (OT) framework, using entropic regularization and Sinkhorn iterations to obtain a differentiable and computationally efficient objective for stable end-to-end optimization. Furthermore, we introduce quantile-weighted FSD constraints and show that weighted FSD universally controls a broad class of Spectral Risk Measures (SRMs), so that improvements under weighted dominance imply guaranteed improvements in the corresponding spectral risk. This provides a principled mechanism for tuning a model's risk profile via the quantile weighting function. Empirical results demonstrate that RAD improves harmlessness over baselines while remaining competitive in helpfulness, and exhibits greater robustness on out-of-distribution harmlessness evaluations.
tldr: The paper introduces RAD, a novel RLHF framework using Stochastic Dominance to ensure safety by controlling tail risks and out-of-distribution failures, demonstrating improved harmlessness and robustness compared to expectation-based methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为RAD的新型RLHF框架，该框架使用随机优势来确保安全，通过控制尾部风险和分布外失败，与基于期望的方法相比，展示了改进的无害性和鲁棒性。
summary_zh:
摘要：
来自人类反馈的安全强化学习（RLHF）通常通过期望成本约束来实施安全性，但期望仅捕获成本分布的单个统计量，并且无法考虑分布的不确定性，尤其是在重尾或罕见的灾难性事件下。当鲁棒性和风险敏感性至关重要时，这种限制是有问题的。随机优势提供了一种原则性的替代方案，通过比较整个成本分布而非仅仅其平均值，能够直接控制尾部风险和基于期望的约束可能忽略的潜在的分布外失效。在这项工作中，我们提出了通过优势进行风险敏感对齐（RAD），这是一种新型的对齐框架，它用一阶随机优势（FSD）约束替换了标量的期望成本约束。我们通过在最优传输（OT）框架内比较目标策略的成本分布与参考策略的成本分布来操作此约束，使用熵正则化和Sinkhorn迭代来获得可微且计算高效的目标，以实现稳定的端到端优化。此外，我们引入了分位数加权的FSD约束，并表明加权的FSD普遍控制着广泛的谱风险度量（SRM），因此在加权优势下的改进意味着相应谱风险的保证改进。这提供了一种通过分位数加权函数调整模型风险配置的原则性机制。实验结果表明，RAD在保持助益性竞争力的同时，改进了对基线的无害性，并且在分布外的无害性评估中表现出更大的鲁棒性。

title: Dynamics-Predictive Sampling for Active RL Finetuning of Large Reasoning Models
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) finetuning has become a key technique for enhancing the reasoning abilities of large language models (LLMs). However, its effectiveness critically depends on the selection of training data. Recent advances underscore the importance of online prompt selection methods, which typically concentrate training on partially solved or moderately challenging examples under the current policy, thereby yielding more effective model updates. While significantly accelerating RL finetuning in terms of training steps, they also incur substantial computational overhead by requiring extensive LLM rollouts over large candidate batches to identify informative samples, an expense that can outweigh the finetuning process itself. To address this challenge, this work proposes Dynamics-Predictive Sampling (DPS), which online predicts and selects informative prompts by inferring their learning dynamics prior to costly rollouts. Specifically, we introduce a new perspective by modeling each prompt's solving progress during RL finetuning as a dynamical system, where the extent of solving is represented as the state and the transition is characterized by a hidden Markov model. Using historical rollout reward signals, we perform online Bayesian inference to estimate evolving state distributions, and the inference outcome provides a predictive prior for efficient prompt selection without rollout-intensive filtering. Empirical results across diverse reasoning tasks, including mathematics, planning, and visual geometry, demonstrate that DPS substantially reduces redundant rollouts, accelerates the training process, and achieves superior reasoning performance.
tldr: The paper introduces Dynamics-Predictive Sampling (DPS) to reduce the computational overhead of online prompt selection in RL finetuning of LLMs by predicting informative prompts before costly rollouts, achieving faster training and improved reasoning performance.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种动态预测采样（DPS）方法，通过在耗时较长的 rollout 之前预测信息丰富的提示来减少在线提示选择在 LLM 的 RL 微调中的计算开销，从而实现更快的训练和更高的推理性能。
summary_zh: 强化学习（RL）微调已成为增强大型语言模型（LLM）推理能力的关键技术。然而，其有效性严重依赖于训练数据的选择。近期的进展强调了在线提示词选择方法的重要性，这类方法通常将训练集中于当前策略下部分解决或中等难度的例子，从而产生更有效的模型更新。尽管在训练步数方面显著加速了强化学习微调，但它们也带来了巨大的计算开销，需要对大型候选批次进行大量的LLM rollout，以识别有信息的样本，这种开销甚至可能超过微调过程本身。为了应对这一挑战，本文提出了动态预测采样（DPS），它通过在昂贵的rollout之前推断提示词的学习动态，来在线预测和选择有信息的提示词。具体来说，我们引入了一个新的视角，将每个提示词在强化学习微调期间的解决进度建模为一个动态系统，其中解决的程度表示为状态，而转移由一个隐马尔可夫模型表征。利用历史rollout奖励信号，我们执行在线贝叶斯推断来估计不断演变的状态分布，并且推断结果提供了一个预测性的先验，用于高效的提示词选择，而无需rollout密集的过滤。在包括数学、规划和视觉几何在内的各种推理任务上的实验结果表明，DPS大幅减少了冗余的rollout，加速了训练过程，并实现了卓越的推理性能。

title: Towards Cold-Start Drafting and Continual Refining: A Value-Driven Memory Approach with Application to NPU Kernel Synthesis
summary: Deploying Large Language Models to data-scarce programming domains poses significant challenges, particularly for kernel synthesis on emerging Domain-Specific Architectures where a "Data Wall" limits available training data. While models excel on data-rich platforms like CUDA, they suffer catastrophic performance drops on data-scarce ecosystems such as NPU programming. To overcome this cold-start barrier without expensive fine-tuning, we introduce EvoKernel, a self-evolving agentic framework that automates the lifecycle of kernel synthesis from initial drafting to continual refining. EvoKernel addresses this by formulating the synthesis process as a memory-based reinforcement learning task. Through a novel value-driven retrieval mechanism, it learns stage-specific Q-values that prioritize experiences based on their contribution to the current objective, whether bootstrapping a feasible draft or iteratively refining latency. Furthermore, by enabling cross-task memory sharing, the agent generalizes insights from simple to complex operators. By building an NPU variant of KernelBench and evaluating on it, EvoKernel improves frontier models' correctness from 11.0% to 83.0% and achieves a median speedup of 3.60x over initial drafts through iterative refinement. This demonstrates that value-guided experience accumulation allows general-purpose models to master the kernel synthesis task on niche hardware ecosystems. Our official page is available at https://evokernel.zhuo.li.
tldr: EvoKernel, a self-evolving agentic framework, leverages value-driven memory-based reinforcement learning to address the cold-start problem of kernel synthesis on data-scarce NPU architectures, demonstrating significant improvements in correctness and speedup compared to initial drafts.
tldr_zh: EvoKernel是一个自进化代理框架，它利用基于价值驱动的内存强化学习来解决在数据稀缺的NPU架构上的内核合成的冷启动问题，并展示了与初始草案相比，在正确性和加速方面的显著改进。
summary_zh: 将大型语言模型部署到数据稀缺的编程领域面临重大挑战，尤其是在新兴的领域专用架构上的内核合成，其中“数据墙”限制了可用的训练数据。尽管模型在诸如 CUDA 等数据丰富的平台上表现出色，但在诸如 NPU 编程等数据稀缺的生态系统中，其性能遭受毁灭性下降。为了克服这一冷启动障碍，而无需昂贵的微调，我们引入了 EvoKernel，一个自我演化的智能体框架，它可以自动化内核合成的生命周期，从初始草案到持续改进。EvoKernel 通过将合成过程形式化为一项基于记忆的强化学习任务来解决这个问题。通过一种新型的价值驱动检索机制，它学习特定阶段的 Q 值，这些 Q 值根据经验对当前目标的贡献进行优先排序，无论是引导一个可行的草案还是迭代优化延迟。此外，通过启用跨任务的记忆共享，该智能体可以将来自简单算子的见解推广到复杂算子。通过构建一个 NPU 版本的 KernelBench 并对其进行评估，EvoKernel 将前沿模型的正确率从 11.0% 提高到 83.0%，并通过迭代改进实现了相对于初始草案 3.60 倍的中值加速。这表明，价值引导的经验积累使通用模型能够掌握利基硬件生态系统上的内核合成任务。我们的官方页面位于 https://evokernel.zhuo.li。

title: UAV traffic scene understanding: A cross-spectral guided approach and a unified benchmark
summary: Traffic scene understanding from unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) platforms is crucial for intelligent transportation systems due to its flexible deployment and wide-area monitoring capabilities. However, existing methods face significant challenges in real-world surveillance, as their heavy reliance on optical imagery leads to severe performance degradation under adverse illumination conditions like nighttime and fog. Furthermore, current Visual Question Answering (VQA) models are restricted to elementary perception tasks, lacking the domain-specific regulatory knowledge required to assess complex traffic behaviors. To address these limitations, we propose a novel Cross-spectral Traffic Cognition Network (CTCNet) for robust UAV traffic scene understanding. Specifically, we design a Prototype-Guided Knowledge Embedding (PGKE) module that leverages high-level semantic prototypes from an external Traffic Regulation Memory (TRM) to anchor domain-specific knowledge into visual representations, enabling the model to comprehend complex behaviors and distinguish fine-grained traffic violations. Moreover, we develop a Quality-Aware Spectral Compensation (QASC) module that exploits the complementary characteristics of optical and thermal modalities to perform bidirectional context exchange, effectively compensating for degraded features to ensure robust representation in complex environments. In addition, we construct Traffic-VQA, the first large-scale optical-thermal infrared benchmark for cognitive UAV traffic understanding, comprising 8,180 aligned image pairs and 1.3 million question-answer pairs across 31 diverse types. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CTCNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both cognition and perception scenarios. The dataset is available at https://github.com/YuZhang-2004/UAV-traffic-scene-understanding.
tldr: The paper introduces a cross-spectral traffic cognition network (CTCNet) and a large-scale optical-thermal infrared benchmark (Traffic-VQA) to improve UAV traffic scene understanding, especially in adverse conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个跨光谱交通认知网络(CTCNet)和一个大规模的光学-热红外基准(Traffic-VQA)，以提高无人机交通场景理解，尤其是在不利条件下。
summary_zh: 利用无人机平台进行交通场景理解对于智能交通系统至关重要，因为其部署灵活且具有广域监控能力。然而，现有方法在实际监控中面临重大挑战，它们对光学图像的严重依赖导致在夜间和雾天等不利光照条件下性能严重下降。此外，当前的视觉问答（VQA）模型仅限于基本的感知任务，缺乏评估复杂交通行为所需的特定领域监管知识。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的跨光谱交通认知网络（CTCNet），用于鲁棒的无人机交通场景理解。具体而言，我们设计了一个原型引导知识嵌入（PGKE）模块，该模块利用来自外部交通法规记忆库（TRM）的高级语义原型，将特定领域的知识锚定到视觉表示中，使模型能够理解复杂的行为并区分细粒度的交通违规行为。此外，我们开发了一个质量感知光谱补偿（QASC）模块，该模块利用光学和热成像模式的互补特征来执行双向上下文交换，有效地补偿退化的特征，以确保在复杂环境中具有鲁棒的表示。此外，我们构建了Traffic-VQA，这是首个用于认知无人机交通理解的大规模光学-热红外基准数据集，包含8,180个对齐的图像对和130万个跨越31种不同类型的问答对。大量实验表明，在认知和感知场景中，CTCNet均显著优于最先进的方法。数据集可在https://github.com/YuZhang-2004/UAV-traffic-scene-understanding获取。

title: Are Video Reasoning Models Ready to Go Outside?
summary: In real-world deployment, vision-language models often encounter disturbances such as weather, occlusion, and camera motion. Under such conditions, their understanding and reasoning degrade substantially, revealing a gap between clean, controlled (i.e., unperturbed) evaluation settings and real-world robustness. To address this limitation, we propose ROVA, a novel training framework that improves robustness by modeling a robustness-aware consistency reward under spatio-temporal corruptions. ROVA introduces a difficulty-aware online training strategy that prioritizes informative samples based on the model's evolving capability. Specifically, it continuously re-estimates sample difficulty via self-reflective evaluation, enabling adaptive training with a robustness-aware consistency reward. We also introduce PVRBench, a new benchmark that injects real-world perturbations into embodied video datasets to assess both accuracy and reasoning quality under realistic disturbances. We evaluate ROVA and baselines on PVRBench, UrbanVideo, and VisBench, where open-source and proprietary models suffer up to 35% and 28% drops in accuracy and reasoning under realistic perturbations. ROVA effectively mitigates performance degradation, boosting relative accuracy by at least 24% and reasoning by over 9% compared with baseline models (QWen2.5/3-VL, InternVL2.5, Embodied-R). These gains transfer to clean standard benchmarks, yielding consistent improvements.
tldr: This paper introduces ROVA, a training framework that improves the robustness of vision-language models in real-world scenarios by modeling a robustness-aware consistency reward and prioritizing informative samples under spatio-temporal corruptions. They also introduce PVRBench, a new benchmark to evaluate model robustness.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为ROVA的训练框架，通过对鲁棒性感知的连贯性奖励进行建模以及优先处理时空扰动下的信息性样本，提高了视觉-语言模型在现实世界场景中的鲁棒性。他们还引入了一个新的基准测试PVRBench，用于评估模型的鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 在真实世界部署中，视觉-语言模型经常会遇到天气、遮挡和相机运动等干扰。在这种情况下，它们的理解和推理能力会大幅降低，揭示了干净、受控（即未受干扰的）评估设置与真实世界鲁棒性之间的差距。为了解决这个局限性，我们提出了ROVA，一种新颖的训练框架，通过在时空扰动下建模鲁棒性感知的一致性奖励来提高鲁棒性。ROVA引入了一种难度感知的在线训练策略，该策略基于模型不断演变的能力来优先处理信息量大的样本。具体来说，它通过自我反思评估来持续重新估计样本难度，从而实现使用鲁棒性感知的一致性奖励进行自适应训练。我们还引入了PVRBench，一个新的基准测试，将真实世界的扰动注入到具身视频数据集中，以评估在真实干扰下的准确性和推理质量。我们在PVRBench、UrbanVideo和VisBench上评估了ROVA和基线模型，其中开源和专有模型在真实扰动下遭受高达35%和28%的准确性和推理能力下降。ROVA有效地缓解了性能下降，与基线模型（QWen2.5/3-VL、InternVL2.5、Embodied-R）相比，相对准确率至少提高了24%，推理能力提高了超过9%。这些增益转移到干净的标准基准测试中，产生了持续的改进。

title: Trajectory-Informed Memory Generation for Self-Improving Agent Systems
summary: LLM-powered agents face a persistent challenge: learning from their execution experiences to improve future performance. While agents can successfully complete many tasks, they often repeat inefficient patterns, fail to recover from similar errors, and miss opportunities to apply successful strategies from past executions. We present a novel framework for automatically extracting actionable learnings from agent execution trajectories and utilizing them to improve future performance through contextual memory retrieval. Our approach comprises four components: (1) a Trajectory Intelligence Extractor that performs semantic analysis of agent reasoning patterns, (2) a Decision Attribution Analyzer that identifies which decisions and reasoning steps led to failures, recoveries, or inefficiencies, (3) a Contextual Learning Generator that produces three types of guidance -- strategy tips from successful patterns, recovery tips from failure handling, and optimization tips from inefficient but successful executions, and (4) an Adaptive Memory Retrieval System that injects relevant learnings into agent prompts based on multi-dimensional similarity. Unlike existing memory systems that store generic conversational facts, our framework understands execution patterns, extracts structured learnings with provenance, and retrieves guidance tailored to specific task contexts. Evaluation on the AppWorld benchmark demonstrates consistent improvements, with up to 14.3 percentage point gains in scenario goal completion on held-out tasks and particularly strong benefits on complex tasks (28.5~pp scenario goal improvement, a 149\% relative increase).
tldr: This paper presents a framework for LLM-powered agents to learn from past execution trajectories by extracting structured learnings and injecting them into prompts via an adaptive memory retrieval system, demonstrating significant improvements in task completion on the AppWorld benchmark.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种框架，使基于LLM的智能体能够通过提取结构化学习内容并借助自适应记忆检索系统将其注入提示中，从而从过去的执行轨迹中学习，并在AppWorld基准测试中展示了任务完成方面的显著改进。
summary_zh: 由LLM驱动的智能体面临着一个持续的挑战：如何从执行经验中学习以提高未来的性能。尽管智能体能够成功完成许多任务，但它们经常重复低效的模式，无法从类似的错误中恢复，并且错失了应用先前执行中成功策略的机会。我们提出了一种新颖的框架，用于从智能体执行轨迹中自动提取可操作的学习内容，并利用这些学习内容通过上下文记忆检索来提高未来的性能。我们的方法包括四个组成部分：（1）轨迹智能提取器，其对智能体的推理模式进行语义分析，（2）决策归因分析器，其识别导致失败、恢复或低效率的决策和推理步骤，（3）上下文学习生成器，其生成三种类型的指导——来自成功模式的策略提示、来自故障处理的恢复提示，以及来自低效但成功执行的优化提示，以及（4）自适应记忆检索系统，其基于多维相似性将相关的学习内容注入到智能体提示中。与存储通用会话事实的现有记忆系统不同，我们的框架理解执行模式，提取具有出处的结构化学习内容，并检索针对特定任务上下文量身定制的指导。在AppWorld基准测试上的评估表明，性能得到了持续的提升，在保留任务的场景目标完成度方面提升高达14.3个百分点，尤其是在复杂的任务中表现出强大的优势（场景目标改进28.5个百分点，相对增长149％）。

title: Does LLM Alignment Really Need Diversity? An Empirical Study of Adapting RLVR Methods for Moral Reasoning
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has achieved remarkable success in logical reasoning tasks, yet whether large language model (LLM) alignment requires fundamentally different approaches remains unclear. Given the apparent tolerance for multiple valid responses in moral reasoning, a natural hypothesis is that alignment tasks inherently require diversity-seeking distribution-matching algorithms rather than reward-maximizing policy-based methods. We conduct the first comprehensive empirical study comparing both paradigms on MoReBench. To enable stable RLVR training, we build a rubric-grounded reward pipeline by training a Qwen3-1.7B judge model. Contrary to our hypothesis, we find that distribution-matching approaches do not demonstrate significant advantages over reward-maximizing methods as expected on alignment tasks. Through semantic visualization mapping high-reward responses to semantic space, we demonstrate that moral reasoning exhibits more concentrated high-reward distributions than mathematical reasoning, where diverse solution strategies yield similarly high rewards. This counter-intuitive finding explains why mode-seeking optimization proves equally or more effective for alignment tasks. Our results suggest that alignment tasks do not inherently require diversity-preserving algorithms, and standard reward-maximizing RLVR methods can effectively transfer to moral reasoning without explicit diversity mechanisms.
tldr: This paper empirically studies whether diversity-seeking algorithms are essential for LLM alignment in moral reasoning tasks and finds that standard reward-maximizing RL methods perform comparably or better than distribution-matching approaches, challenging the initial hypothesis.
tldr_zh: 本文实证研究了在道德推理任务中，寻求多样性的算法对于LLM对齐是否是必需的。研究发现，标准的奖励最大化强化学习方法表现得与分布匹配方法相当甚至更好，这挑战了最初的假设。
summary_zh: 具有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）在逻辑推理任务中取得了显著成功，但大型语言模型（LLM）对齐是否需要根本不同的方法尚不清楚。考虑到道德推理中对多个有效响应的明显容忍度，一个自然的假设是，对齐任务本质上需要寻求多样性的分布匹配算法，而非奖励最大化的基于策略的方法。我们首次对MoReBench进行了全面的实证研究，比较了这两种范式。为了实现稳定的RLVR训练，我们通过训练一个Qwen3-1.7B的评判模型，构建了一个基于评价标准的奖励管道。与我们的假设相反，我们发现，在对齐任务中，分布匹配方法并未如预期般展现出优于奖励最大化方法的显著优势。通过将高奖励响应映射到语义空间的语义可视化，我们证明了道德推理表现出比数学推理更为集中的高奖励分布，而在数学推理中，多样化的解决方案策略可以产生类似的高奖励。这个反直觉的发现解释了为何寻求模式的优化方法在对齐任务中同样有效，甚至更有效。我们的结果表明，对齐任务本质上并不需要保留多样性的算法，并且标准的奖励最大化RLVR方法可以有效地转移到道德推理，而无需显式的多样性机制。

title: Towards Cognitive Defect Analysis in Active Infrared Thermography with Vision-Text Cues
summary: Active infrared thermography (AIRT) is currently witnessing a surge of artificial intelligence (AI) methodologies being deployed for automated subsurface defect analysis of high performance carbon fiber-reinforced polymers (CFRP). Deploying AI-based AIRT methodologies for inspecting CFRPs requires the creation of time consuming and expensive datasets of CFRP inspection sequences to train neural networks. To address this challenge, this work introduces a novel language-guided framework for cognitive defect analysis in CFRPs using AIRT and vision-language models (VLMs). Unlike conventional learning-based approaches, the proposed framework does not require developing training datasets for extensive training of defect detectors, instead it relies solely on pretrained multimodal VLM encoders coupled with a lightweight adapter to enable generative zero-shot understanding and localization of subsurface defects. By leveraging pretrained multimodal encoders, the proposed system enables generative zero-shot understanding of thermographic patterns and automatic detection of subsurface defects. Given the domain gap between thermographic data and natural images used to train VLMs, an AIRT-VLM Adapter is proposed to enhance the visibility of defects while aligning the thermographic domain with the learned representations of VLMs. The proposed framework is validated using three representative VLMs; specifically, GroundingDINO, Qwen-VL-Chat, and CogVLM. Validation is performed on 25 CFRP inspection sequences with impacts introduced at different energy levels, reflecting realistic defects encountered in industrial scenarios. Experimental results demonstrate that the AIRT-VLM adapter achieves signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) gains exceeding 10 dB compared with conventional thermographic dimensionality-reduction methods, while enabling zero-shot defect detection with intersection-over-union values reaching 70%.
tldr: This paper introduces a language-guided framework using vision-language models (VLMs) for zero-shot defect analysis in carbon fiber-reinforced polymers (CFRP) using active infrared thermography (AIRT), achieving promising results without extensive training data through an AIRT-VLM adapter.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种语言引导的框架，利用视觉-语言模型 (VLMs) 通过主动红外热成像 (AIRT) 对碳纤维增强聚合物 (CFRP) 进行零样本缺陷分析。该框架通过 AIRT-VLM 适配器实现了有希望的结果，无需大量训练数据。
summary_zh: 目前，主动红外热成像(AIRT)正见证着人工智能(AI)方法的大量涌现，被应用于高性能碳纤维增强聚合物(CFRP)的自动化 subsurface 缺陷分析。将基于AI的AIRT方法应用于CFRP检测需要创建耗时且昂贵的CFRP检测序列数据集，以训练神经网络。为了应对这一挑战，本文介绍了一种新颖的、语言引导的框架，用于使用AIRT和视觉-语言模型(VLM)对CFRP进行认知缺陷分析。与传统的基于学习的方法不同，所提出的框架不需要开发训练数据集来广泛训练缺陷检测器，而是仅依赖于预训练的多模态VLM编码器，并结合一个轻量级适配器，以实现 subsurface 缺陷的生成式零样本理解和定位。通过利用预训练的多模态编码器，所提出的系统能够对热成像模式进行生成式零样本理解，并自动检测 subsurface 缺陷。考虑到热成像数据与用于训练VLM的自然图像之间的领域差距，提出了一种AIRT-VLM适配器，以增强缺陷的可见性，同时使热成像领域与VLM的学习表示对齐。使用三种具有代表性的VLM验证了所提出的框架；具体来说，是GroundingDINO、Qwen-VL-Chat和CogVLM。验证是在25个CFRP检测序列上进行的，这些CFRP检测序列引入了不同能量水平的冲击，反映了工业场景中遇到的真实缺陷。实验结果表明，与传统的热成像降维方法相比，AIRT-VLM适配器实现了超过10 dB的信噪比(SNR)增益，同时实现了交并比(IoU)值达到70%的零样本缺陷检测。

title: UAV-MARL: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Time-Critical and Dynamic Medical Supply Delivery
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) are increasingly used to support time-critical medical supply delivery, providing rapid and flexible logistics during emergencies and resource shortages. However, effective deployment of UAV fleets requires coordination mechanisms capable of prioritizing medical requests, allocating limited aerial resources, and adapting delivery schedules under uncertain operational conditions. This paper presents a multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for coordinating UAV fleets in stochastic medical delivery scenarios where requests vary in urgency, location, and delivery deadlines. The problem is formulated as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) in which UAV agents maintain awareness of medical delivery demands while having limited visibility of other agents due to communication and localization constraints. The proposed framework employs Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) as the primary learning algorithm and evaluates several variants, including asynchronous extensions, classical actor--critic methods, and architectural modifications to analyze scalability and performance trade-offs. The model is evaluated using real-world geographic data from selected clinics and hospitals extracted from the OpenStreetMap dataset. The framework provides a decision-support layer that prioritizes medical tasks, reallocates UAV resources in real time, and assists healthcare personnel in managing urgent logistics. Experimental results show that classical PPO achieves superior coordination performance compared to asynchronous and sequential learning strategies, highlighting the potential of reinforcement learning for adaptive and scalable UAV-assisted healthcare logistics.
tldr: This paper presents a MARL framework using PPO for coordinating UAV fleets to deliver medical supplies, demonstrating improved performance over other RL strategies using real-world geographic data.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用PPO的MARL框架，用于协调无人机队运送医疗用品，并使用真实地理数据证明了其优于其他强化学习策略的性能。
summary_zh: 无人机（UAV）越来越多地用于支持时间敏感的医疗物资配送，在紧急情况和资源短缺期间提供快速且灵活的物流。然而，无人机队的有效部署需要协调机制，能够对医疗请求进行优先级排序，分配有限的空中资源，并在不确定的运行条件下调整配送计划。本文提出了一种多智能体强化学习（MARL）框架，用于在随机医疗配送场景中协调无人机队，其中请求的紧急程度、位置和交付截止日期各不相同。该问题被建模为一个部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），其中无人机智能体保持对医疗配送需求的感知，同时由于通信和定位限制，对其他智能体的可见性有限。所提出的框架采用近端策略优化（PPO）作为主要学习算法，并评估了多个变体，包括异步扩展、经典Actor-Critic方法和架构修改，以分析可扩展性和性能权衡。该模型使用从OpenStreetMap数据集中提取的选定诊所和医院的真实世界地理数据进行评估。该框架提供了一个决策支持层，可以优先处理医疗任务，实时重新分配无人机资源，并协助医护人员管理紧急物流。实验结果表明，与异步和顺序学习策略相比，经典PPO实现了卓越的协调性能，突出了强化学习在自适应和可扩展的无人机辅助医疗物流中的潜力。

title: The Attack and Defense Landscape of Agentic AI: A Comprehensive Survey
summary: AI agents that combine large language models with non-AI system components are rapidly emerging in real-world applications, offering unprecedented automation and flexibility. However, this unprecedented flexibility introduces complex security challenges fundamentally different from those in traditional software systems. This paper presents the first systematic and comprehensive survey of AI agent security, including an analysis of the design space, attack landscape, and defense mechanisms for secure AI agent systems. We further conduct case studies to point out existing gaps in securing agentic AI systems and identify open challenges in this emerging domain. Our work also introduces the first systematic framework for understanding the security risks and defense strategies of AI agents, serving as a foundation for building both secure agentic systems and advancing research in this critical area.
tldr: This survey paper comprehensively analyzes the security risks, attacks, and defense mechanisms specific to AI agents built using LLMs and other system components, providing a framework for building more secure agentic systems.
tldr_zh: 该综述论文全面分析了使用LLM和其他系统组件构建的AI Agent所特有的安全风险、攻击和防御机制，为构建更安全的Agent系统提供了一个框架。
summary_zh: 结合大型语言模型与非人工智能系统组件的AI代理正在现实世界的应用中迅速涌现，提供了前所未有的自动化和灵活性。然而，这种前所未有的灵活性带来了复杂的安全挑战，与传统软件系统中的安全挑战有着根本的不同。本文首次对AI代理的安全性进行了系统全面的综述，包括对安全AI代理系统的设计空间、攻击态势和防御机制的分析。我们进一步进行了案例研究，指出现有代理式AI系统安全方面的差距，并确定了这个新兴领域中的开放性挑战。我们的工作还引入了首个系统性框架，用于理解AI代理的安全风险和防御策略，为构建安全的代理式系统和推进这一关键领域的研究奠定基础。

title: Simulation-in-the-Reasoning (SiR): A Conceptual Framework for Empirically Grounded AI in Autonomous Transportation
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced reasoning through techniques like Chain-of-Thought (CoT). However, their reasoning largely re-mains textual and hypothetical, lacking empirical grounding in complex, dynamic domains like transportation. This paper introduces Simulation-in-the-Reasoning (SiR), a novel conceptual framework that embeds domain-specific simulators directly into the LLM reasoning loop. By treating intermediate reasoning steps as executable simulation experiments, SiR transforms LLM reasoning from narrative plausibility into a falsifiable, hypothesis-simulate-analyze workflow. We discuss applications, where LLM can formulate Intelligent Transport System (ITS) strategy hypotheses, invoke a traffic simulator via the Model Context Protocol (MCP), evaluate results under different demand patterns, and refine strategies through verification and aggregation. While implementing the framework is part of our ongoing work, this paper primarily establishes the conceptual foundation, discusses design considerations like API granularity, and outlines the vision of SiR as a cornerstone for interactive transportation digital twins. We argue that SiR represents a critical step towards trustworthy, empirically-validated AI for autonomous transportation systems.
tldr: This paper proposes Simulation-in-the-Reasoning (SiR), a framework embedding domain-specific simulators into LLM reasoning loops for empirically grounded AI in autonomous transportation, enabling strategy hypotheses, simulation, and refinement.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种名为Simulation-in-the-Reasoning (SiR) 的框架，其将领域特定的模拟器嵌入到LLM推理循环中，从而为自主交通中的AI提供经验基础，实现策略假设、模拟和改进。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）通过思维链（CoT）等技术提升了推理能力。然而，它们的推理主要停留在文本层面和假设阶段，缺乏在诸如交通运输等复杂动态领域中的经验基础。本文提出“推理中的仿真”（SiR），一种新颖的概念框架，将领域特定的仿真器直接嵌入到LLM的推理循环中。通过将中间推理步骤视为可执行的仿真实验，SiR将LLM的推理从叙事上的合理性转变为可证伪的、假设-仿真-分析的工作流程。我们讨论了应用场景，其中LLM可以制定智能交通系统（ITS）的策略假设，通过模型上下文协议（MCP）调用交通仿真器，评估不同需求模式下的结果，并通过验证和聚合来优化策略。虽然该框架的实施是我们正在进行的工作的一部分，但本文主要建立概念基础，讨论诸如API粒度等设计考虑因素，并概述SiR作为交互式交通数字孪生基石的愿景。我们认为SiR代表了迈向可信赖的、经过经验验证的自动驾驶交通系统人工智能的关键一步。

title: DSFlash: Comprehensive Panoptic Scene Graph Generation in Realtime
summary: Scene Graph Generation (SGG) aims to extract a detailed graph structure from an image, a representation that holds significant promise as a robust intermediate step for complex downstream tasks like reasoning for embodied agents. However, practical deployment in real-world applications - especially on resource constrained edge devices - requires speed and resource efficiency, challenges that have received limited attention in existing research. To bridge this gap, we introduce DSFlash, a low-latency model for panoptic scene graph generation designed to overcome these limitations. DSFlash can process a video stream at 56 frames per second on a standard RTX 3090 GPU, without compromising performance against existing state-of-the-art methods. Crucially, unlike prior approaches that often restrict themselves to salient relationships, DSFlash computes comprehensive scene graphs, offering richer contextual information while maintaining its superior latency. Furthermore, DSFlash is light on resources, requiring less than 24 hours to train on a single, nine-year-old GTX 1080 GPU. This accessibility makes DSFlash particularly well-suited for researchers and practitioners operating with limited computational resources, empowering them to adapt and fine-tune SGG models for specialized applications.
tldr: DSFlash introduces a real-time, resource-efficient panoptic scene graph generation model that achieves high FPS while maintaining performance and offering comprehensive scene understanding, making it suitable for edge devices and accessible to researchers with limited resources.
tldr_zh: DSFlash 提出了一种实时的、资源高效的全景场景图生成模型，该模型在保持性能的同时实现了高 FPS，并提供全面的场景理解，使其适用于边缘设备，且对于计算资源有限的研究人员来说也易于使用。
summary_zh: 场景图生成（SGG）旨在从图像中提取详细的图结构，这种表示形式被认为是一种强大的中间步骤，对于具身智能体推理等复杂的下游任务具有巨大的潜力。然而，在现实世界应用中的实际部署——尤其是在资源受限的边缘设备上——需要速度和资源效率，而现有的研究对这些挑战关注有限。为了弥合这一差距，我们推出了DSFlash，这是一种用于全景场景图生成的低延迟模型，旨在克服这些限制。DSFlash可以在标准的RTX 3090 GPU上以每秒56帧的速度处理视频流，并且不会影响相对于现有最先进方法的性能。至关重要的是，与通常将自身限制于显著关系的处理方法不同，DSFlash计算全面的场景图，提供更丰富的上下文信息，同时保持其卓越的延迟。此外，DSFlash对资源要求不高，只需在一块只有九年历史的GTX 1080 GPU上花费不到24小时即可完成训练。这种可访问性使得DSFlash特别适合于计算资源有限的研究人员和从业人员，使他们能够针对专门应用调整和微调SGG模型。

title: Learning to Wander: Improving the Global Image Geolocation Ability of LMMs via Actionable Reasoning
summary: Geolocation, the task of identifying the geographic location of an image, requires abundant world knowledge and complex reasoning abilities. Though advanced large multimodal models (LMMs) have shown superior aforementioned capabilities, their performance on the geolocation task remains unexplored. To this end, we introduce \textbf{WanderBench}, the first open access global geolocation benchmark designed for actionable geolocation reasoning in embodied scenarios. WanderBench contains over 32K panoramas across six continents, organized as navigable graphs that enable physical actions such as rotation and movement, transforming geolocation from static recognition into interactive exploration. Building on this foundation, we propose \textbf{GeoAoT} (Action of Thought), a \underline{Geo}location framework with \underline{A}ction of \underline{T}hough, which couples reasoning with embodied actions. Instead of generating textual reasoning chains, GeoAoT produces actionable plans such as, approaching landmarks or adjusting viewpoints, to actively reduce uncertainty. We further establish an evaluation protocol that jointly measures geolocation accuracy and difficulty-aware geolocation questioning ability. Experiments on 19 large multimodal models show that GeoAoT achieves superior fine-grained localization and stronger generalization in dynamic environments. WanderBench and GeoAoT define a new paradigm for actionable, reasoning driven geolocation in embodied visual understanding.
tldr: The paper introduces WanderBench, a global geolocation benchmark with navigable graphs, and GeoAoT, a framework that uses actionable plans for geolocation by coupling reasoning with embodied actions, achieving improved performance over existing LMMs.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了WanderBench，一个具有可导航图的全球地理定位基准，以及GeoAoT，一个通过将推理与具身行动相结合，使用可操作计划进行地理定位的框架，与现有LMM相比，实现了更好的性能。
summary_zh: 地理定位，即识别图像地理位置的任务，需要丰富的世界知识和复杂的推理能力。尽管先进的大型多模态模型（LMMs）已展现出卓越的上述能力，但它们在地理定位任务上的表现仍未被探索。为此，我们引入\textbf{WanderBench}，这是首个开放获取的全球地理定位基准，专为具身情境中的可操作地理定位推理而设计。WanderBench包含六大洲超过3.2万张全景图，组织成可导航的图结构，允许旋转和移动等物理动作，从而将地理定位从静态识别转变为交互式探索。在此基础上，我们提出了\textbf{GeoAoT}（行动思考），一个具有\underline{行}为\underline{思}考的\underline{地}理定位框架，它将推理与具身行动相结合。GeoAoT不生成文本推理链，而是产生可操作的计划，例如接近地标或调整视点，以主动减少不确定性。我们进一步建立了一个评估协议，共同衡量地理定位的准确性和难度感知的地理定位提问能力。在19个大型多模态模型上的实验表明，GeoAoT在动态环境中实现了卓越的细粒度定位和更强的泛化能力。WanderBench和GeoAoT为具身视觉理解中可操作的、推理驱动的地理定位定义了一种新的范式。

title: Motion Forcing: A Decoupled Framework for Robust Video Generation in Motion Dynamics
summary: The ultimate goal of video generation is to satisfy a fundamental trilemma: achieving high visual quality, maintaining rigorous physical consistency, and enabling precise controllability. While recent models can maintain this balance in simple, isolated scenarios, we observe that this equilibrium is fragile and often breaks down as scene complexity increases (e.g., involving collisions or dense traffic). To address this, we introduce \textbf{Motion Forcing}, a framework designed to stabilize this trilemma even in complex generative tasks. Our key insight is to explicitly decouple physical reasoning from visual synthesis via a hierarchical \textbf{``Point-Shape-Appearance''} paradigm. This approach decomposes generation into verifiable stages: modeling complex dynamics as sparse geometric anchors (\textbf{Point}), expanding them into dynamic depth maps that explicitly resolve 3D geometry (\textbf{Shape}), and finally rendering high-fidelity textures (\textbf{Appearance}). Furthermore, to foster robust physical understanding, we employ a \textbf{Masked Point Recovery} strategy. By randomly masking input anchors during training and enforcing the reconstruction of complete dynamic depth, the model is compelled to move beyond passive pattern matching and learn latent physical laws (e.g., inertia) to infer missing trajectories. Extensive experiments on autonomous driving benchmarks show that Motion Forcing significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, maintaining trilemma stability across complex scenes. Evaluations on physics and robotics further confirm our framework's generality.
tldr: The paper introduces Motion Forcing, a decoupled framework for robust video generation by explicitly separating physical reasoning and visual synthesis, achieving high fidelity, physical consistency, and controllability even in complex scenes. It uses a Point-Shape-Appearance paradigm coupled with Masked Point Recovery.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 Motion Forcing，一种解耦的视频生成框架，通过显式分离物理推理和视觉合成，即使在复杂的场景中也能实现高保真、物理一致性和可控性。它采用点-形状-外观范式，并结合了 Masked Point Recovery 技术。
summary_zh: 视频生成的最终目标是满足一个基本的三难困境：实现高视觉质量、保持严格的物理一致性，并实现精确的可控性。虽然最近的模型可以在简单、孤立的场景中维持这种平衡，但我们观察到，随着场景复杂性的增加（例如，涉及碰撞或密集交通），这种平衡变得脆弱且经常崩溃。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了\textbf{运动强迫(Motion Forcing)}，这是一个旨在稳定这种三难困境的框架，即使在复杂的生成任务中也是如此。我们的关键见解是通过分层的\textbf{``点-形状-外观(Point-Shape-Appearance)''}范例，将物理推理与视觉合成显式解耦。这种方法将生成分解为可验证的阶段：将复杂的动态建模为稀疏几何锚点 (\textbf{点})，将它们扩展为显式解析 3D 几何的动态深度图(\textbf{形状})，并最终渲染高保真纹理(\textbf{外观})。此外，为了促进鲁棒的物理理解，我们采用了一种\textbf{掩码点恢复(Masked Point Recovery)}策略。通过在训练期间随机掩蔽输入锚点并强制重建完整的动态深度，模型被迫超越被动模式匹配，并学习潜在的物理规律（例如惯性）来推断缺失的轨迹。在自动驾驶基准上的大量实验表明，运动强迫显著优于最先进的基线，在复杂场景中保持三难困境的稳定性。在物理和机器人领域的评估进一步证实了我们框架的通用性。

title: Video-Based Reward Modeling for Computer-Use Agents
summary: Computer-using agents (CUAs) are becoming increasingly capable; however, it remains difficult to scale evaluation of whether a trajectory truly fulfills a user instruction. In this work, we study reward modeling from execution video: a sequence of keyframes from an agent trajectory that is independent of the agent's internal reasoning or actions. Although video-execution modeling is method-agnostic, it presents key challenges, including highly redundant layouts and subtle, localized cues that determine success. We introduce Execution Video Reward 53k (ExeVR-53k), a dataset of 53k high-quality video--task--reward triplets. We further propose adversarial instruction translation to synthesize negative samples with step-level annotations. To enable learning from long, high-resolution execution videos, we design spatiotemporal token pruning, which removes homogeneous regions and persistent tokens while preserving decisive UI changes. Building on these components, we fine-tune an Execution Video Reward Model (ExeVRM) that takes only a user instruction and a video-execution sequence to predict task success. Our ExeVRM 8B achieves 84.7% accuracy and 87.7% recall on video-execution assessment, outperforming strong proprietary models such as GPT-5.2 and Gemini-3 Pro across Ubuntu, macOS, Windows, and Android, while providing more precise temporal attribution. These results show that video-execution reward modeling can serve as a scalable, model-agnostic evaluator for CUAs.
tldr: This paper introduces a video-based reward modeling approach (ExeVRM) for evaluating computer-using agent trajectories, using a new dataset (ExeVR-53k) and spatiotemporal token pruning techniques, outperforming proprietary models in assessing task success from video execution.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种基于视频的奖励建模方法 (ExeVRM)，用于评估计算机使用代理的轨迹，使用了一个新的数据集 (ExeVR-53k) 和时空token剪枝技术，在评估视频执行中的任务成功率方面优于专有模型。
summary_zh: 基于计算机的智能体（CUAs）正变得越来越强大；然而，评估一条轨迹是否真正实现了用户指令仍然很困难。本文研究了从执行视频（execution video）中进行奖励建模：执行视频是指来自智能体轨迹的关键帧序列，它独立于智能体的内部推理或行为。尽管视频执行建模与方法无关，但它也面临着关键挑战，包括高度冗余的布局和决定成功的细微、局部的线索。我们引入了 Execution Video Reward 53k (ExeVR-53k) 数据集，它包含 53k 个高质量的视频-任务-奖励三元组。我们进一步提出了对抗性指令翻译（adversarial instruction translation）来合成带有步骤级标注的负样本。为了能够从长时、高分辨率的执行视频中学习，我们设计了时空令牌剪枝（spatiotemporal token pruning），该方法移除同质区域和持久令牌，同时保留决定性的UI变化。基于这些组件，我们微调了一个 Execution Video Reward Model (ExeVRM)，它仅需用户指令和一个视频执行序列即可预测任务成功与否。我们的 ExeVRM 8B 在视频执行评估中达到了 84.7% 的准确率和 87.7% 的召回率，优于 Ubuntu、macOS、Windows 和 Android 平台上强大的专有模型 (例如 GPT-5.2 和 Gemini-3 Pro)，同时提供了更精确的时间归因。这些结果表明，视频执行奖励建模可以作为一种可扩展的、与模型无关的 CUA 评估器。

title: Scaling Reasoning Efficiently via Relaxed On-Policy Distillation
summary: On-policy distillation is pivotal for transferring reasoning capabilities to capacity-constrained models, yet remains prone to instability and negative transfer. We show that on-policy distillation can be interpreted, both theoretically and empirically, as a form of policy optimization, where the teacher-student log-likelihood ratio acts as a token reward. From this insight, we introduce REOPOLD (Relaxed On-Policy Distillation) a framework that stabilizes optimization by relaxing the strict imitation constraints of standard on-policy distillation. Specifically, REOPOLD temperately and selectively leverages rewards from the teacher through mixture-based reward clipping, entropy-based token-level dynamic sampling, and a unified exploration-to-refinement training strategy. Empirically, REOPOLD surpasses its baselines with superior sample efficiency during training and enhanced test-time scaling at inference, across mathematical, visual, and agentic tool-use reasoning tasks. Specifically, REOPOLD outperforms recent RL approaches achieving 6.7~12x greater sample efficiency and enables a 7B student to match a 32B teacher in visual reasoning with a ~3.32x inference speedup.
tldr: The paper introduces REOPOLD, a relaxed on-policy distillation framework that improves the stability and efficiency of transferring reasoning capabilities from large teacher models to smaller student models, achieving superior sample efficiency and inference speedups across various reasoning tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了REOPOLD，一种宽松的On-Policy蒸馏框架，通过稳定优化来提升大型教师模型向小型学生模型传递推理能力的效率和稳定性，在各类推理任务上实现了更高的样本效率和推理加速。
summary_zh: 在有限容量模型中迁移推理能力，在策略蒸馏至关重要，但它仍然容易出现不稳定性和负迁移。我们表明，从理论和实践两个层面来看，在策略蒸馏可以被解释为一种策略优化形式，其中教师-学生对数似然比充当令牌奖励。基于这一洞察，我们引入了REOPOLD (Relaxed On-Policy Distillation)，一个通过放宽标准在策略蒸馏的严格模仿约束来稳定优化的框架。具体而言，REOPOLD通过基于混合的奖励裁剪、基于熵的令牌级别动态采样以及统一的探索到精炼训练策略，适度和选择性地利用来自教师的奖励。在数学、视觉和agentic工具使用推理任务中，实验结果表明，REOPOLD超越了其基线，在训练期间具有更高的样本效率，并在推理时具有增强的测试时可扩展性。具体而言，REOPOLD优于最近的强化学习方法，实现了6.7~12倍的样本效率提升，并使得一个7B的学生模型能够在视觉推理中与一个32B的教师模型相媲美，并实现了约3.32倍的推理速度提升。

title: Learning Tree-Based Models with Gradient Descent
summary:
Tree-based models are widely recognized for their interpretability and have proven effective in various application domains, particularly in high-stakes domains. However, learning decision trees (DTs) poses a significant challenge due to their combinatorial complexity and discrete, non-differentiable nature. As a result, traditional methods such as CART, which rely on greedy search procedures, remain the most widely used approaches. These methods make locally optimal decisions at each node, constraining the search space and often leading to suboptimal tree structures. Additionally, their demand for custom training methods precludes a seamless integration into modern machine learning (ML) approaches.
  In this thesis, we propose a novel method for learning hard, axis-aligned DTs through gradient descent. Our approach utilizes backpropagation with a straight-through operator on a dense DT representation, enabling the joint optimization of all tree parameters, thereby addressing the two primary limitations of traditional DT algorithms. First, gradient-based training is not constrained by the sequential selection of locally optimal splits but, instead, jointly optimizes all tree parameters. Second, by leveraging gradient descent for optimization, our approach seamlessly integrates into existing ML approaches e.g., for multimodal and reinforcement learning tasks, which inherently rely on gradient descent.
  These advancements allow us to achieve state-of-the-art results across multiple domains, including interpretable DTs rees for small tabular datasets, advanced models for complex tabular data, multimodal learning, and interpretable reinforcement learning without information loss. By bridging the gap between DTs and gradient-based optimization, our method significantly enhances the performance and applicability of tree-based models across various ML domains.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel gradient-based method for learning hard decision trees, enabling joint optimization of tree parameters and seamless integration with modern ML approaches like multimodal and reinforcement learning, achieving state-of-the-art results across multiple domains.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的基于梯度的硬决策树学习方法，能够联合优化树参数，并与多模态和强化学习等现代机器学习方法无缝集成，在多个领域实现了最先进的结果。
summary_zh:
基于树的模型因其可解释性而被广泛认可，并在各个应用领域（尤其是在高风险领域）中被证明有效。然而，学习决策树（DTs）面临着巨大的挑战，原因在于其组合复杂性和离散、不可微的性质。因此，依赖于贪婪搜索过程的传统方法（例如CART）仍然是最常用的方法。这些方法在每个节点上做出局部最优的决策，限制了搜索空间，并经常导致次优的树结构。此外，它们对定制训练方法的需求阻碍了其与现代机器学习（ML）方法的无缝集成。

在本论文中，我们提出了一种通过梯度下降学习硬性的、轴对齐的决策树的新方法。我们的方法利用反向传播，结合密集决策树表示上的直通算子，能够联合优化所有树参数，从而解决了传统决策树算法的两个主要局限性。首先，基于梯度的训练不受局部最优分割的顺序选择的约束，而是联合优化所有树参数。其次，通过利用梯度下降进行优化，我们的方法可以无缝集成到现有的机器学习方法中，例如，用于多模态和强化学习任务，这些任务本质上依赖于梯度下降。

这些进步使我们能够在多个领域取得最先进的结果，包括用于小型表格数据的可解释决策树、用于复杂表格数据的高级模型、多模态学习以及无信息损失的可解释强化学习。通过弥合决策树和基于梯度的优化之间的差距，我们的方法显著提高了基于树的模型在各种机器学习领域的性能和适用性。

title: Tackling Length Inflation Without Trade-offs: Group Relative Reward Rescaling for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning significantly enhances LLM capabilities but suffers from a critical issue: length inflation, where models adopt verbosity or inefficient reasoning to maximize rewards. Prior approaches struggle to address this challenge in a general and lossless manner, primarily because additive penalties introduce a compensatory effect that creates optimization shortcuts, while heuristic gating strategies lack generality beyond binary feedback. To bridge this gap, we present Group Relative Reward Rescaling (GR$^3$), which reframes length control as a multiplicative rescaling paradigm, effectively establishing a generalized, continuous, and reward-dependent gating mechanism. To further ensure lossless optimization, we incorporate group-relative regularization and advantage-aware calibration, which dynamically adapt length budgets to instance difficulty and preserve the advantage signal of high-quality trajectories. Empirically, across both RLHF and RLVR settings, GR$^3$~maintains training dynamics and downstream performance comparable to standard GRPO while significantly mitigating length inflation, outperforming state-of-the-art length-regularized baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces Group Relative Reward Rescaling (GR$^3$), a novel method to address length inflation in reinforcement learning for LLMs, maintaining performance while significantly reducing verbosity without compensatory effects.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的方法，即Group Relative Reward Rescaling (GR$^3$)，用于解决LLM强化学习中长度膨胀的问题，从而在显著减少冗长的同时保持性能，且没有补偿效应。
summary_zh: 强化学习显著增强了LLM的能力，但存在一个关键问题：长度膨胀，即模型为了最大化奖励而倾向于冗长或采用低效的推理方式。先前的方法难以以通用且无损的方式解决这一挑战，主要是因为加性惩罚会引入补偿效应，从而产生优化捷径；而启发式门控策略则缺乏在二元反馈之外的通用性。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出了组相对奖励重缩放（GR$^3$），它将长度控制重新定义为一个乘性重缩放范式，有效地建立了一种广义的、连续的、且依赖于奖励的门控机制。为了进一步确保无损优化，我们结合了组相对正则化和优势感知校准，它们可以动态地调整长度预算，以适应实例的难度，并保留高质量轨迹的优势信号。实验表明，在RLHF和RLVR设置下，GR$^3$~在保持与标准GRPO相当的训练动态和下游性能的同时，显著减轻了长度膨胀，优于最先进的长度正则化基线方法。

title: GRACE: A Unified 2D Multi-Robot Path Planning Simulator & Benchmark for Grid, Roadmap, And Continuous Environments
summary: Advancing Multi-Agent Pathfinding (MAPF) and Multi-Robot Motion Planning (MRMP) requires platforms that enable transparent, reproducible comparisons across modeling choices. Existing tools either scale under simplifying assumptions (grids, homogeneous agents) or offer higher fidelity with less comparable instrumentation. We present GRACE, a unified 2D simulator+benchmark that instantiates the same task at multiple abstraction levels (grid, roadmap, continuous) via explicit, reproducible operators and a common evaluation protocol. Our empirical results on public maps and representative planners enable commensurate comparisons on a shared instance set. Furthermore, we quantify the expected representation-fidelity trade-offs (MRMP solves instances at higher fidelity but lower speed, while grid/roadmap planners scale farther). By consolidating representation, execution, and evaluation, GRACE thereby aims to make cross-representation studies more comparable and provides a means to advance multi-robot planning research and its translation to practice.
tldr: GRACE is a new 2D multi-robot path planning simulator and benchmark that unifies grid, roadmap, and continuous environments with a common evaluation protocol, facilitating comparable cross-representation studies.
tldr_zh: GRACE是一个新的2D多机器人路径规划模拟器和基准测试，它统一了网格、路标和连续环境，并采用通用的评估协议，从而促进了可比较的跨表征研究。
summary_zh: 改进多智能体路径规划（MAPF）和多机器人运动规划（MRMP）需要能够对建模选择进行透明、可复现比较的平台。现有工具要么在简化假设（网格、同质智能体）下具备良好的扩展性，要么在高保真度下提供较少的对比工具。我们提出了GRACE，一个统一的2D模拟器+基准，通过显式、可复现的算子和一个通用的评估协议，以多种抽象级别（网格、路标图、连续空间）实例化相同的任务。我们在公开地图和代表性规划器上的实验结果，能够在一个共享实例集上进行相应的比较。此外，我们量化了预期的表示-保真度权衡（MRMP以更高的保真度但更低的速度解决实例，而网格/路标图规划器则能扩展到更远的范围）。通过整合表示、执行和评估，GRACE旨在使跨表示研究更具可比性，并提供一种推进多机器人规划研究及其转化为实践的方法。

title: MapGCLR: Geospatial Contrastive Learning of Representations for Online Vectorized HD Map Construction
summary: Autonomous vehicles rely on map information to understand the world around them. However, the creation and maintenance of offline high-definition (HD) maps remains costly. A more scalable alternative lies in online HD map construction, which only requires map annotations at training time. To further reduce the need for annotating vast training labels, self-supervised training provides an alternative. This work focuses on improving the latent birds-eye-view (BEV) feature grid representation within a vectorized online HD map construction model by enforcing geospatial consistency between overlapping BEV feature grids as part of a contrastive loss function. To ensure geospatial overlap for contrastive pairs, we introduce an approach to analyze the overlap between traversals within a given dataset and generate subsidiary dataset splits following adjustable multi-traversal requirements. We train the same model supervised using a reduced set of single-traversal labeled data and self-supervised on a broader unlabeled set of data following our multi-traversal requirements, effectively implementing a semi-supervised approach. Our approach outperforms the supervised baseline across the board, both quantitatively in terms of the downstream tasks vectorized map perception performance and qualitatively in terms of segmentation in the principal component analysis (PCA) visualization of the BEV feature space.
tldr: This paper presents a semi-supervised approach, MapGCLR, for online HD map construction that utilizes geospatial contrastive learning on BEV feature grids with multi-traversal data splits, outperforming a supervised baseline.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种半监督方法MapGCLR，用于在线高清地图构建，该方法利用BEV特征网格上的地理空间对比学习和多轨迹数据分割，优于有监督的基线。
summary_zh: 自动驾驶车辆依赖于地图信息来理解周围的世界。然而，离线高精度(HD)地图的创建和维护成本仍然很高。一种更具可扩展性的替代方案是在线HD地图构建，它只需要在训练时进行地图标注。为了进一步减少标注大量训练标签的需求，自监督训练提供了一种替代方案。本工作专注于通过强制执行重叠BEV特征网格之间的地理空间一致性，从而改进矢量化在线HD地图构建模型中的潜在鸟瞰图(BEV)特征网格表示，这被作为对比损失函数的一部分。为了确保对比对的地理空间重叠，我们引入了一种方法来分析给定数据集中遍历之间的重叠，并根据可调整的多遍历需求生成辅助数据集分割。我们使用减少的单遍历标记数据集以监督方式训练同一模型，并根据我们的多遍历需求在更广泛的未标记数据集上进行自监督训练，从而有效地实现了一种半监督方法。我们的方法全面优于监督基线，无论是在下游任务矢量化地图感知性能的定量方面，还是在BEV特征空间的主成分分析(PCA)可视化中的分割的定性方面。

title: Learning Bimanual Cloth Manipulation with Vision-based Tactile Sensing via Single Robotic Arm
summary: Robotic cloth manipulation remains challenging due to the high-dimensional state space of fabrics, their deformable nature, and frequent occlusions that limit vision-based sensing. Although dual-arm systems can mitigate some of these issues, they increase hardware and control complexity. This paper presents Touch G.O.G., a compact vision-based tactile gripper and perception/control framework for single-arm bimanual cloth manipulation. The proposed framework combines three key components: (1) a novel gripper design and control strategy for in-gripper cloth sliding with a single robot arm, (2) a Vision Foundation Model-backboned Vision Transformer pipeline for cloth part classification (PC-Net) and edge pose estimation (PE-Net) using real and synthetic tactile images, and (3) an encoder-decoder synthetic data generator (SD-Net) that reduces manual annotation by producing high-fidelity tactile images. Experiments show 96% accuracy in distinguishing edges, corners, interior regions, and grasp failures, together with sub-millimeter edge localization and 4.5° orientation error. Real-world results demonstrate reliable cloth unfolding, even for crumpled fabrics, using only a single robotic arm. These results highlight Touch G.O.G. as a compact and cost-effective solution for deformable object manipulation.
tldr: This paper introduces Touch G.O.G., a vision-based tactile gripper and framework for single-arm bimanual cloth manipulation, using a novel gripper, a Vision Transformer for tactile image analysis, and a synthetic data generator.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Touch G.O.G.，一个基于视觉的触觉夹持器和框架，用于单臂双手动布料操作，它使用了一个新的夹持器、一个用于触觉图像分析的视觉Transformer和一个合成数据生成器。
summary_zh: 由于织物的高维状态空间、可变形特性以及限制视觉感知的频繁遮挡，机器人织物操作仍然具有挑战性。尽管双臂系统可以缓解这些问题，但同时也增加了硬件和控制的复杂性。本文提出了一种名为Touch G.O.G.的紧凑型视觉触觉一体化机器人夹爪以及用于单臂双手织物操作的感知/控制框架。该框架结合了三个关键组成部分：（1）一种新型夹爪设计和控制策略，用于利用单个机器人臂实现夹爪内部的织物滑动，（2）一个基于视觉基础模型骨干的视觉Transformer流水线，使用真实和合成的触觉图像，执行织物部分分类 (PC-Net) 和边缘姿态估计 (PE-Net)，以及（3）一个编码器-解码器合成数据生成器 (SD-Net)，通过生成高保真触觉图像来减少手动标注。实验表明，该系统在区分边缘、角点、内部区域和抓取失败时，准确率达到96%，边缘定位精度达到亚毫米级，方向误差为4.5°。实际结果表明，仅使用单个机器人臂即可可靠地展开织物，即使是褶皱的织物也能成功展开。这些结果表明，Touch G.O.G. 是一种紧凑且具有成本效益的可变形物体操作解决方案。

title: Safety-critical Control Under Partial Observability: Reach-Avoid POMDP meets Belief Space Control
summary: Partially Observable Markov Decision Processes (POMDPs) provide a principled framework for robot decision-making under uncertainty. Solving reach-avoid POMDPs, however, requires coordinating three distinct behaviors: goal reaching, safety, and active information gathering to reduce uncertainty. Existing online POMDP solvers attempt to address all three within a single belief tree search, but this unified approach struggles with the conflicting time scales inherent to these objectives. We propose a layered, certificate-based control architecture that operates directly in belief space, decoupling goal reaching, information gathering, and safety into modular components. We introduce Belief Control Lyapunov Functions (BCLFs) that formalize information gathering as a Lyapunov convergence problem in belief space, and show how they can be learned via reinforcement learning. For safety, we develop Belief Control Barrier Functions (BCBFs) that leverage conformal prediction to provide probabilistic safety guarantees over finite horizons. The resulting control synthesis reduces to lightweight quadratic programs solvable in real time, even for non-Gaussian belief representations with dimension $>10^4$. Experiments in simulation and on a space-robotics platform demonstrate real-time performance and improved safety and task success compared to state-of-the-art constrained POMDP solvers.
tldr: This paper presents a layered control architecture for reach-avoid POMDPs using Belief Control Lyapunov Functions (BCLFs) and Belief Control Barrier Functions (BCBFs) to improve safety and task success in robotics under partial observability, demonstrating real-time performance on a space-robotics platform.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于可达-避免 POMDPs 的分层控制架构，该架构使用信念控制李雅普诺夫函数 (BCLFs) 和信念控制障碍函数 (BCBFs) 来提高部分可观察性下机器人的安全性和任务成功率，并在空间机器人平台上展示了实时性能。
summary_zh: 部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP) 为不确定性下的机器人决策提供了一个原则性框架。然而，求解可达-规避 POMDP 需要协调三种不同的行为：目标到达、安全性以及主动信息收集以减少不确定性。现有的在线 POMDP 求解器试图在单一置信度树搜索中解决所有这三种行为，但这种统一的方法难以应对这些目标固有的冲突时间尺度。我们提出了一种分层的、基于证书的控制架构，该架构直接在置信度空间中运行，将目标到达、信息收集和安全性解耦为模块化组件。我们引入置信度控制 Lyapunov 函数 (BCLF)，将信息收集形式化为置信度空间中的 Lyapunov 收敛问题，并展示了如何通过强化学习来学习它们。对于安全性，我们开发了置信度控制障碍函数 (BCBF)，利用保角预测在有限时间内提供概率安全保证。由此产生的控制综合简化为轻量级的二次规划，即使对于维度 >10^4 的非高斯置信度表示也能实时求解。在模拟和空间机器人平台上进行的实验表明，与最先进的约束 POMDP 求解器相比，该方法具有实时性能，以及改进的安全性和任务成功率。

title: TacLoc: Global Tactile Localization on Objects from a Registration Perspective
summary: Pose estimation is essential for robotic manipulation, particularly when visual perception is occluded during gripper-object interactions. Existing tactile-based methods generally rely on tactile simulation or pre-trained models, which limits their generalizability and efficiency. In this study, we propose TacLoc, a novel tactile localization framework that formulates the problem as a one-shot point cloud registration task. TacLoc introduces a graph-theoretic partial-to-full registration method, leveraging dense point clouds and surface normals from tactile sensing for efficient and accurate pose estimation. Without requiring rendered data or pre-trained models, TacLoc achieves improved performance through normal-guided graph pruning and a hypothesis-and-verification pipeline. TacLoc is evaluated extensively on the YCB dataset. We further demonstrate TacLoc on real-world objects across two different visual-tactile sensors.
tldr: The paper introduces TacLoc, a novel tactile localization framework that uses point cloud registration for pose estimation, improving accuracy and generalizability without relying on simulation or pre-trained models.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为TacLoc的新型触觉定位框架，该框架利用点云配准进行姿态估计，提高了准确性和泛化性，且无需依赖仿真或预训练模型。
summary_zh: 姿态估计对于机器人操作至关重要，尤其是在夹爪-物体交互过程中视觉感知被遮挡时。现有的基于触觉的方法通常依赖于触觉模拟或预训练模型，这限制了其泛化性和效率。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的触觉定位框架TacLoc，该框架将问题表述为单样本点云配准任务。TacLoc引入了一种基于图论的部分到整体配准方法，利用来自触觉感知的密集点云和表面法线，实现高效且准确的姿态估计。无需渲染数据或预训练模型，TacLoc通过法线引导的图剪枝和假设验证流程实现了性能提升。TacLoc在YCB数据集上进行了广泛评估。我们还在两种不同的视觉-触觉传感器上，对真实世界的物体进行了TacLoc的演示。

title: Muscle Synergy Priors Enhance Biomechanical Fidelity in Predictive Musculoskeletal Locomotion Simulation
summary: Human locomotion emerges from high-dimensional neuromuscular control, making predictive musculoskeletal simulation challenging. We present a physiology-informed reinforcement-learning framework that constrains control using muscle synergies. We extracted a low-dimensional synergy basis from inverse musculoskeletal analyses of a small set of overground walking trials and used it as the action space for a muscle-driven three-dimensional model trained across variable speeds, slopes and uneven terrain. The resulting controller generated stable gait from 0.7-1.8 m/s and on $\pm$ 6$^{\circ}$ grades and reproduced condition-dependent modulation of joint angles, joint moments and ground reaction forces. Compared with an unconstrained controller, synergy-constrained control reduced non-physiological knee kinematics and kept knee moment profiles within the experimental envelope. Across conditions, simulated vertical ground reaction forces correlated strongly with human measurements, and muscle-activation timing largely fell within inter-subject variability. These results show that embedding neurophysiological structure into reinforcement learning can improve biomechanical fidelity and generalization in predictive human locomotion simulation with limited experimental data.
tldr: This paper presents a reinforcement learning framework for musculoskeletal locomotion simulation that uses muscle synergies to constrain control, resulting in improved biomechanical fidelity and generalization compared to unconstrained controllers.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于肌肉骨骼运动模拟的强化学习框架，该框架利用肌肉协同作用来约束控制，与无约束控制器相比，提高了生物力学保真度和泛化能力。
summary_zh: 人体运动源于高维度神经肌肉控制，这使得预测性肌肉骨骼模拟具有挑战性。我们提出了一种基于生理学的强化学习框架，该框架利用肌肉协同约束控制。我们从少量地面步行试验的逆向肌肉骨骼分析中提取了一个低维协同基础，并将其用作肌肉驱动的三维模型的动作空间，该模型经过了不同速度、坡度和不平坦地形的训练。生成的控制器在0.7-1.8 m/s的速度和$\pm$ 6$^{\circ}$坡度下产生了稳定的步态，并重现了与条件相关的关节角度、关节力矩和地面反作用力的调节。与无约束控制器相比，协同约束控制减少了非生理性的膝关节运动学，并将膝关节力矩曲线保持在实验范围内。在各种条件下，模拟的垂直地面反作用力与人体测量结果高度相关，并且肌肉激活时序主要落在受试者间的变异性范围内。这些结果表明，将神经生理学结构嵌入强化学习可以提高预测性人体运动模拟的生物力学保真度和泛化能力，并且只需要有限的实验数据。

title: SUBTA: A Framework for Supported User-Guided Bimanual Teleoperation in Structured Assembly
summary: In human-robot collaboration, shared autonomy enhances human performance through precise, intuitive support. Effective robotic assistance requires accurately inferring human intentions and understanding task structures to determine optimal support timing and methods. In this paper, we present SUBTA, a supported teleoperation system for bimanual assembly that couples learned intention estimation, scene-graph task planning, and context-dependent motion assists. We validate our approach through a user study (N=12) comparing standard teleoperation, motion-support only, and SUBTA. Linear mixed-effects analysis revealed that SUBTA significantly outperformed standard teleoperation in position accuracy (p<0.001, d=1.18) and orientation accuracy (p<0.001, d=1.75), while reducing mental demand (p=0.002, d=1.34). Post-experiment ratings indicate clearer, more trustworthy visual feedback and predictable interventions in SUBTA. The results demonstrate that SUBTA greatly improves both effectiveness and user experience in teleoperation.
tldr: The paper introduces SUBTA, a supported teleoperation system for bimanual assembly that uses learned intention estimation, scene-graph task planning, and motion assists, showing improvements in accuracy, mental demand, and user experience compared to standard teleoperation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SUBTA，一个用于双手动装配的支持型遥操作系统，它使用学习到的意图估计、场景图任务规划和运动辅助，与标准遥操作相比，在精度、心理负担和用户体验方面都有所提高。
summary_zh: 在人机协作中，共享自主通过精准、直观的支持来提升人类表现。有效的机器人辅助需要准确地推断人类意图并理解任务结构，从而确定最佳的支持时机和方法。在本文中，我们提出SUBTA，一个用于双手动装配的支持型遥操作系统，该系统结合了学习得到的意图估计、场景图任务规划和情境相关的运动辅助。我们通过一项用户研究（N=12）验证了我们的方法，比较了标准遥操作、仅运动支持和SUBTA。线性混合效应分析表明，SUBTA在位置精度（p<0.001, d=1.18）和方向精度（p<0.001, d=1.75）方面显著优于标准遥操作，同时降低了心理负荷（p=0.002, d=1.34）。实验后的评级表明，SUBTA中视觉反馈更清晰、更值得信赖，并且干预措施具有可预测性。结果表明，SUBTA大大提高了遥操作的有效性和用户体验。

title: Rethinking Gaussian Trajectory Predictors: Calibrated Uncertainty for Safe Planning
summary: Accurate trajectory prediction is critical for safe autonomous navigation in crowded environments. While many trajectory predictors output Gaussian distributions to represent the multi-modal distribution over future pedestrian positions, the reliability of their confidence levels often remains unaddressed. This limitation can lead to unsafe or overly conservative motion planning when the predictor is integrated with an uncertainty-aware planner. Existing Gaussian trajectory predictors primarily rely on the Negative Log-Likelihood loss, which is prone to predict over- or under-confident distributions, and may compromise downstream planner safety. This paper introduces a novel loss function for calibrating prediction uncertainty which leverages Kernel Density Estimation to estimate the empirical distribution of confidence levels. The proposed formulation enforces consistency with the properties of a Gaussian assumption by explicitly matching the estimated empirical distribution to the Chi-squared distribution. To ensure accurate mean prediction, a Mean Squared Error term is also incorporated in the final loss formulation. Experimental results on real-world trajectory datasets show that our method significantly improves the reliability of confidence levels predicted by different State-Of-The-Art Gaussian trajectory predictors. We also demonstrate the importance of providing planners with reliable probabilistic insights (i.e. calibrated confidence levels) for collision-free navigation in complex scenarios. For this purpose, we integrate Gaussian trajectory predictors trained with our loss function with an uncertainty-aware Model Predictive Control on scenarios extracted from real-world datasets, achieving improved planning performance through calibrated confidence levels.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel loss function leveraging Kernel Density Estimation to calibrate the uncertainty of Gaussian trajectory predictors, improving downstream planning performance in autonomous navigation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新的损失函数，利用核密度估计来校准高斯轨迹预测器的不确定性，从而提高自主导航中下游规划的性能。
summary_zh: 准确的轨迹预测对于在拥挤环境中实现安全的自动导航至关重要。虽然许多轨迹预测器输出高斯分布以表示未来行人位置上的多模态分布，但其置信度水平的可靠性通常未得到解决。当预测器与具有不确定性意识的规划器集成时，这种局限性可能导致不安全或过于保守的运动规划。现有的高斯轨迹预测器主要依赖于负对数似然损失，该损失容易预测过度自信或自信不足的分布，并可能损害下游规划器的安全性。本文介绍了一种新的损失函数，用于校准预测不确定性，该函数利用核密度估计来估计置信度水平的经验分布。所提出的公式通过将估计的经验分布与卡方分布显式匹配，从而强制与高斯假设的性质保持一致。为了确保准确的均值预测，最终的损失函数中也包含均方误差项。在真实世界轨迹数据集上的实验结果表明，我们的方法显著提高了不同最先进高斯轨迹预测器预测的置信度水平的可靠性。我们还证明了为规划器提供可靠的概率性见解（即校准的置信度水平）对于在复杂场景中进行无碰撞导航的重要性。为此，我们将使用我们的损失函数训练的高斯轨迹预测器与真实世界数据集中提取的场景中的具有不确定性意识的模型预测控制集成，通过校准的置信度水平实现了改进的规划性能。

title: Shape Control of a Planar Hyper-Redundant Robot via Hybrid Kinematics-Informed and Learning-based Approach
summary: Hyper-redundant robots offer high dexterity, making them good at operating in confined and unstructured environments. To extend the reachable workspace, we built a multi-segment flexible rack actuated planar robot. However, the compliance of the flexible mechanism introduces instability, rendering it sensitive to external and internal uncertainties. To address these limitations, we propose a hybrid kinematics-informed and learning-based shape control method, named SpatioCoupledNet. The neural network adopts a hierarchical design that explicitly captures bidirectional spatial coupling between segments while modeling local disturbance along the robot body. A confidence-gating mechanism integrates prior kinematic knowledge, allowing the controller to adaptively balance model-based and learned components for improved convergence and fidelity. The framework is validated on a five-segment planar hyper-redundant robot under three representative shape configurations. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms both analytical and purely neural controllers. In complex scenarios, it reduces steady-state error by up to 75.5% against the analytical model, and accelerates convergence by up to 20.5% compared to the data-driven baseline. Furthermore, gating analysis reveals a state-dependent authority fusion, shifting toward data-driven predictions in unstable states, while relying on physical priors in the remaining cases. Finally, we demonstrate robust performance in a dynamic task where the robot maintains a fixed end-effector position while avoiding moving obstacles, achieving a precise tip-positioning accuracy with a mean error of 10.47 mm.
tldr: This paper presents a hybrid kinematics-informed and learning-based approach (SpatioCoupledNet) for shape control of a planar hyper-redundant robot, demonstrating improved accuracy and convergence compared to analytical and purely neural methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种混合的基于运动学和学习的方法 (SpatioCoupledNet) 用于平面超冗余机器人的形状控制。实验表明，与解析模型和纯神经网络方法相比，该方法提高了准确性和收敛速度。
summary_zh: 超冗余机器人具有很高的灵活性，使其擅长在狭窄和非结构化环境中操作。为了扩展可达工作空间，我们构建了一种由多段式柔性齿条驱动的平面机器人。然而，柔性机构的柔顺性引入了不稳定性，使其对外部和内部的不确定性非常敏感。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种混合的、基于运动学信息和学习的形状控制方法，命名为 SpatioCoupledNet。该神经网络采用分层设计，显式地捕捉段与段之间的双向空间耦合，同时对沿机器人本体的局部扰动进行建模。一种置信度门控机制集成了先验运动学知识，使控制器能够自适应地平衡基于模型和基于学习的组件，从而提高收敛性和保真度。该框架在一个五段式平面超冗余机器人的三种典型形状配置下进行了验证。实验结果表明，所提出的方法始终优于解析控制器和纯神经控制器。在复杂场景中，相对于解析模型，稳态误差最多降低了 75.5%，而与数据驱动的基线相比，收敛速度最多加快了 20.5%。此外，门控分析揭示了一种状态相关的权限融合，在不稳定状态下转向数据驱动的预测，而在其余情况下则依赖于物理先验。最后，我们展示了在动态任务中的鲁棒性能，机器人保持固定的末端执行器位置，同时避开移动的障碍物，实现了精确的末端定位精度，平均误差为 10.47 毫米。

title: Few-Shot Adaptation to Non-Stationary Environments via Latent Trend Embedding for Robotics
summary: Robotic systems operating in real-world environments often suffer from concept shift, where the input-output relationship changes due to latent environmental factors that are not directly observable. Conventional adaptation methods update model parameters, which may cause catastrophic forgetting and incur high computational cost. This paper proposes a latent Trend ID-based framework for few-shot adaptation in non-stationary environments. Instead of modifying model weights, a low-dimensional environmental state, referred to as the Trend ID, is estimated via backpropagation while the model parameters remain fixed. To prevent overfitting caused by per-sample latent variables, we introduce temporal regularization and a state transition model that enforces smooth evolution of the latent space. Experiments on a quantitative food grasping task demonstrate that the learned Trend IDs are distributed across distinct regions of the latent space with temporally consistent trajectories, and that few-shot adaptation to unseen environments is achieved without modifying model parameters. The proposed framework provides a scalable and interpretable solution for robotics applications operating across diverse and evolving environments.
tldr: This paper introduces a latent Trend ID framework for few-shot adaptation in non-stationary robotic environments, estimating a low-dimensional environmental state via backpropagation instead of updating model parameters to avoid catastrophic forgetting.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种潜在趋势ID框架，用于非平稳机器人环境中的小样本自适应，通过反向传播估计低维环境状态，而不是更新模型参数，以避免灾难性遗忘。
summary_zh: 在真实环境中运行的机器人系统经常遇到概念漂移问题，即由于无法直接观测到的潜在环境因素，输入输出关系发生变化。传统的自适应方法会更新模型参数，这可能导致灾难性遗忘并产生高昂的计算成本。本文提出了一种基于潜在趋势ID的框架，用于在非平稳环境中的少样本自适应学习。该框架不修改模型权重，而是通过反向传播估计一个低维环境状态，称之为趋势ID，同时保持模型参数固定。为了防止每个样本的潜在变量导致过拟合，我们引入了时间正则化和一个状态转移模型，以确保潜在空间的平滑演化。在定量食物抓取任务上的实验表明，学习到的趋势ID分布在潜在空间的不同区域，并具有时间一致的轨迹，并且无需修改模型参数即可实现对未见环境的少样本自适应。该框架为在多样化和不断发展的环境中运行的机器人应用提供了一个可扩展且可解释的解决方案。

title: Adaptive Manipulation Potential and Haptic Estimation for Tool-Mediated Interaction
summary: Achieving human-level dexterity in contact-rich, tool-mediated manipulation remains a significant challenge due to visual occlusion and the underdetermined nature of haptic sensing. This paper introduces a parameterized Equilibrium Manifold (EM) as a unified representation for tool-mediated interaction, and develops a closed-loop framework that integrates haptic estimation, online planning, and adaptive stiffness control. We establish a physical-geometric duality using an adaptive manipulation potential incorporating a differentiable contact model, which induces the manifold's geometric structure and ensures that complex physical interactions are encapsulated as continuous operations on the EM. Within this framework, we reformulate haptic estimation as a manifold parameter estimation problem. Specifically, a hybrid inference strategy (haptic SLAM) is employed in which discrete object shapes are classified via particle filtering, while the continuous object pose is estimated using analytical gradients for efficient optimization. By continuously updating the parameters of the manipulation potential, the framework dynamically reshapes the induced EM to guide online trajectory replanning and implement uncertainty-aware impedance control, thereby closing the perception-action loop. The system is validated through simulation and over 260 real-world screw-loosening trials. Experimental results demonstrate robust identification and manipulation success in standard scenarios while maintaining accurate tracking. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm that haptic SLAM and uncertainty-aware stiffness modulation outperform fixed impedance baselines, effectively preventing jamming during tight tolerance interactions.
tldr: This paper introduces a closed-loop framework for tool-mediated robotic manipulation that uses a parameterized Equilibrium Manifold (EM) for haptic estimation, online planning, and adaptive stiffness control, validated through simulation and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个用于工具辅助机器人操作的闭环框架，该框架使用参数化的平衡流形（EM）进行触觉估计、在线规划和自适应刚度控制，并通过仿真和实际实验验证。
summary_zh: 在富含接触、工具介导的操控中实现人类水平的灵巧性仍然是一项重大挑战，原因在于视觉遮挡和触觉感知的欠定性。 本文引入了一种参数化的平衡流形（EM）作为工具介导交互的统一表示，并开发了一个闭环框架，该框架集成了触觉估计、在线规划和自适应刚度控制。 我们利用包含可微接触模型的自适应操控势能建立物理-几何对偶性，该操控势能诱导了流形的几何结构，并确保复杂的物理交互被封装为在EM上的连续操作。 在此框架内，我们将触觉估计重新公式化为流形参数估计问题。 具体而言，采用混合推理策略（触觉SLAM），其中离散物体形状通过粒子滤波进行分类，而连续物体姿态使用解析梯度进行估计以实现高效优化。 通过不断更新操控势能的参数，该框架动态地重塑了诱导的EM，以指导在线轨迹重规划并实施不确定性感知的阻抗控制，从而闭合了感知-动作循环。 该系统通过仿真和超过260个真实世界的螺丝松动试验进行了验证。 实验结果表明，在标准场景中能够实现稳健的识别和操控成功，同时保持精确的跟踪。 此外，消融研究证实，触觉SLAM和不确定性感知的刚度调制优于固定阻抗基线，有效地防止了在严格公差交互期间的卡滞。

title: PC-Diffuser: Path-Consistent Capsule CBF Safety Filtering for Diffusion-Based Trajectory Planner
summary: Autonomous driving in complex traffic requires planners that generalize beyond hand-crafted rules, motivating data-driven approaches that learn behavior from expert demonstrations. Diffusion-based trajectory planners have recently shown strong closed-loop performance by iteratively denoising a full-horizon plan, but they remain difficult to certify and can fail catastrophically in rare or out-of-distribution scenarios. To address this challenge, we present PC-Diffuser, a safety augmentation framework that embeds a certifiable, path-consistent barrier-function structure directly into the denoising loop of diffusion planning. The key idea is to make safety an intrinsic part of trajectory generation rather than a post-hoc fix: we enforce forward invariance along the rollout while preserving the diffusion model's intended path geometry. Specifically, PC-Diffuser (i) evaluates collision risk using a capsule-distance barrier function that better reflects vehicle geometry and reduces unnecessary conservativeness, (ii) converts denoised waypoints into dynamically feasible motion under a kinematic bicycle model, and (iii) applies a path-consistent safety filter that eliminates residual constraint violations without geometric distortion, so the corrected plan remains close to the learned distribution. By injecting these safety-consistent corrections at every denoising step and feeding the refined trajectory back into the diffusion process, PC-Diffuser enables iterative, context-aware safeguarding instead of post-hoc repair...
tldr: The paper introduces PC-Diffuser, a framework for safe autonomous driving that integrates a certifiable, path-consistent barrier function into diffusion-based trajectory planners to mitigate catastrophic failures in complex traffic scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了PC-Diffuser，一个用于安全自主驾驶的框架，它将可认证的、路径一致的障碍函数集成到基于扩散的轨迹规划器中，以减轻复杂交通场景中的灾难性故障。
summary_zh: 复杂交通环境下的自动驾驶需要具备超越手动规则的泛化能力的规划器，这推动了基于数据的学习方法，通过专家演示学习行为。基于扩散的轨迹规划器最近展示了强大的闭环性能，它通过迭代去噪完整的时间范围计划来实现，但它们仍然难以验证，并且在罕见或超出分布的情况下可能会发生灾难性故障。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了PC-Diffuser，这是一个安全增强框架，它将可验证的、路径一致的Barrier函数结构直接嵌入到扩散规划的去噪循环中。核心思想是使安全性成为轨迹生成的一个内在组成部分，而不是事后补救：我们在保持扩散模型的预期路径几何形状的同时，强制执行沿轨迹的向前不变性。具体来说，PC-Diffuser (i) 使用胶囊距离Barrier函数评估碰撞风险，该函数更好地反映了车辆几何形状并减少了不必要的保守性，(ii) 在运动学自行车模型下将去噪后的路径点转换为动态可行运动，以及 (iii) 应用路径一致的安全滤波器，该滤波器消除了残余约束违规，而不会产生几何失真，因此校正后的计划仍然接近学习到的分布。通过在每个去噪步骤中注入这些安全一致的校正，并将改进的轨迹反馈到扩散过程中，PC-Diffuser实现了迭代的、上下文感知的安全防护，而不是事后修复……

title: SteadyTray: Learning Object Balancing Tasks in Humanoid Tray Transport via Residual Reinforcement Learning
summary: Stabilizing unsecured payloads against the inherent oscillations of dynamic bipedal locomotion remains a critical engineering bottleneck for humanoids in unstructured environments. To solve this, we introduce ReST-RL, a hierarchical reinforcement learning architecture that explicitly decouples locomotion from payload stabilization, evaluated via the SteadyTray benchmark. Rather than relying on monolithic end-to-end learning, our framework integrates a robust base locomotion policy with a dynamic residual module engineered to actively cancel gait-induced perturbations at the end-effector. This architectural separation ensures steady tray transport without degrading the underlying bipedal stability. In simulation, the residual design significantly outperforms end-to-end baselines in gait smoothness and orientation accuracy, achieving a 96.9% success rate in variable velocity tracking and 74.5% robustness against external force disturbances. Successfully deployed on the Unitree G1 humanoid hardware, this modular approach demonstrates highly reliable zero-shot sim-to-real generalization across various objects and external force disturbances.
tldr: The paper introduces ReST-RL, a hierarchical reinforcement learning architecture for humanoid robots to stably transport objects on a tray, achieving zero-shot sim-to-real transfer on a Unitree G1.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ReST-RL，一种分层强化学习架构，用于人形机器人稳定地运输托盘上的物体，并在Unitree G1上实现了零样本的sim-to-real迁移。
summary_zh:
摘要：
稳定动态双足运动中未固定的负载，以对抗其固有的振荡，仍然是人形机器人在非结构化环境中面临的关键工程瓶颈。 为了解决这个问题，我们引入 ReST-RL，一种分层强化学习架构，它明确地将运动与负载稳定解耦，并通过 SteadyTray 基准进行评估。 我们的框架没有依赖于单片端到端学习，而是将稳健的基础运动策略与一个动态残差模块集成在一起，该模块旨在主动消除末端执行器处步态引起的扰动。 这种架构分离确保了托盘的稳定运输，而不会降低底层双足行走的稳定性。 在仿真中，残差设计在步态平稳性和方向精度方面明显优于端到端基线，在可变速度跟踪中实现了 96.9% 的成功率，在抵抗外力扰动方面实现了 74.5% 的鲁棒性。 此模块化方法已成功部署在宇树 G1 人形机器人硬件上，证明了其在各种物体和外力扰动下的高度可靠的零样本 sim-to-real 泛化能力。

title: Degeneracy-Resilient Teach and Repeat for Geometrically Challenging Environments Using FMCW Lidar
summary: Teach and Repeat (T&R) topometric navigation enables robots to autonomously repeat previously traversed paths without relying on GPS, making it well suited for operations in GPS-denied environments such as underground mines and lunar navigation. State-of-the-art T&R systems typically rely on iterative closest point (ICP)-based estimation; however, in geometrically degenerate environments with sparsely structured terrain, ICP often becomes ill-conditioned, resulting in degraded localization and unreliable navigation performance. To address this challenge, we present a degeneracy-resilient Frequency-Modulated Continuous-Wave (FMCW) lidar T&R navigation system consisting of Doppler velocity-based odometry and degeneracy-aware scan-to-map localization. Leveraging FMCW lidar, which provides per-point radial velocity measurements via the Doppler effect, we extend a geometry-independent, correspondence-free motion estimation to include principled pose uncertainty estimation that remains stable in degenerate environments. We further propose a degeneracy-aware localization method that incorporates per-point curvature for improved data association, and unifies translational and rotational scales to enable consistent degeneracy detection. Closed-loop field experiments across three environments with varying structural richness demonstrate that the proposed system reliably completes autonomous navigation, including in a challenging flat airport test field where a conventional ICP-based system fails.
