tldr: This paper presents a novel teach and repeat navigation system using FMCW lidar that is resilient to geometrically degenerate environments where traditional ICP-based methods fail and leverages Doppler velocity and per-point curvature for improved localization and motion estimation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用FMCW激光雷达的新型Teach and Repeat导航系统，该系统能够适应传统ICP方法失效的几何退化环境，并利用多普勒速度和逐点曲率来改进定位和运动估计。
summary_zh: “教导与重复”（T&R）拓扑导航使机器人能够在不依赖 GPS 的情况下自主重复之前走过的路径，非常适合在 GPS 受限环境中的操作，例如地下矿山和月球导航。目前最先进的 T&R 系统通常依赖于基于迭代最近点（ICP）的估计；然而，在几何退化的、结构稀疏的地形环境中，ICP 经常变得病态，导致定位精度下降和导航性能不可靠。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种具有抗退化能力的调频连续波（FMCW）激光雷达 T&R 导航系统，该系统包括基于多普勒速度的里程计和具有退化感知的扫描到地图定位。利用能够通过多普勒效应提供逐点径向速度测量的 FMCW 激光雷达，我们扩展了一种与几何无关、无对应的运动估计方法，使其包含原则性的姿态不确定性估计，从而在退化环境中保持稳定。我们进一步提出了一种具有退化感知的定位方法，该方法结合了逐点曲率以改进数据关联，并统一了平移和旋转尺度，从而实现一致的退化检测。在三种具有不同结构丰富度的环境中进行的闭环现场实验表明，所提出的系统能够可靠地完成自主导航，包括在一个具有挑战性的平坦机场测试场地，而传统的基于 ICP 的系统在该场地中会失效。

title: TATIC: Task-Aware Temporal Learning for Human Intent Inference from Physical Corrections in Human-Robot Collaboration
summary: In human-robot collaboration (HRC), robots must adapt online to dynamic task constraints and evolving human intent. While physical corrections provide a natural, low-latency channel for operators to convey motion-level adjustments, extracting task-level semantic intent from such brief interactions remains challenging. Existing foundation-model-based approaches primarily rely on vision and language inputs and lack mechanisms to interpret physical feedback. Meanwhile, traditional physical human-robot interaction (pHRI) methods leverage physical corrections for trajectory guidance but struggle to infer task-level semantics. To bridge this gap, we propose TATIC, a unified framework that utilizes torque-based contact force estimation and a task-aware Temporal Convolutional Network (TCN) to jointly infer discrete task-level intent and estimate continuous motion-level parameters from brief physical corrections. Task-aligned feature canonicalization ensures robust generalization across diverse layouts, while an intent-driven adaptation scheme translates inferred human intent into robot motion adaptations. Experiments achieve a 0.904 Macro-F1 score in intent recognition and demonstrate successful hardware validation in collaborative disassembly (see experimental video at https://youtu.be/xF8A52qwEc8).
tldr: The paper introduces TATIC, a framework for inferring human intent from physical corrections in HRC using torque-based contact force estimation and a task-aware Temporal Convolutional Network, achieving high accuracy in intent recognition and hardware validation.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了TATIC，一个通过扭矩接触力估计和任务感知时序卷积网络，从人机协作中的物理修正推断人类意图的框架。该框架在意图识别中实现了高精度，并完成了硬件验证。
summary_zh: 在人机协作（HRC）中，机器人必须在线适应动态的任务约束和不断演变的人类意图。虽然物理校正为操作人员提供了一个自然的、低延迟的通道来传达运动层面的调整，但从这种简短的交互中提取任务层面的语义意图仍然具有挑战性。现有的基于基础模型的方法主要依赖于视觉和语言输入，缺乏解释物理反馈的机制。同时，传统的物理人机交互（pHRI）方法利用物理校正进行轨迹引导，但难以推断任务层面的语义。为了弥合这一差距，我们提出 TATIC，一个统一的框架，它利用基于扭矩的接触力估计和一个任务感知的时序卷积网络（TCN），从简短的物理校正中联合推断离散的任务层面意图并估计连续的运动层面参数。任务对齐的特征规范化确保了在不同布局中的鲁棒泛化，而意图驱动的适应方案将推断出的人类意图转化为机器人运动的适应。实验在意图识别方面取得了 0.904 的宏平均 F1 分数，并在协作拆卸中展示了成功的硬件验证（请观看实验视频：https://youtu.be/xF8A52qwEc8）。

title: Perceptive Hierarchical-Task MPC for Sequential Mobile Manipulation in Unstructured Semi-Static Environments
summary: As compared to typical mobile manipulation tasks, sequential mobile manipulation poses a unique challenge -- as the robot operates over extended periods, successful task completion is not solely dependent on consistent motion generation but also on the robot's awareness and adaptivity to changes in the operating environment. While existing motion planners can generate whole-body trajectories to complete sequential tasks, they typically assume that the environment remains static and rely on precomputed maps. This assumption often breaks down during long-term operations, where semi-static changes such as object removal, introduction, or shifts are common. In this work, we propose a novel perceptive hierarchical-task model predictive control (HTMPC) framework for efficient sequential mobile manipulation in unstructured, changing environments. To tackle the challenge, we leverage a Bayesian inference framework to explicitly model object-level changes and thereby maintain a temporally accurate representation of the 3D environment; this up-to-date representation is embedded in a lexicographic optimization framework to enable efficient execution of sequential tasks. We validate our perceptive HTMPC approach through both simulated and real-robot experiments. In contrast to baseline methods, our approach systematically accounts for moved and phantom obstacles, successfully completing sequential tasks with higher efficiency and reactivity, without relying on prior maps or external infrastructure.
tldr: This paper introduces a perceptive hierarchical-task model predictive control (HTMPC) framework for sequential mobile manipulation in dynamic environments via Bayesian inference for object-level change detection, improving efficiency and reactivity without precomputed maps.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种感知分层任务模型预测控制（HTMPC）框架，用于动态环境中的顺序移动操作，通过贝叶斯推理进行对象级变化检测，从而提高效率和反应性，而无需预先计算的地图。
summary_zh: 与典型的移动操作任务相比，序列移动操作提出了独特的挑战——随着机器人在更长时间内运行，成功完成任务不仅依赖于一致的运动生成，还依赖于机器人对操作环境变化的感知和适应性。虽然现有的运动规划器可以生成全身轨迹以完成序列任务，但它们通常假设环境保持静态并依赖于预先计算好的地图。这种假设在长期操作中通常会失效，因为诸如物体移除、引入或移动等半静态变化很常见。 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的感知分层任务模型预测控制 (HTMPC) 框架，用于在非结构化、变化的环境中高效地进行序列移动操作。为了应对这一挑战，我们利用贝叶斯推断框架显式地建模物体级别的变化，从而维护对 3D 环境的时间精确表示；这种最新的表示被嵌入到字典序优化框架中，以实现序列任务的高效执行。我们通过仿真和真实机器人实验验证了我们的感知 HTMPC 方法。与基线方法相比，我们的方法系统地考虑了移动的和虚设的障碍物，成功地完成了序列任务，具有更高的效率和反应性，而无需依赖先前的地图或外部基础设施。

title: Octopus-inspired Distributed Control for Soft Robotic Arms: A Graph Neural Network-Based Attention Policy with Environmental Interaction
summary: This paper proposes SoftGM, an octopus-inspired distributed control architecture for segmented soft robotic arms that learn to reach targets in contact-rich environments using online obstacle discovery without relying on global obstacle geometry. SoftGM formulates each arm section as a cooperative agent and represents the arm-environment interaction as a graph. SoftGM uses a two-stage graph attention message passing scheme following a Centralised Training Decentralised Execution (CTDE) paradigm with a centralised critic and decentralised actor. We evaluate SoftGM in a Cosserat-rod simulator (PyElastica) across three tasks that increase the complexity of the environment: obstacle-free, structured obstacles, and a wall-with-hole scenario. Compared with six widely used MARL baselines (IDDPG, IPPO, ISAC, MADDPG, MAPPO, MASAC) under identical information content and training conditions, SoftGM matches strong CTDE methods in simpler settings and achieves the best performance in the wall-with-hole task. Robustness tests with observation noise, single-section actuation failure, and transient disturbances show that SoftGM preserves success while keeping control effort bounded, indicating resilient coordination driven by selective contact-relevant information routing.
tldr: The paper introduces SoftGM, a graph neural network-based distributed control architecture for soft robotic arms that learns to reach targets in complex environments with online obstacle discovery, showing strong performance and robustness compared to MARL baselines.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为SoftGM的基于图神经网络的分布式控制架构，用于软体机械臂在复杂环境中学习到达目标，并具有在线障碍物发现功能。实验结果表明，与MARL基线相比，SoftGM表现出强大的性能和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 本文提出SoftGM，一种受章鱼启发的分布式控制架构，用于分段软体机械臂，通过在线障碍物发现学习在富接触环境中到达目标，而无需依赖全局障碍物几何信息。SoftGM将每个机械臂部分构建为合作代理，并将机械臂-环境交互表示为一个图。SoftGM采用两阶段图注意力消息传递方案，遵循集中式训练分散式执行（CTDE）范式，包含一个集中式评论员和分散式执行者。我们在一个科塞拉杆模拟器（PyElastica）中，针对三种环境复杂度逐渐增加的任务评估SoftGM：无障碍物、结构化障碍物和带孔的墙壁场景。与六种广泛使用的MARL基线（IDDPG、IPPO、ISAC、MADDPG、MAPPO、MASAC）在相同信息内容和训练条件下相比，SoftGM在较简单的情况下能够与强大的CTDE方法相媲美，并在带孔的墙壁任务中实现了最佳性能。对观测噪声、单段驱动失效和瞬态扰动的鲁棒性测试表明， SoftGM在保持成功率的同时，控制力保持在界限内，这表明选择性接触相关信息路由驱动着弹性的协调控制。

title: Autonomous Search for Sparsely Distributed Visual Phenomena through Environmental Context Modeling
summary: Autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) are increasingly used to survey coral reefs, yet efficiently locating specific coral species of interest remains difficult: target species are often sparsely distributed across the reef, and an AUV with limited battery life cannot afford to search everywhere. When detections of the target itself are too sparse to provide directional guidance, the robot benefits from an additional signal to decide where to look next. We propose using the visual environmental context -- the habitat features that tend to co-occur with a target species -- as that signal. Because context features are spatially denser and often vary more smoothly than target detections, we hypothesize that a reward function targeted at broader environmental context will enable adaptive planners to make better decisions on where to go next, even in regions where no target has yet been observed. Starting from a single labeled image, our method uses patch-level DINOv2 embeddings to perform one-shot detections of both the target species and its surrounding context online. We validate our approach using real imagery collected by an AUV at two reef sites in St. John, U.S. Virgin Islands, simulating the robot's motion offline. Our results demonstrate that one-shot detection combined with adaptive context modeling enables efficient autonomous surveying, sampling up to 75$\%$ of the target in roughly half the time required by exhaustive coverage when the target is sparsely distributed, and outperforming search strategies that only use target detections.
tldr: This paper introduces an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV) search strategy that leverages visual environmental context modeling to efficiently locate sparsely distributed coral species, achieving significant time savings compared to exhaustive search methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种自主水下航行器（AUV）搜索策略，利用视觉环境上下文建模来高效定位稀疏分布的珊瑚物种，与穷举搜索方法相比，可显著节省时间。
summary_zh: 自主水下航行器(AUV)越来越多地用于珊瑚礁调查，然而，高效定位感兴趣的特定珊瑚物种仍然很困难：目标物种通常在珊瑚礁中稀疏分布，而电池寿命有限的AUV无法负担对所有区域进行搜索。当目标本身的检测过于稀疏以至于无法提供方向引导时，机器人将受益于一个额外的信号来决定下一个搜索位置。我们提出使用视觉环境上下文——即倾向于与目标物种共生的栖息地特征——作为该信号。由于上下文特征在空间上更密集，且通常比目标检测变化更平滑，我们假设针对更广泛环境上下文的奖励函数将使自适应规划器能够更好地决定下一个前往位置，即使在尚未观察到任何目标的区域也是如此。从单个标记图像开始，我们的方法使用patch级别的DINOv2嵌入来在线执行目标物种及其周围上下文的单次检测。我们使用AUV在美属维尔京群岛圣约翰岛的两个珊瑚礁点收集的真实图像来验证我们的方法，并离线模拟机器人的运动。我们的结果表明，单次检测与自适应上下文建模相结合，能够实现高效的自主调查，在目标稀疏分布时，以大约穷举覆盖所需时间的一半，采样到高达75$\%$的目标，并且优于仅使用目标检测的搜索策略。

title: Dance2Hesitate: A Multi-Modal Dataset of Dancer-Taught Hesitancy for Understandable Robot Motion
summary: In human-robot collaboration, a robot's expression of hesitancy is a critical factor that shapes human coordination strategies, attention allocation, and safety-related judgments. However, designing hesitant robot motion that generalizes is challenging because the observer's inference is highly dependent on embodiment and context. To address these challenges, we introduce and open-source a multi-modal, dancer-generated dataset of hesitant motion where we focus on specific context-embodiment pairs (i.e., manipulator/human upper-limb approaching a Jenga Tower, and anthropomorphic whole body motion in free space). The dataset includes (i) kinesthetic teaching demonstrations on a Franka Emika Panda reaching from a fixed start configuration to a fixed target (a Jenga tower) with three graded hesitancy levels (slight, significant, extreme) and (ii) synchronized RGB-D motion capture of dancers performing the same reaching behavior using their upper limb across three hesitancy levels, plus full human body sequences for extreme hesitancy. We further provide documentation to enable reproducible benchmarking across robot and human modalities. Across all dancers, we obtained 70 unique whole-body trajectories, 84 upper limb trajectories spanning over the three hesitancy levels, and 66 kinesthetic teaching trajectories spanning over the three hesitancy levels. The dataset can be accessed here: https://brsrikrishna.github.io/Dance2Hesitate/.
tldr: The paper introduces Dance2Hesitate, a multi-modal dataset of dancer-taught hesitant motion for robots to improve human-robot collaboration by enabling robots to express understandable hesitancy. The dataset includes kinesthetic teaching on a robot and motion capture of dancers.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为Dance2Hesitate的多模态数据集，该数据集包含舞者教授的犹豫动作，旨在通过使机器人能够表达可理解的犹豫来改善人机协作。该数据集包括机器人的动觉示教和舞者的动作捕捉。
summary_zh: 在人机协作中，机器人犹豫的表达是影响人类协调策略、注意力分配和安全相关判断的关键因素。然而，设计具有泛化能力的犹豫机器人运动具有挑战性，因为观察者的推断高度依赖于具身性和上下文。为了应对这些挑战，我们介绍并开源了一个多模态、由舞者生成的犹豫运动数据集，其中我们专注于特定的上下文-具身性配对（即，机械臂/人类上肢接近叠叠乐塔，以及自由空间中的拟人化全身运动）。该数据集包括：（i）在Franka Emika Panda机械臂上进行的动觉示教演示，机械臂从固定的起始配置到达固定的目标（叠叠乐塔），具有三个等级的犹豫程度（轻微、显著、极端）；以及（ii）同步的RGB-D运动捕捉数据，记录了舞者使用上肢进行相同伸手行为，分为三个犹豫程度级别；此外，还包括极端犹豫情况下的完整人体序列。我们还提供了文档，以实现跨机器人和人类模态的可复现基准测试。我们从所有舞者那里获得了70条独特的全身轨迹，84条跨越三个犹豫程度级别的上肢轨迹，以及66条跨越三个犹豫程度级别的动觉示教轨迹。该数据集可在此处访问：https://brsrikrishna.github.io/Dance2Hesitate/。

title: OA-NBV: Occlusion-Aware Next-Best-View Planning for Human-Centered Active Perception on Mobile Robots
summary: We naturally step sideways or lean to see around the obstacle when our view is blocked, and recover a more informative observation. Enabling robots to make the same kind of viewpoint choice is critical for human-centered operations, including search, triage, and disaster response, where cluttered environments and partial visibility frequently degrade downstream perception. However, many Next-Best-View (NBV) methods primarily optimize generic exploration or long-horizon coverage, and do not explicitly target the immediate goal of obtaining a single usable observation of a partially occluded person under real motion constraints. We present Occlusion-Aware Next-Best-View Planning for Human-Centered Active Perception on Mobile Robots (OA-NBV), an occlusion-aware NBV pipeline that autonomously selects the next traversable viewpoint to obtain a more complete view of an occluded human. OA-NBV integrates perception and motion planning by scoring candidate viewpoints using a target-centric visibility model that accounts for occlusion, target scale, and target completeness, while restricting candidates to feasible robot poses. OA-NBV achieves over 90% success rate in both simulation and real-world trials, while baseline NBV methods degrade sharply under occlusion. Beyond success rate, OA-NBV improves observation quality: compared to the strongest baseline, it increases normalized target area by at least 81% and keypoint visibility by at least 58% across settings, making it a drop-in view-selection module for diverse human-centered downstream tasks.
tldr: The paper presents OA-NBV, an occlusion-aware next-best-view planning pipeline for mobile robots to obtain better views of partially occluded humans, improving performance in human-centered tasks compared to generic NBV methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了OA-NBV，这是一个具有遮挡感知功能的下一次最佳视角规划流程，用于移动机器人获取部分遮挡人类的更好视角，与通用NBV方法相比，提高了以人为中心的任务的性能。
summary_zh: 当我们视图被遮挡时，会自然地侧身或倾斜以绕过障碍物进行观察，从而获取更具信息量的观测结果。使机器人能够做出类似视点选择对于以人为中心的作业至关重要，包括搜索、伤员分类和灾难响应，在这些场景中，杂乱的环境和部分可见性经常会降低下游感知效果。然而，许多下一最佳视点(NBV)方法主要优化通用探索或长程覆盖范围，而没有明确针对在真实运动约束下获得部分遮挡人员的可用的单次观测结果这一直接目标。我们提出了用于移动机器人上以人为中心的自主感知的，基于遮挡感知的下一最佳视点规划(OA-NBV)，这是一个遮挡感知的 NBV 管道，它自主选择下一个可通行视点，以获得更完整的被遮挡人员的视图。OA-NBV 集成了感知和运动规划，通过使用以目标为中心的可视性模型来评估候选视点，该模型考虑了遮挡、目标比例和目标完整度，同时将候选视点限制在可行的机器人姿势范围内。OA-NBV 在仿真和真实世界试验中都实现了超过 90% 的成功率，而基线 NBV 方法在遮挡下性能急剧下降。除了成功率之外，OA-NBV 还可以提高观测质量：与最强的基线相比，它在各种设置下将归一化目标区域至少提高了 81%，关键点可见性提高了至少 58%，使其成为适用于各种以人为中心的下游任务的即插即用式视点选择模块。

title: GroundCount: Grounding Vision-Language Models with Object Detection for Mitigating Counting Hallucinations
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) exhibit persistent hallucinations in counting tasks, with accuracy substantially lower than other visual reasoning tasks (excluding sentiment). This phenomenon persists even in state-of-the-art reasoning-capable VLMs. Conversely, CNN-based object detection models (ODMs) such as YOLO excel at spatial localization and instance counting with minimal computational overhead. We propose GroundCount, a framework that augments VLMs with explicit spatial grounding from ODMs to mitigate counting hallucinations. In the best case, our prompt-based augmentation strategy achieves 81.3% counting accuracy on the best-performing model (Ovis2.5-2B) - a 6.6pp improvement - while reducing inference time by 22% through elimination of hallucination-driven reasoning loops for stronger models. We conduct comprehensive ablation studies demonstrating that positional encoding is a critical component, being beneficial for stronger models but detrimental for weaker ones. Confidence scores, by contrast, introduce noise for most architectures and their removal improves performance in four of five evaluated models. We further evaluate feature-level fusion architectures, finding that explicit symbolic grounding via structured prompts outperforms implicit feature fusion despite sophisticated cross-attention mechanisms. Our approach yields consistent improvements across four of five evaluated VLM architectures (6.2--7.5pp), with one architecture exhibiting degraded performance due to incompatibility between its iterative reflection mechanisms and structured prompts. These results suggest that counting failures stem from fundamental spatial-semantic integration limitations rather than architecture-specific deficiencies, while highlighting the importance of architectural compatibility in augmentation strategies.
tldr: The paper introduces GroundCount, a framework that improves the counting accuracy of VLMs by augmenting them with explicit spatial grounding from object detection models, demonstrating consistent improvements across several VLM architectures.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 GroundCount，一个通过使用对象检测模型提供的显式空间定位来增强 VLM 的框架，从而提高了 VLM 的计数准确率，并在多个 VLM 架构中展示了一致的改进。
summary_zh: 视觉语言模型(VLMs)在计数任务中表现出持续的幻觉问题，其准确性显著低于其他的视觉推理任务（情感分析除外）。即使是最新的、具有推理能力的VLMs，这种现象仍然存在。相反，基于CNN的目标检测模型（ODMs），例如YOLO，擅长空间定位和实例计数，且计算开销极小。我们提出了GroundCount，一个利用ODMs的显式空间基础增强VLMs的框架，以减轻计数幻觉问题。在最佳情况下，我们基于提示的增强策略在表现最佳的模型（Ovis2.5-2B）上实现了81.3%的计数准确率，提升了6.6个百分点，并通过消除幻觉驱动的推理循环，使更强模型的推理时间减少了22%。我们进行了全面的消融研究，表明位置编码是一个关键组成部分，对更强的模型有益，但对较弱的模型有害。相比之下，置信度得分为大多数架构引入了噪声，移除它可提高五个评估模型中的四个的性能。我们进一步评估了特征级融合架构，发现通过结构化提示进行的显式符号基础优于隐式特征融合，尽管后者采用了复杂的交叉注意力机制。我们的方法在五个评估的VLM架构中的四个上获得了持续的改进（6.2--7.5个百分点），而一个架构由于其迭代反射机制与结构化提示不兼容而表现出性能下降。这些结果表明，计数失败源于根本性的空间-语义集成限制，而非特定于架构的缺陷，同时强调了架构兼容性在增强策略中的重要性。

title: $V_{0.5}$: Generalist Value Model as a Prior for Sparse RL Rollouts
summary: In Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), constructing a robust advantage baseline is critical for policy gradients, effectively guiding the policy model to reinforce desired behaviors. Recent research has introduced Generalist Value Models (such as $V_0$), which achieve pre-trained value estimation by explicitly encoding model capabilities in-context, eliminating the need to synchronously update the value model alongside the policy model. In this paper, we propose $V_{0.5}$, which adaptively fuses the baseline predicted by such value model (acting as a prior) with the empirical mean derived from sparse rollouts. This constructs a robust baseline that balances computational efficiency with extremely low variance. Specifically, we introduce a real-time statistical testing and dynamic budget allocation. This balances the high variance caused by sparse sampling against the systematic bias (or hallucinations) inherent in the value model's prior. By constructing a hypothesis test to evaluate the prior's reliability in real-time, the system dynamically allocates additional rollout budget on demand. This mechanism minimizes the baseline estimator's Mean Squared Error (MSE), guaranteeing stable policy gradients, even under extreme sparsity with a group size of 4. Extensive evaluations across six mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that $V_{0.5}$ significantly outperforms GRPO and DAPO, achieving faster convergence and over some 10% performance improvement.
tldr: The paper introduces $V_{0.5}$, a novel approach in Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) that adaptively fuses a pre-trained generalist value model with empirical data from sparse rollouts to construct a robust advantage baseline, achieving faster convergence and improved performance in mathematical reasoning tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了$V_{0.5}$，一种新型的可验证奖励强化学习(RLVR)方法，它将预训练的通用价值模型与来自稀疏 rollouts 的经验数据自适应地融合，以构建一个强大的优势基线，从而在数学推理任务中实现更快的收敛和更高的性能。
summary_zh: 在具有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）中，构建一个稳健的优势基线对于策略梯度至关重要，它能有效地引导策略模型去强化期望的行为。最近的研究引入了通用价值模型（例如$V_0$），它通过在上下文中显式地编码模型能力来实现预训练的价值估计，从而消除了与策略模型同步更新价值模型的需求。在本文中，我们提出了$V_{0.5}$，它自适应地融合了由这类价值模型预测的基线（作为先验）与从稀疏轨迹推导出的经验均值。 这构建了一个稳健的基线，在计算效率和极低的方差之间取得了平衡。 具体来说，我们引入了一种实时统计检验和动态预算分配机制。 这平衡了稀疏采样引起的高方差与价值模型先验中固有的系统性偏差（或幻觉）。 通过构建假设检验来实时评估先验的可靠性，该系统会根据需求动态分配额外的轨迹预算。 这种机制最大限度地降低了基线估计器的均方误差（MSE），即使在组大小为 4 的极端稀疏性下，也能保证稳定的策略梯度。 在六个数学推理基准上的广泛评估表明，$V_{0.5}$ 显著优于 GRPO 和 DAPO，实现了更快的收敛速度和大约 10% 的性能提升。

title: CUAAudit: Meta-Evaluation of Vision-Language Models as Auditors of Autonomous Computer-Use Agents
summary: Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) are emerging as a new paradigm in human-computer interaction, enabling autonomous execution of tasks in desktop environment by perceiving high-level natural-language instructions. As such agents become increasingly capable and are deployed across diverse desktop environments, evaluating their behavior in a scalable and reliable manner becomes a critical challenge. Existing evaluation pipelines rely on static benchmarks, rule-based success checks, or manual inspection, which are brittle, costly, and poorly aligned with real-world usage. In this work, we study Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as autonomous auditors for assessing CUA task completion directly from observable interactions and conduct a large-scale meta-evaluation of five VLMs that judge task success given a natural-language instruction and the final environment state. Our evaluation spans three widely used CUA benchmarks across macOS, Windows, and Linux environments and analyzes auditor behavior along three complementary dimensions: accuracy, calibration of confidence estimates, and inter-model agreement. We find that while state-of-the-art VLMs achieve strong accuracy and calibration, all auditors exhibit notable performance degradation in more complex or heterogeneous environments, and even high-performing models show significant disagreement in their judgments. These results expose fundamental limitations of current model-based auditing approaches and highlight the need to explicitly account for evaluator reliability, uncertainty, and variance when deploying autonomous CUAs in real-world settings.
tldr: This paper meta-evaluates the performance of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) as autonomous auditors for Computer-Use Agents (CUAs) across different operating systems, finding limitations in complex environments and suggesting the need for improved evaluator reliability.
tldr_zh: 该论文对视觉-语言模型（VLM）作为计算机使用代理（CUA）的自主审计员的性能进行了元评估，在不同的操作系统上发现了局限性，并建议需要提高评估器的可靠性。
summary_zh: 计算机使用代理（CUAs）正作为人机交互的新范式涌现，通过感知高层自然语言指令，实现桌面环境中任务的自主执行。随着此类代理的能力日益增强并部署到各种不同的桌面环境中，以可扩展且可靠的方式评估其行为已成为一项关键挑战。现有的评估流程依赖于静态基准、基于规则的成功检查或人工检查，这些方法脆弱、成本高昂，并且与实际使用情况严重不符。在这项工作中，我们研究了视觉语言模型（VLMs）作为自主审计员，直接从可观察的交互中评估CUA任务完成情况，并对五种VLMs进行大规模元评估，这些VLMs根据自然语言指令和最终环境状态来判断任务是否成功。我们的评估涵盖了 macOS、Windows 和 Linux 环境中三个广泛使用的 CUA 基准，并分析了审计员在三个互补维度上的行为：准确性、置信度估计的校准以及模型间的一致性。我们发现，尽管最先进的VLMs实现了很高的准确性和校准，但所有审计员在更复杂或异构的环境中都表现出明显的性能下降，即使是高性能模型，其判断也存在显著分歧。这些结果揭示了当前基于模型的审计方法的基本局限性，并强调了在实际环境中部署自主CUAs时，需要明确考虑评估者的可靠性、不确定性和方差。

title: Resource-constrained Amazons chess decision framework integrating large language models and graph attention
summary: Artificial intelligence has advanced significantly through the development of intelligent game-playing systems, providing rigorous testbeds for decision-making, strategic planning, and adaptive learning. However, resource-constrained environments pose critical challenges, as conventional deep learning methods heavily rely on extensive datasets and computational resources. In this paper, we propose a lightweight hybrid framework for the Game of the Amazons, which explores the paradigm of weak-to-strong generalization by integrating the structural reasoning of graph-based learning with the generative capabilities of large language models. Specifically, we leverage a Graph Attention Autoencoder to inform a multi-step Monte Carlo Tree Search, utilize a Stochastic Graph Genetic Algorithm to optimize evaluation signals, and harness GPT-4o-mini to generate synthetic training data. Unlike traditional approaches that rely on expert demonstrations, our framework learns from noisy and imperfect supervision. We demonstrate that the Graph Attention mechanism effectively functions as a structural filter, denoising the LLM's outputs. Experiments on a 10$\times$10 Amazons board show that our hybrid approach not only achieves a 15\%--56\% improvement in decision accuracy over baselines but also significantly outperforms its teacher model (GPT-4o-mini), achieving a competitive win rate of 45.0\% at N=30 nodes and a decisive 66.5\% at only N=50 nodes. These results verify the feasibility of evolving specialized, high-performance game AI from general-purpose foundation models under stringent computational constraints.
tldr: This paper presents a resource-constrained AI framework for the Game of the Amazons, integrating graph-based learning with large language models for improved decision accuracy and performance compared to its teacher model. It effectively evolves specialized game AI from general-purpose foundation models under significant computational constraints.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种资源受限的亚马逊棋AI框架，它将基于图的学习与大型语言模型相结合，从而提高了决策准确性，并且性能优于其teacher模型。它有效地利用通用基础模型，在显著的计算约束下，开发了专门的高性能游戏AI。
summary_zh: 人工智能通过智能游戏系统的发展取得了显著进展，为决策制定、战略规划和自适应学习提供了严格的试验平台。然而，资源受限的环境带来了严峻的挑战，因为传统的深度学习方法严重依赖于广泛的数据集和计算资源。本文提出了一种用于亚马逊棋的轻量级混合框架，通过将基于图学习的结构推理与大型语言模型的生成能力相结合，探索了从弱到强的泛化模式。具体来说，我们利用图注意力自编码器来指导多步蒙特卡洛树搜索，利用随机图遗传算法来优化评估信号，并利用GPT-4o-mini生成合成训练数据。与依赖专家演示的传统方法不同，我们的框架从噪声和不完美的监督中学习。我们证明了图注意力机制有效地充当了结构过滤器，对LLM的输出进行去噪。在10×10亚马逊棋盘上的实验表明，我们的混合方法不仅在决策准确率上比基线提高了15%--56%，而且显著优于其教师模型（GPT-4o-mini），在N=30个节点时实现了45.0%的竞争性胜率，仅在N=50个节点时就达到了决定性的66.5%。这些结果验证了在严格的计算约束下，从通用基础模型演化出专业化、高性能游戏AI的可行性。

title: JEDI: Jointly Embedded Inference of Neural Dynamics
summary: Animal brains flexibly and efficiently achieve many behavioral tasks with a single neural network. A core goal in modern neuroscience is to map the mechanisms of the brain's flexibility onto the dynamics underlying neural populations. However, identifying task-specific dynamical rules from limited, noisy, and high-dimensional experimental neural recordings remains a major challenge, as experimental data often provide only partial access to brain states and dynamical mechanisms. While recurrent neural networks (RNNs) directly constrained neural data have been effective in inferring underlying dynamical mechanisms, they are typically limited to single-task domains and struggle to generalize across behavioral conditions. Here, we introduce JEDI, a hierarchical model that captures neural dynamics across tasks and contexts by learning a shared embedding space over RNN weights. This model recapitulates individual samples of neural dynamics while scaling to arbitrarily large and complex datasets, uncovering shared structure across conditions in a single, unified model. Using simulated RNN datasets, we demonstrate that JEDI accurately learns robust, generalizable, condition-specific embeddings. By reverse-engineering the weights learned by JEDI, we show that it recovers ground truth fixed point structures and unveils key features of the underlying neural dynamics in the eigenspectra. Finally, we apply JEDI to motor cortex recordings during monkey reaching to extract mechanistic insight into the neural dynamics of motor control. Our work shows that joint learning of contextual embeddings and recurrent weights provides scalable and generalizable inference of brain dynamics from recordings alone.
tldr: The paper introduces JEDI, a hierarchical model that learns a shared embedding space over RNN weights to capture neural dynamics across tasks and contexts from neural recordings, demonstrating its ability to recover underlying dynamical mechanisms and generalize across conditions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了JEDI，一个分层模型，通过学习RNN权重上的共享嵌入空间，从神经记录中捕获跨任务和上下文的神经动力学。实验表明，该模型能够恢复潜在的动力学机制并在不同条件下泛化。
summary_zh: 动物大脑通过单个神经网络灵活高效地完成许多行为任务。现代神经科学的一个核心目标是将大脑灵活性的机制映射到神经群体潜在的动力学上。然而，从有限、噪声且高维的实验神经记录中识别出任务特定的动力学规则仍然是一个主要挑战，因为实验数据通常只能部分访问大脑状态和动力学机制。虽然直接约束神经数据的循环神经网络（RNNs）在推断潜在动力学机制方面是有效的，但它们通常仅限于单任务领域，并且难以在行为条件下泛化。在这里，我们介绍 JEDI，一个分层模型，通过学习 RNN 权重的共享嵌入空间来捕捉跨任务和背景的神经动力学。该模型重现了神经动力学的个体样本，同时可扩展到任意大型和复杂的数据集，从而在一个统一的模型中揭示了跨条件的共享结构。通过使用模拟的 RNN 数据集，我们证明 JEDI 准确地学习了稳健、可泛化的、条件特定的嵌入。通过逆向工程 JEDI 学习到的权重，我们展示了它可以恢复真实固定点结构，并在本征谱中揭示潜在神经动力学的关键特征。最后，我们将 JEDI 应用于猴子伸手运动期间的运动皮层记录，以提取对运动控制神经动力学的机制性见解。我们的工作表明，上下文嵌入和循环权重的联合学习为仅从记录中进行大脑动力学的可扩展和可泛化推断提供了可能。

title: DUCTILE: Agentic LLM Orchestration of Engineering Analysis in Product Development Practice
summary: Engineering analysis automation in product development relies on rigid interfaces between tools, data formats and documented processes. When these interfaces change, as they routinely do as the product evolves in the engineering ecosystem, the automation support breaks. This paper presents a DUCTILE (Delegated, User-supervised Coordination of Tool- and document-Integrated LLM-Enabled) agentic orchestration, an approach for developing, executing and evaluating LLM-based agentic automation support of engineering analysis tasks. The approach separates adaptive orchestration, performed by the LLM agent, from deterministic execution, performed by verified engineering tools. The agent interprets documented design practices, inspects input data and adapts the processing path, while the engineer supervises and exercises final judgment. DUCTILE is demonstrated on an industrial structural analysis task at an aerospace manufacturer, where the agent handled input deviations in format, units, naming conventions and methodology that would break traditional scripted pipelines. Evaluation against expert-defined acceptance criteria and deployment with practicing engineers confirm that the approach produces correct, methodologically compliant results across repeated independent runs. The paper discusses practical consequences of adopting agentic automation, including unintended effects on the nature of engineering work and the tension between removing mundane tasks and creating an exhausting supervisory role.
tldr: The paper introduces DUCTILE, an LLM-based agentic orchestration system for engineering analysis automation that adapts to evolving product development ecosystems by separating adaptive orchestration from deterministic execution, validated in an industrial aerospace structural analysis task.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种基于LLM的智能体编排系统DUCTILE，用于工程分析自动化。该系统通过将自适应编排与确定性执行分离，适应不断演变的产品开发生态系统，并在工业航空航天结构分析任务中得到验证。
summary_zh: 产品开发中的工程分析自动化依赖于工具、数据格式和文档化流程之间的刚性接口。当这些接口发生变化时，例如在工程生态系统中产品演进时常发生的那样，自动化支持就会中断。本文提出了一种DUCTILE（委托式、用户监督的工具与文档集成的大型语言模型驱动）的代理编排方法，用于开发、执行和评估基于大型语言模型（LLM）代理的工程分析任务的自动化支持。该方法将自适应编排（由LLM代理执行）与确定性执行（由经过验证的工程工具执行）分离。代理解释文档化的设计实践，检查输入数据并调整处理路径，同时工程师进行监督并做出最终判断。DUCTILE在一个航空航天制造商的工业结构分析任务中得到了验证，其中代理处理了格式、单位、命名约定和方法论方面的输入偏差，这些偏差会破坏传统的脚本化流程。针对专家定义的验收标准的评估以及与实践工程师的部署确认了该方法能够在重复的独立运行中产生正确且符合方法论的结果。本文讨论了采用代理自动化带来的实际后果，包括对工程工作性质的意外影响，以及消除琐碎任务与创造令人疲惫的监督角色之间的紧张关系。

title: Splat2Real: Novel-view Scaling for Physical AI with 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Physical AI faces viewpoint shift between training and deployment, and novel-view robustness is essential for monocular RGB-to-3D perception. We cast Real2Render2Real monocular depth pretraining as imitation-learning-style supervision from a digital twin oracle: a student depth network imitates expert metric depth/visibility rendered from a scene mesh, while 3DGS supplies scalable novel-view observations. We present Splat2Real, centered on novel-view scaling: performance depends more on which views are added than on raw view count. We introduce CN-Coverage, a coverage+novelty curriculum that greedily selects views by geometry gain and an extrapolation penalty, plus a quality-aware guardrail fallback for low-reliability teachers. Across 20 TUM RGB-D sequences with step-matched budgets (N=0 to 2000 additional rendered views, with N unique <= 500 and resampling for larger budgets), naive scaling is unstable; CN-Coverage mitigates worst-case regressions relative to Robot/Coverage policies, and GOL-Gated CN-Coverage provides the strongest medium-high-budget stability with the lowest high-novelty tail error. Downstream control-proxy results versus N provides embodied-relevance evidence by shifting safety/progress trade-offs under viewpoint shift.
tldr: The paper introduces Splat2Real, a method using 3D Gaussian Splatting to improve monocular depth pretraining for robust novel-view perception in physical AI, focusing on intelligently selecting additional views for training.
tldr_zh: 这篇论文介绍了Splat2Real，一种利用3D高斯溅射的方法，通过智能选择额外的视角，来改善单目深度预训练在物理人工智能中鲁棒的新视角感知。
summary_zh: 物理人工智能面临着训练和部署之间的视角差异，而新视角下的鲁棒性对于单目RGB到3D的感知至关重要。我们将Real2Render2Real单目深度预训练建模为一种来自数字孪生预言机的模仿学习风格监督：学生深度网络模仿从场景网格渲染的专家度量深度/可见性，同时3DGS提供可扩展的新视角观测。我们提出了Splat2Real，其核心是新视角的缩放：性能更多地取决于添加哪些视角，而不是原始视角的数量。我们引入了CN-Coverage，一种覆盖率+新颖性的课程学习方法，它通过几何增益和外推惩罚贪婪地选择视角，并为低可靠性的教师提供质量感知的安全护栏回退。在包含20个TUM RGB-D序列，且步骤匹配预算（N=0到2000个额外渲染视角，其中唯一N<=500，并对较大预算进行重采样）的情况下，朴素的缩放是不稳定的；CN-Coverage减轻了相对于Robot/Coverage策略的最坏情况回归，而GOL-Gated CN-Coverage提供了最强的中高预算稳定性，并具有最低的高新颖性尾部误差。下游控制代理结果与N的关系，通过视角差异下安全性/进度权衡的改变，提供了具身相关的证据。

title: Ergodicity in reinforcement learning
summary: In reinforcement learning, we typically aim to optimize the expected value of the sum of rewards an agent collects over a trajectory. However, if the process generating these rewards is non-ergodic, the expected value, i.e., the average over infinitely many trajectories with a given policy, is uninformative for the average over a single, but infinitely long trajectory. Thus, if we care about how the individual agent performs during deployment, the expected value is not a good optimization objective. In this paper, we discuss the impact of non-ergodic reward processes on reinforcement learning agents through an instructive example, relate the notion of ergodic reward processes to more widely used notions of ergodic Markov chains, and present existing solutions that optimize long-term performance of individual trajectories under non-ergodic reward dynamics.
tldr: This paper addresses the issue of non-ergodicity in reinforcement learning, where optimizing for the expected value of rewards across many trajectories is uninformative for the performance of a single agent in a single, long trajectory, and discusses potential solutions.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了强化学习中非遍历性的问题，即优化多个轨迹的期望奖励值，对于单个智能体在单个长期轨迹中的表现没有意义，并讨论了潜在的解决方案。
summary_zh: 在强化学习中，我们通常旨在优化智能体在轨迹上收集的奖励总和的期望值。然而，如果生成这些奖励的过程是非遍历的，那么期望值，即对于给定策略的无限多轨迹的平均值，对于单个但无限长的轨迹的平均值来说，是无信息的。因此，如果我们关心个体智能体在部署期间的表现，期望值就不是一个好的优化目标。在本文中，我们通过一个具有指导意义的例子，讨论了非遍历奖励过程对强化学习智能体的影响，将遍历奖励过程的概念与更广泛使用的遍历马尔可夫链的概念联系起来，并提出了现有解决方案，这些方案可以在非遍历奖励动态下优化个体轨迹的长期性能。

title: Evaluating randomized smoothing as a defense against adversarial attacks in trajectory prediction
summary: Accurate and robust trajectory prediction is essential for safe and efficient autonomous driving, yet recent work has shown that even state-of-the-art prediction models are highly vulnerable to inputs being mildly perturbed by adversarial attacks. Although model vulnerabilities to such attacks have been studied, work on effective countermeasures remains limited. In this work, we develop and evaluate a new defense mechanism for trajectory prediction models based on randomized smoothing -- an approach previously applied successfully in other domains. We evaluate its ability to improve model robustness through a series of experiments that test different strategies of randomized smoothing. We show that our approach can consistently improve prediction robustness of multiple base trajectory prediction models in various datasets without compromising accuracy in non-adversarial settings. Our results demonstrate that randomized smoothing offers a simple and computationally inexpensive technique for mitigating adversarial attacks in trajectory prediction.
tldr: This paper introduces and evaluates randomized smoothing as a defense mechanism against adversarial attacks for trajectory prediction models in autonomous driving, showing improved robustness without sacrificing accuracy. The approach appears promising and computationally inexpensive.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍并评估了随机平滑作为一种防御机制，以对抗自动驾驶中轨迹预测模型中的对抗性攻击，结果表明其在不牺牲准确性的前提下提高了鲁棒性。该方法看起来很有前途且计算成本低廉。
summary_zh: 精确且鲁棒的轨迹预测对于安全高效的自动驾驶至关重要，然而最近的研究表明，即使是最先进的预测模型也极易受到对抗性攻击的轻微扰动。尽管对模型在面对此类攻击时的脆弱性进行了研究，但关于有效对策的工作仍然有限。在这项工作中，我们开发并评估了一种基于随机平滑的轨迹预测模型的新防御机制——这种方法以前已在其他领域成功应用。我们通过一系列实验来评估其提高模型鲁棒性的能力，这些实验测试了不同的随机平滑策略。我们表明，我们的方法能够持续提高多种基础轨迹预测模型在各种数据集中的预测鲁棒性，而不会损害在非对抗环境下的准确性。我们的结果表明，随机平滑提供了一种简单且计算成本低廉的技术，可用于减轻轨迹预测中的对抗性攻击。

title: SiMPO: Measure Matching for Online Diffusion Reinforcement Learning
summary: A commonly used family of RL algorithms for diffusion policies conducts softmax reweighting over the behavior policy, which usually induces an over-greedy policy and fails to leverage feedback from negative samples. In this work, we introduce Signed Measure Policy Optimization (SiMPO), a simple and unified framework that generalizes reweighting scheme in diffusion RL with general monotonic functions. SiMPO revisits diffusion RL via a two-stage measure matching lens. First, we construct a virtual target policy by $f$-divergence regularized policy optimization, where we can relax the non-negativity constraint to allow for a signed target measure. Second, we use this signed measure to guide diffusion or flow models through reweighted matching. This formulation offers two key advantages: a) it generalizes to arbitrary monotonically increasing weighting functions; and b) it provides a principled justification and practical guidance for negative reweighting. Furthermore, we provide geometric interpretations to illustrate how negative reweighting actively repels the policy from suboptimal actions. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that SiMPO achieves superior performance by leveraging these flexible weighting schemes, and we provide practical guidelines for selecting reweighting methods tailored to the reward landscape.
tldr: The paper introduces SiMPO, a novel diffusion RL framework that generalizes reweighting schemes with monotonic functions and allows for negative reweighting, achieving superior performance by actively repelling the policy from suboptimal actions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SiMPO，一种新颖的扩散强化学习框架，它使用单调函数推广了重加权方案，并允许负重加权，通过主动将策略从次优动作中排斥，从而实现了卓越的性能。
summary_zh: 一种常用于扩散策略的强化学习算法家族，通常对行为策略进行softmax重加权，但这往往导致过于贪婪的策略，且无法利用来自负样本的反馈。本文提出了符号测度策略优化 (SiMPO)，这是一个简单而统一的框架，它利用通用的单调函数来推广扩散强化学习中的重加权方案。SiMPO通过两阶段的测度匹配视角重新审视扩散强化学习。首先，我们通过$f$-散度正则化的策略优化来构建一个虚拟的目标策略，其中我们可以放宽非负约束，从而允许带符号的目标测度。其次，我们利用这个带符号的测度，通过重加权的匹配方式来指导扩散或流模型。这种公式化提供了两个关键优势：a) 它可以推广到任意单调递增的加权函数；b) 它为负重加权提供了原则性的依据和实践指导。此外，我们提供了几何解释，以说明负重加权如何主动地将策略从次优行为中排斥开来。大量的经验评估表明，SiMPO通过利用这些灵活的加权方案实现了卓越的性能，并且我们为选择适用于奖励环境的重加权方法提供了实践指导。

title: Actor-Accelerated Policy Dual Averaging for Reinforcement Learning in Continuous Action Spaces
summary: Policy Dual Averaging (PDA) offers a principled Policy Mirror Descent (PMD) framework that more naturally admits value function approximation than standard PMD, enabling the use of approximate advantage (or Q-) functions while retaining strong convergence guarantees. However, applying PDA in continuous state and action spaces remains computationally challenging, since action selection involves solving an optimization sub-problem at each decision step. In this paper, we propose \textit{actor-accelerated PDA}, which uses a learned policy network to approximate the solution of the optimization sub-problems, yielding faster runtimes while maintaining convergence guarantees. We provide a theoretical analysis that quantifies how actor approximation error impacts the convergence of PDA under suitable assumptions. We then evaluate its performance on several benchmarks in robotics, control, and operations research problems. Actor-accelerated PDA achieves superior performance compared to popular on-policy baselines such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO). Overall, our results bridge the gap between the theoretical advantages of PDA and its practical deployment in continuous-action problems with function approximation.
tldr: The paper introduces an actor-accelerated approach to Policy Dual Averaging (PDA) for reinforcement learning in continuous action spaces, addressing the computational challenges of action selection while maintaining convergence guarantees. They demonstrate superior performance compared to PPO on robotics, control, and operations research benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种actor加速的策略双重平均(PDA)方法，用于连续动作空间中的强化学习，解决了动作选择的计算挑战，同时保持了收敛保证。他们在机器人、控制和运筹学基准测试中展示了优于PPO的性能。
summary_zh: 策略对偶平均 (PDA) 提供了一个有原则的策略镜像下降 (PMD) 框架，相比于标准 PMD，它更自然地允许值函数近似，从而能够在保留强收敛保证的同时使用近似优势函数（或 Q 函数）。然而，在连续状态和动作空间中应用 PDA 仍然面临计算挑战，因为动作选择需要在每个决策步骤中解决一个优化子问题。在本文中，我们提出了\textit{actor-加速 PDA}，它使用学习到的策略网络来近似优化子问题的解，从而在保持收敛保证的同时实现更快的运行时间。我们提供了一个理论分析，量化了 actor 近似误差在适当假设下对 PDA 收敛的影响。然后，我们在机器人、控制和运筹学问题的几个基准测试中评估了其性能。Actor-加速 PDA 相比于流行的近端策略优化 (PPO) 等在线策略基线方法，取得了优异的性能。总而言之，我们的结果弥合了 PDA 的理论优势与其在具有函数近似的连续动作问题中的实际部署之间的差距。

title: Parallel-in-Time Nonlinear Optimal Control via GPU-native Sequential Convex Programming
summary: Real-time trajectory optimization for nonlinear constrained autonomous systems is critical and typically performed by CPU-based sequential solvers. Specifically, reliance on global sparse linear algebra or the serial nature of dynamic programming algorithms restricts the utilization of massively parallel computing architectures like GPUs. To bridge this gap, we introduce a fully GPU-native trajectory optimization framework that combines sequential convex programming with a consensus-based alternating direction method of multipliers. By applying a temporal splitting strategy, our algorithm decouples the optimization horizon into independent, per-node subproblems that execute massively in parallel. The entire process runs fully on the GPU, eliminating costly memory transfers and large-scale sparse factorizations. This architecture naturally scales to multi-trajectory optimization. We validate the solver on a quadrotor agile flight task and a Mars powered descent problem using an on-board edge computing platform. Benchmarks reveal a sustained 4x throughput speedup and a 51% reduction in energy consumption over a heavily optimized 12-core CPU baseline. Crucially, the framework saturates the hardware, maintaining over 96% active GPU utilization to achieve planning rates exceeding 100 Hz. Furthermore, we demonstrate the solver's extensibility to robust Model Predictive Control by jointly optimizing dynamically coupled scenarios under stochastic disturbances, enabling scalable and safe autonomy.
tldr: This paper presents a GPU-native trajectory optimization framework using sequential convex programming and ADMM for real-time control of autonomous systems, achieving significant speedup and energy efficiency compared to CPU-based methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于GPU的原生轨迹优化框架，该框架采用序列凸规划和ADMM算法，用于自主系统的实时控制，与基于CPU的方法相比，实现了显著的加速和能源效率提升。
summary_zh: 用于非线性约束自主系统的实时轨迹优化至关重要，通常由基于CPU的顺序求解器执行。具体而言，对全局稀疏线性代数或动态规划算法串行性质的依赖性限制了大规模并行计算架构（如GPU）的利用。为了弥合这一差距，我们引入了一个完全基于GPU原生的轨迹优化框架，该框架结合了序列凸规划和基于共识的交替方向乘子法。通过应用时间分割策略，我们的算法将优化视界分解为独立的、针对每个节点的子问题，这些子问题可以大规模并行执行。整个过程完全在GPU上运行，消除了代价高昂的内存传输和大规模稀疏分解。这种架构自然地扩展到多轨迹优化。我们使用机载边缘计算平台对四旋翼飞行器敏捷飞行任务和火星动力下降问题验证了该求解器。基准测试显示，与经过重度优化的12核CPU基线解决方案相比，吞吐量持续提高了4倍，能耗降低了51%。至关重要的是，该框架饱和了硬件，维持了超过96%的有效GPU利用率，从而实现了超过100 Hz的规划速率。此外，我们通过联合优化在随机扰动下动态耦合的场景，证明了该求解器对鲁棒模型预测控制的可扩展性，从而实现了可扩展且安全的自主性。

title: Need for Speed: Zero-Shot Depth Completion with Single-Step Diffusion
summary: We introduce Marigold-SSD, a single-step, late-fusion depth completion framework that leverages strong diffusion priors while eliminating the costly test-time optimization typically associated with diffusion-based methods. By shifting computational burden from inference to finetuning, our approach enables efficient and robust 3D perception under real-world latency constraints. Marigold-SSD achieves significantly faster inference with a training cost of only 4.5 GPU days. We evaluate our method across four indoor and two outdoor benchmarks, demonstrating strong cross-domain generalization and zero-shot performance compared to existing depth completion approaches. Our approach significantly narrows the efficiency gap between diffusion-based and discriminative models. Finally, we challenge common evaluation protocols by analyzing performance under varying input sparsity levels. Page: https://dtu-pas.github.io/marigold-ssd/
tldr: The paper introduces Marigold-SSD, a fast, zero-shot depth completion method using single-step diffusion, enhancing real-time 3D perception with strong generalization capabilities and improved efficiency compared to existing diffusion models.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Marigold-SSD，一种快速的零样本深度补全方法，它使用单步扩散，从而提高了实时3D感知能力，并且与现有的扩散模型相比，具有更强的泛化能力和更高的效率。
summary_zh: 我们介绍了 Marigold-SSD，一个单步、晚期融合的深度补全框架，它利用了强大的扩散先验，同时消除了通常与基于扩散的方法相关的昂贵的测试时优化。通过将计算负担从推理转移到微调，我们的方法能够在实际延迟约束下实现高效且鲁棒的 3D 感知。 Marigold-SSD 显著加快了推理速度，而训练成本仅为 4.5 个 GPU 日。我们在四个室内和两个室外基准测试中评估了我们的方法，与现有的深度补全方法相比，展示了强大的跨域泛化和零样本性能。我们的方法显著缩小了基于扩散的模型和判别模型之间的效率差距。最后，我们通过分析在不同输入稀疏度下的性能，对常用的评估协议提出了挑战。 网页：https://dtu-pas.github.io/marigold-ssd/

title: BinWalker: Development and Field Evaluation of a Quadruped Manipulator Platform for Sustainable Litter Collection
summary: Litter pollution represents a growing environmental problem affecting natural and urban ecosystems worldwide. Waste discarded in public spaces often accumulates in areas that are difficult to access, such as uneven terrains, coastal environments, parks, and roadside vegetation. Over time, these materials degrade and release harmful substances, including toxic chemicals and microplastics, which can contaminate soil and water and pose serious threats to wildlife and human health. Despite increasing awareness of the problem, litter collection is still largely performed manually by human operators, making large-scale cleanup operations labor-intensive, time-consuming, and costly. Robotic solutions have the potential to support and partially automate environmental cleanup tasks. In this work, we present a quadruped robotic system designed for autonomous litter collection in challenging outdoor scenarios. The robot combines the mobility advantages of legged locomotion with a manipulation system consisting of a robotic arm and an onboard litter container. This configuration enables the robot to detect, grasp, and store litter items while navigating through uneven terrains. The proposed system aims to demonstrate the feasibility of integrating perception, locomotion, and manipulation on a legged robotic platform for environmental cleanup tasks. Experimental evaluations conducted in outdoor scenarios highlight the effectiveness of the approach and its potential for assisting large-scale litter removal operations in environments that are difficult to reach with traditional robotic platforms. The code associated with this work can be found at: https://github.com/iit-DLSLab/trash-collection-isaaclab.
tldr: The paper presents a quadruped robot, 'BinWalker,' designed for autonomous litter collection in challenging outdoor environments, integrating legged locomotion with a robotic arm and onboard container for grasping and storing litter.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为“BinWalker”的四足机器人，旨在自主收集具有挑战性的户外环境中的垃圾。它集成了腿式运动和一个机械臂以及板载容器，用于抓取和存储垃圾。
summary_zh: 垃圾污染是一个日益严重的环境问题，影响着全球的自然和城市生态系统。在公共场所丢弃的垃圾经常堆积在难以进入的区域，如不平坦的地形、沿海环境、公园和路边植被。随着时间的推移，这些材料会降解并释放有害物质，包括有毒化学物质和微塑料，这些物质会污染土壤和水，并对野生动物和人类健康构成严重威胁。尽管人们对该问题的认识不断提高，但垃圾收集仍然主要由人工操作员进行，这使得大规模清理行动既劳动密集、耗时又成本高昂。机器人解决方案有潜力支持并部分自动化环境清理任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个四足机器人系统，旨在自主地在具有挑战性的户外场景中进行垃圾收集。该机器人结合了腿式行走的移动性优势，以及由机械臂和车载垃圾箱组成的操纵系统。这种配置使机器人能够在不平坦的地形中导航的同时，检测、抓取和存储垃圾物品。所提出的系统旨在证明在腿式机器人平台上集成感知、运动和操纵以执行环境清理任务的可行性。在户外场景中进行的实验评估突出了该方法的有效性及其在辅助大规模清除传统机器人平台难以到达的环境中的垃圾作业的潜力。与这项工作相关的代码可以在以下网址找到：https://github.com/iit-DLSLab/trash-collection-isaaclab。

title: Edge-Assisted Multi-Robot Visual-Inertial SLAM with Efficient Communication
summary: The integration of cloud computing and edge computing is an effective way to achieve global consistent and real-time multi-robot Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM). Cloud computing effectively solves the problem of limited computing, communication and storage capacity of terminal equipment. However, limited bandwidth and extremely long communication links between terminal devices and the cloud result in serious performance degradation of multi-robot SLAM systems. To reduce the computational cost of feature tracking and improve the real-time performance of the robot, a lightweight SLAM method of optical flow tracking based on pyramid IMU prediction is proposed. On this basis, a centralized multi-robot SLAM system based on a robot-edge-cloud layered architecture is proposed to realize real-time collaborative SLAM. It avoids the problems of limited on-board computing resources and low execution efficiency of single robot. In this framework, only the feature points and keyframe descriptors are transmitted and lossless encoding and compression are carried out to realize real-time remote information transmission with limited bandwidth resources. This design reduces the actual bandwidth occupied in the process of data transmission, and does not cause the loss of SLAM accuracy caused by data compression. Through experimental verification on the EuRoC dataset, compared with the current most advanced local feature compression method, our method can achieve lower data volume feature transmission, and compared with the current advanced centralized multi-robot SLAM scheme, it can achieve the same or better positioning accuracy under low computational load.
tldr: This paper proposes an edge-assisted multi-robot visual-inertial SLAM system using lightweight SLAM with optical flow tracking and feature compression for efficient communication within bandwidth constraints, achieving comparable or better accuracy than existing methods with lower computational load on EuRoC dataset.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种边缘辅助的多机器人视觉惯性 SLAM 系统，该系统采用了基于光流跟踪的轻量级 SLAM 和特征压缩，以实现带宽约束下的高效通信。在EuRoC数据集上，该系统在低计算负载下实现了与现有方法相当甚至更好的精度。
summary_zh: 云计算与边缘计算的融合是实现全局一致且实时的多机器人同步定位与地图构建(SLAM)的有效途径。云计算有效地解决了终端设备计算、通信和存储能力有限的问题。然而，终端设备与云端之间有限的带宽和极长的通信链路导致了多机器人SLAM系统性能的严重下降。为了降低特征跟踪的计算成本并提高机器人的实时性，提出了一种基于金字塔IMU预测的光流跟踪轻量级SLAM方法。在此基础上，提出了一种基于机器人-边缘-云分层架构的集中式多机器人SLAM系统，以实现实时协同SLAM。它避免了车载计算资源有限和单机器人执行效率低的问题。在该框架中，仅传输特征点和关键帧描述符，并进行无损编码和压缩，以在有限的带宽资源下实现实时的远程信息传输。这种设计减少了数据传输过程中实际占用的带宽，并且不会引起数据压缩造成的SLAM精度损失。通过在EuRoC数据集上的实验验证表明，与当前最先进的局部特征压缩方法相比，我们的方法可以实现更低数据量的特征传输，并且与当前先进的集中式多机器人SLAM方案相比，可以在较低的计算负载下实现相同或更好的定位精度。

title: DRAFTO: Decoupled Reduced-space and Adaptive Feasibility-repair Trajectory Optimization for Robotic Manipulators
summary: This paper introduces a new algorithm for trajectory optimization, Decoupled Reduced-space and Adaptive Feasibility-repair Trajectory Optimization (DRAFTO). It first constructs a constrained objective that accounts for smoothness, safety, joint limits, and task requirements. Then, it optimizes the coefficients, which are the coordinates of a set of basis functions for trajectory parameterization. To reduce the number of repeated constrained optimizations while handling joint-limit feasibility, the optimization is decoupled into a reduced-space Gauss-Newton (GN) descent for the main iterations and constrained quadratic programming for initialization and terminal feasibility repair. The two-phase acceptance rule with a non-monotone policy is applied to the GN model, which uses a hinge-squared penalty for inequality constraints, to ensure globalizability. The results of our benchmark tests against optimization-based planners, such as CHOMP, TrajOpt, GPMP2, and FACTO, and sampling-based planners, such as RRT-Connect, RRT*, and PRM, validate the high efficiency and reliability across diverse scenarios and tasks. The experiment involving grabbing an object from a drawer further demonstrates the potential for implementation in complex manipulation tasks. The supplemental video is available at https://youtu.be/XisFI37YyTQ.
tldr: The paper introduces DRAFTO, a novel trajectory optimization algorithm for robotic manipulators that decouples optimization into reduced-space Gauss-Newton descent and constrained quadratic programming to improve efficiency and reliability, demonstrating its effectiveness against state-of-the-art planners in various scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为DRAFTO的新型机器人机械臂轨迹优化算法，该算法将优化过程解耦为降维高斯-牛顿下降法和约束二次规划，以提高效率和可靠性，并在各种场景中展示了其相对于最先进规划器的有效性。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的轨迹优化算法，即解耦降空间和自适应可行性修复轨迹优化 (DRAFTO)。它首先构建一个约束目标，该目标考虑了平滑性、安全性、关节极限和任务需求。然后，它优化系数，这些系数是轨迹参数化的一组基函数的坐标。为了在处理关节极限可行性的同时减少重复约束优化次数，该优化被解耦为用于主迭代的降空间高斯-牛顿 (GN) 下降，以及用于初始化和终端可行性修复的约束二次规划。具有非单调策略的两阶段接受准则被应用于带有铰链平方惩罚的不等式约束的GN模型，以确保全局化。我们针对基于优化的规划器（如CHOMP、TrajOpt、GPMP2和FACTO）以及基于采样的规划器（如RRT-Connect、RRT*和PRM）进行的基准测试结果验证了其在各种场景和任务中的高效性和可靠性。从抽屉中抓取物体的实验进一步证明了其在复杂操作任务中实施的潜力。补充视频可在 https://youtu.be/XisFI37YyTQ 观看。

title: SignSparK: Efficient Multilingual Sign Language Production via Sparse Keyframe Learning
summary: Generating natural and linguistically accurate sign language avatars remains a formidable challenge. Current Sign Language Production (SLP) frameworks face a stark trade-off: direct text-to-pose models suffer from regression-to-the-mean effects, while dictionary-retrieval methods produce robotic, disjointed transitions. To resolve this, we propose a novel training paradigm that leverages sparse keyframes to capture the true underlying kinematic distribution of human signing. By predicting dense motion from these discrete anchors, our approach mitigates regression-to-the-mean while ensuring fluid articulation. To realize this paradigm at scale, we first introduce FAST, an ultra-efficient sign segmentation model that automatically mines precise temporal boundaries. We then present SignSparK, a large-scale Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) framework that utilizes these extracted anchors to synthesize 3D signing sequences in SMPL-X and MANO spaces. This keyframe-driven formulation also uniquely unlocks Keyframe-to-Pose (KF2P) generation, making precise spatiotemporal editing of signing sequences possible. Furthermore, our adopted reconstruction-based CFM objective also enables high-fidelity synthesis in fewer than ten sampling steps; this allows SignSparK to scale across four distinct sign languages, establishing the largest multilingual SLP framework to date. Finally, by integrating 3D Gaussian Splatting for photorealistic rendering, we demonstrate through extensive evaluation that SignSparK establishes a new state-of-the-art across diverse SLP tasks and multilingual benchmarks.
tldr: The paper introduces SignSparK, a novel framework for multilingual sign language production using sparse keyframe learning and Conditional Flow Matching, achieving state-of-the-art results with efficient synthesis and editing capabilities.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 SignSparK，一种使用稀疏关键帧学习和条件流匹配的多语种手语生成的新框架，实现了最先进的结果，具有高效的合成和编辑能力。
summary_zh: 生成自然且语言学上准确的手语化身模型仍然是一个艰巨的挑战。目前的手语生成（SLP）框架面临一个明显的权衡：直接的文本到姿势模型会受到均值回归效应的影响，而字典检索方法则会产生机械僵硬、不连贯的过渡效果。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的训练范式，该范式利用稀疏关键帧来捕捉人类手语运动的真实潜在运动学分布。通过从这些离散锚点预测密集运动，我们的方法减轻了均值回归，同时确保流畅的表达。为了大规模实现这一范式，我们首先引入了FAST，一个超高效的手语分割模型，可以自动挖掘精确的时间边界。然后，我们提出了SignSparK，一个大规模的条件流匹配（CFM）框架，该框架利用这些提取的锚点来合成SMPL-X和MANO空间中的3D手语序列。这种由关键帧驱动的公式也独特地解锁了关键帧到姿势（KF2P）的生成，使得对手语序列进行精确的时空编辑成为可能。此外，我们采用的基于重建的CFM目标也能够在少于十个采样步骤中实现高保真合成；这使得SignSparK能够扩展到四种不同的手语，从而建立迄今为止最大的多语言SLP框架。最后，通过集成用于照片级真实感渲染的3D高斯溅射，我们通过广泛的评估证明，SignSparK在各种SLP任务和多语言基准测试中确立了新的最先进水平。

title: STADA: Specification-based Testing for Autonomous Driving Agents
summary:
Simulation-based testing has become a standard approach to validating autonomous driving agents prior to real-world deployment. A high-quality validation campaign will exercise an agent in diverse contexts comprised of varying static environments, e.g., lanes, intersections, signage, and dynamic elements, e.g., vehicles and pedestrians. To achieve this, existing test generation techniques rely on template-based, manually constructed, or random scenario generation. When applied to validate formally specified safety requirements, such methods either require significant human effort or run the risk of missing important behavior related to the requirement.
  To address this gap, we present STADA, a Specification-based Test generation framework for Autonomous Driving Agents that systematically generates the space of scenarios defined by a formal specification expressed in temporal logic (LTLf). Given a specification, STADA constructs all distinct initial scenes, a diverse space of continuations of those scenes, and simulations that reflect the behaviors of the specification.
  Evaluation of STADA on a variety of LTLf specifications formalized in SCENEFLOW using three complementary coverage criteria demonstrates that STADA yields more than 2x higher coverage than the best baseline on the finest criteria and a 75% increase for the coarsest criteria. Moreover, it matches the coverage of the best baseline with 6 times fewer simulations. While set in the context of autonomous driving, the approach is applicable to other domains with rich simulation environments.
tldr: This paper introduces STADA, a specification-based test generation framework for autonomous driving agents using temporal logic (LTLf) to systematically create diverse and comprehensive test scenarios, demonstrably improving coverage compared to baseline methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了STADA，一个基于规范的自动驾驶代理测试生成框架，它使用时序逻辑（LTLf）系统地创建多样化和全面的测试场景，并证明了相对于基线方法，其覆盖率有所提高。
summary_zh:
基于仿真的测试已成为在真实世界部署自动驾驶智能体之前对其进行验证的标准方法。高质量的验证活动将在各种环境中对智能体进行练习，这些环境包括不同的静态元素（例如，车道、交叉路口、标牌）和动态元素（例如，车辆和行人）。为了实现这一点，现有的测试生成技术依赖于基于模板的、手动构建的或随机的场景生成。当应用于验证形式化表达的安全需求时，这些方法要么需要大量的人工，要么存在遗漏与需求相关的重要行为的风险。

为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 STADA，一个用于自动驾驶智能体的基于规范的测试生成框架，该框架系统地生成由用时序逻辑 (LTLf) 表达的形式化规范定义的场景空间。给定一个规范，STADA 构建所有不同的初始场景、这些场景的各种延续以及反映规范行为的模拟。

在使用三个互补的覆盖标准下，在 SCENEFLOW 中形式化的各种 LTLf 规范上对 STADA 的评估表明，在最精细的标准上，STADA 产生的覆盖率比最佳基线高出 2 倍以上，而在最粗糙的标准上，覆盖率提高了 75%。此外，它以 6 倍少的模拟次数与最佳基线的覆盖率相匹配。虽然本文是在自动驾驶的背景下进行讨论的，但该方法适用于具有丰富仿真环境的其他领域。

title: Robust Co-design Optimisation for Agile Fixed-Wing UAVs
summary: Co-design optimisation of autonomous systems has emerged as a powerful alternative to sequential approaches by jointly optimising physical design and control strategies. However, existing frameworks often neglect the robustness required for autonomous systems navigating unstructured, real-world environments. For agile Unmanned Aerial Vehicles (UAVs) operating at the edge of the flight envelope, this lack of robustness yields designs that are sensitive to perturbations and model mismatch. To address this, we propose a robust co-design framework for agile fixed-wing UAVs that integrates parametric uncertainty and wind disturbances directly into the concurrent optimisation process. Our bi-level approach optimises physical design in a high-level loop while discovering nominal solutions via a constrained trajectory planner and evaluating performance across a stochastic Monte Carlo ensemble using feedback LQR control. Validated across three agile flight missions, our strategy consistently outperforms deterministic baselines. The results demonstrate that our robust co-design strategy inherently tailors aerodynamic features, such as wing placement and aspect ratio, to achieve an optimal trade-off between mission performance and disturbance rejection.
tldr: The paper presents a robust co-design framework for agile fixed-wing UAVs that optimizes physical design and control strategies while explicitly considering parametric uncertainty and wind disturbances, leading to improved performance in uncertain environments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种针对敏捷固定翼无人机的鲁棒协同设计框架，该框架在优化物理设计和控制策略的同时，显式地考虑了参数不确定性和风扰，从而提高了在不确定环境中的性能。
summary_zh: 自主系统的协同设计优化已经成为一种强大的替代顺序方法，它通过联合优化物理设计和控制策略来实现目标。然而，现有的框架通常忽略了自主系统在非结构化、真实世界环境中导航所需的鲁棒性。对于在飞行包线边缘运行的敏捷无人机（UAV），这种鲁棒性的缺失导致设计对扰动和模型失配敏感。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种针对敏捷固定翼无人机的鲁棒协同设计框架，该框架将参数不确定性和风扰直接集成到并发优化过程中。我们的双层方法在高层循环中优化物理设计，同时通过约束轨迹规划器发现名义解，并使用反馈LQR控制在随机蒙特卡罗集成中评估性能。经验证，我们的策略在三个敏捷飞行任务中始终优于确定性基线。结果表明，我们的鲁棒协同设计策略能够内在性地调整气动特性，如翼型位置和展弦比，从而实现任务性能和抗干扰能力之间的最佳权衡。

title: A gripper for flap separation and opening of sealed bags
summary: Separating thin, flexible layers that must be individually grasped is a common but challenging manipulation primitive for most off-the-shelf grippers. A prominent example arises in clinical settings: the opening of sterile flat pouches for the preparation of the operating room, where the first step is to separate and grasp the flaps. We present a novel gripper design and opening strategy that enables reliable flap separation and robust seal opening. This capability addresses a high-volume repetitive hospital procedure in which nurses manually open up to 240 bags per shift, a physically demanding task linked to musculoskeletal injuries. Our design combines an active dented-roller fingertip with compliant fingers that exploit environmental constraints to robustly grasp thin flexible flaps. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed gripper reliably grasps and separates sealed bag flaps and other thin-layered materials from the hospital, the most sensitive variable affecting performance being the normal force applied. When two copies of the gripper grasp both flaps, the system withstands the forces needed to open the seals robustly. To our knowledge, this is one of the first demonstrations of robotic assistance to automate this repetitive, low-value, but critical hospital task.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel gripper design and control strategy for reliably separating and opening sealed bags, specifically addressing the physically demanding task of opening sterile pouches in hospitals, potentially reducing musculoskeletal injuries in nurses.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新型夹爪设计和控制策略，用于可靠地分离和打开密封袋，特别是针对医院中打开无菌袋这一体力劳动，有望减少护士的肌肉骨骼损伤。
summary_zh: 分离需要单独抓取的薄而柔性层是大多数市售夹爪面临的常见但具有挑战性的操作原语。一个典型的例子出现在临床环境中：打开无菌扁平袋以准备手术室，其中第一步是分离并抓住袋的封盖。我们提出了一种新型夹爪设计和打开策略，能够可靠地分离封盖并稳健地打开密封。该能力解决了医院一项重复性的高频操作，即护士每个班次手动打开多达240个袋子，这是一项对体力要求高且与肌肉骨骼损伤相关的任务。我们的设计结合了带有主动凹痕滚轮指尖的柔顺手指，利用环境约束稳健地抓取薄而柔性的封盖。实验表明，所提出的夹爪能够可靠地抓取和分离密封的袋子封盖以及来自医院的其他薄层材料，影响性能最敏感的变量是施加的法向力。当两个夹爪分别抓住两个封盖时，该系统能够承受稳健打开密封所需的力。据我们所知，这是首次展示机器人辅助以自动化这一重复性、低价值但至关重要的医院任务。

title: Dynamic Modeling and Attitude Control of a Reaction-Wheel-Based Low-Gravity Bipedal Hopper
summary: Planetary bodies characterized by low gravitational acceleration, such as the Moon and near-Earth asteroids, impose unique locomotion constraints due to diminished contact forces and extended airborne intervals. Among traversal strategies, hopping locomotion offers high energy efficiency but is prone to mid-flight attitude instability caused by asymmetric thrust generation and uneven terrain interactions. This paper presents an underactuated bipedal hopping robot that employs an internal reaction wheel to regulate body posture during the ballistic flight phase. The system is modeled as a gyrostat, enabling analysis of the dynamic coupling between torso rotation and reaction wheel momentum. The locomotion cycle comprises three phases: a leg-driven propulsive jump, mid-air attitude stabilization via an active momentum exchange controller, and a shock-absorbing landing. A reduced-order model is developed to capture the critical coupling between torso rotation and reaction wheel dynamics. The proposed framework is evaluated in MuJoCo-based simulations under lunar gravity conditions (g = 1.625 m/s^2). Results demonstrate that activation of the reaction wheel controller reduces peak mid-air angular deviation by more than 65% and constrains landing attitude error to within 3.5 degrees at touchdown. Additionally, actuator saturation per hop cycle is reduced, ensuring sufficient control authority. Overall, the approach significantly mitigates in-flight attitude excursions and enables consistent upright landings, providing a practical and control-efficient solution for locomotion on irregular extraterrestrial terrains.
tldr: This paper presents a reaction-wheel-based control system for a bipedal hopping robot designed for low-gravity environments, demonstrating improved attitude stabilization during flight and upright landings in simulations.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于反作用轮的控制系统，用于在低重力环境下运行的双足跳跃机器人，并通过仿真展示了其在飞行过程中改进的姿态稳定性和直立着陆能力。
summary_zh: 低重力加速度的行星体，如月球和近地小行星，因接触力减小和空中时间延长而对移动方式提出了独特的约束。在各种移动策略中，跳跃式运动具有较高的能量效率，但容易因不对称推力产生和不均匀地形相互作用而导致飞行中姿态不稳定。本文提出了一种欠驱动双足跳跃机器人，该机器人采用内部反作用轮来调节弹道飞行阶段的机身姿态。该系统被建模为一个陀螺仪，从而能够分析躯干旋转和反作用轮动量之间的动态耦合。运动周期包括三个阶段：腿部驱动的推进跳跃、通过主动动量交换控制器进行空中姿态稳定，以及缓冲着陆。开发了一个降阶模型，以捕捉躯干旋转和反作用轮动力学之间的关键耦合。所提出的框架在基于 MuJoCo 的模拟中，在月球重力条件下 (g = 1.625 m/s^2) 进行了评估。结果表明，激活反作用轮控制器可将空中峰值角偏差减少 65% 以上，并将着陆时的姿态误差限制在 3.5 度以内。此外，每个跳跃周期的执行器饱和度降低，确保了足够的控制权限。总而言之，该方法显著减轻了飞行中的姿态偏移，并实现了持续的直立着陆，为在不规则的地球外地形上进行移动提供了一种实用且具有控制效率的解决方案。

title: Interleaving Scheduling and Motion Planning with Incremental Learning of Symbolic Space-Time Motion Abstractions
summary: Task and Motion Planning combines high-level task sequencing (what to do) with low-level motion planning (how to do it) to generate feasible, collision-free execution plans. However, in many real-world domains, such as automated warehouses, tasks are predefined, shifting the challenge to if, when, and how to execute them safely and efficiently under resource, time and motion constraints. In this paper, we formalize this as the Scheduling and Motion Planning problem for multi-object navigation in shared workspaces. We propose a novel solution framework that interleaves off-the-shelf schedulers and motion planners in an incremental learning loop. The scheduler generates candidate plans, while the motion planner checks feasibility and returns symbolic feedback, i.e., spatial conflicts and timing adjustments, to guide the scheduler towards motion-feasible solutions. We validate our proposal on logistics and job-shop scheduling benchmarks augmented with motion tasks, using state-of-the-art schedulers and sampling-based motion planners. Our results show the effectiveness of our framework in generating valid plans under complex temporal and spatial constraints, where synchronized motion is critical.
tldr: This paper introduces a framework for interleaving scheduling and motion planning with incremental learning of symbolic space-time motion abstractions, tackling the problem of multi-object navigation under temporal and spatial constraints.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个交错调度和运动规划的框架，通过增量学习符号时空运动抽象，解决了在时空约束下多对象导航的问题。
summary_zh: 任务与运动规划结合了高层任务排序（做什么）和底层运动规划（如何做），以生成可行的、无碰撞的执行计划。然而，在许多现实世界领域，例如自动化仓库，任务是预定义的，这使得挑战转变为在资源、时间和运动约束下，如何安全有效地执行这些任务。在本文中，我们将此形式化为共享工作空间中多对象导航的调度与运动规划问题。我们提出了一种新的解决方案框架，该框架在一个增量学习循环中交织了现成的调度器和运动规划器。调度器生成候选计划，而运动规划器检查可行性并返回符号反馈，即空间冲突和时间调整，以引导调度器找到运动可行的解决方案。我们使用最先进的调度器和基于采样的运动规划器，在物流和作业车间调度基准测试（并增加了运动任务）中验证了我们提出的方案。结果表明，我们的框架在生成复杂的时间和空间约束下的有效计划方面非常有效，其中同步运动至关重要。

title: Recover to Predict: Progressive Retrospective Learning for Variable-Length Trajectory Prediction
summary: Trajectory prediction is critical for autonomous driving, enabling safe and efficient planning in dense, dynamic traffic. Most existing methods optimize prediction accuracy under fixed-length observations. However, real-world driving often yields variable-length, incomplete observations, posing a challenge to these methods. A common strategy is to directly map features from incomplete observations to those from complete ones. This one-shot mapping, however, struggles to learn accurate representations for short trajectories due to significant information gaps. To address this issue, we propose a Progressive Retrospective Framework (PRF), which gradually aligns features from incomplete observations with those from complete ones via a cascade of retrospective units. Each unit consists of a Retrospective Distillation Module (RDM) and a Retrospective Prediction Module (RPM), where RDM distills features and RPM recovers previous timesteps using the distilled features. Moreover, we propose a Rolling-Start Training Strategy (RSTS) that enhances data efficiency during PRF training. PRF is plug-and-play with existing methods. Extensive experiments on datasets Argoverse 2 and Argoverse 1 demonstrate the effectiveness of PRF. Code is available at https://github.com/zhouhao94/PRF.
tldr: The paper introduces a Progressive Retrospective Framework (PRF) for trajectory prediction with variable-length observations, using retrospective distillation and prediction modules to improve accuracy, demonstrating effectiveness on Argoverse benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种渐进式回顾框架 (PRF)，用于处理可变长度观测的轨迹预测问题。该框架采用回顾式蒸馏和预测模块来提高准确性，并在 Argoverse 基准测试中展示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 轨迹预测对于自动驾驶至关重要，能够在密集、动态的交通环境中实现安全高效的规划。现有的大多数方法都旨在优化固定长度观测下的预测精度。然而，现实世界的驾驶场景通常会产生可变长度、不完整的观测，这对这些方法提出了挑战。一种常见的策略是将不完整观测的特征直接映射到完整观测的特征。然而，由于信息缺口巨大，这种一次性映射难以学习到短轨迹的精确表示。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种渐进式追溯框架(PRF)，通过级联的追溯单元逐步对齐不完整观测和完整观测的特征。每个单元包含一个追溯蒸馏模块(RDM)和一个追溯预测模块(RPM)，其中RDM蒸馏特征，RPM利用蒸馏后的特征恢复之前的时刻。此外，我们提出了一种滚动启动训练策略(RSTS)，以提高PRF训练期间的数据效率。PRF是即插即用的，可以与现有方法结合使用。在Argoverse 2和Argoverse 1数据集上的大量实验证明了PRF的有效性。代码可在https://github.com/zhouhao94/PRF 获取。

title: Design of a Robot-Assisted Chemical Dialysis System
summary: Scientists perform diverse manual procedures that are tedious and laborious. Such procedures are considered a bottleneck for modern experimental science, as they consume time and increase burdens in fields including material science and medicine. We employ a user-centered approach to designing a robot-assisted system for dialysis, a common multi-day purification method used in polymer and protein synthesis. Through two usability studies, we obtain participant feedback and revise design requirements to develop the final system that satisfies scientists' needs and has the potential for applications in other experimental workflows. We anticipate that integration of this system into real synthesis procedures in a chemical wet lab will decrease workload on scientists during long experimental procedures and provide an effective approach to designing more systems that have the potential to accelerate scientific discovery and liberate scientists from tedious labor.
tldr: This paper presents a robot-assisted chemical dialysis system designed using a user-centered approach to reduce tedious manual laboratory procedures, potentially accelerating scientific discovery.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种机器人辅助化学透析系统，该系统采用以用户为中心的方法设计，旨在减少繁琐的人工实验室操作，从而可能加速科学发现。
summary_zh: 科学家们执行着各种繁琐而费力的人工操作。这些操作被认为是现代实验科学的瓶颈，因为它们耗费时间并增加了材料科学和医学等领域的负担。我们采用以用户为中心的方法，设计了一种用于透析的机器人辅助系统，透析是一种在聚合物和蛋白质合成中常用的多日纯化方法。通过两项可用性研究，我们获得了参与者的反馈并修订了设计需求，从而开发出满足科学家需求的最终系统，并具有应用于其他实验流程的潜力。我们预计将此系统整合到化学湿实验室的实际合成流程中，将减少科学家在漫长实验过程中的工作量，并为设计更多具有加速科学发现并使科学家从繁琐劳动中解放出来的潜力的系统提供有效途径。

title: Characterizing Healthy & Post-Stroke Neuromotor Behavior During 6D Upper-Limb Isometric Gaming: Implications for Design of End-Effector Rehabilitation Robot Interfaces
summary: Successful robot-mediated rehabilitation requires designing games and robot interventions that promote healthy motor practice. However, the interplay between a given user's neuromotor behavior, the gaming interface, and the physical robot makes designing system elements -- and even characterizing what behaviors are "healthy" or pathological -- challenging. We leverage our OpenRobotRehab 1.0 open access data set to assess the characteristics of 13 healthy and 2 post-stroke users' force output, muscle activations, and game performance while executing isometric trajectory tracking tasks using an end-effector rehabilitation robot. We present an assessment of how subtle aspects of interface design impact user behavior; an analysis of how pathological neuromotor behaviors are reflected in end-effector force dynamics; and a novel hidden Markov model (HMM)-based neuromotor behavior classification method based on surface electromyography (sEMG) signals during cyclic motions. We demonstrate that task specification (including which axes are constrained and how users interpret tracking instructions) shapes user behavior; that pathology-related features are detectable in 6D end-effector force data during isometric task execution (with significant differences between healthy and post-stroke profiles in force error and average force production at $p=0.05$); and that healthy neuromotor strategies are heterogeneous and inherently difficult to characterize. We also show that our HMM-based models discriminate healthy and post-stroke neuromotor dynamics where synergy-based decompositions reflect no such differentiation. Lastly, we discuss these results' implications for the design of adaptive end-effector rehabilitation robots capable of promoting healthier movement strategies across diverse user populations.
tldr: This paper analyzes neuromotor behavior of healthy and post-stroke individuals during isometric upper-limb rehabilitation games, revealing how interface design and pathology affect force dynamics and demonstrating a novel HMM-based classification method for neuromotor strategies using sEMG data.
tldr_zh: 本文分析了健康人和中风后个体在等距上肢康复游戏中神经运动行为，揭示了界面设计和病理如何影响力动力学，并展示了一种基于HMM的新型神经运动策略分类方法，该方法使用sEMG数据。
summary_zh: 成功的机器人辅助康复需要设计能促进健康运动实践的游戏和机器人干预措施。然而，特定用户的神经运动行为、游戏界面和物理机器人之间的相互作用，使得系统要素的设计——甚至是对何种行为是“健康的”或病理性的进行表征——具有挑战性。我们利用我们的OpenRobotRehab 1.0开放获取数据集，评估了13名健康用户和2名中风后用户在使用末端执行器康复机器人执行等长轨迹追踪任务时的力输出、肌肉激活和游戏表现的特征。我们提出了界面设计的细微方面如何影响用户行为的评估；病理神经运动行为如何在末端执行器力动力学中体现的分析；以及一种基于循环运动期间表面肌电图 (sEMG) 信号的新型基于隐马尔可夫模型 (HMM) 的神经运动行为分类方法。我们证明了任务规范（包括哪些轴受到约束以及用户如何理解追踪指令）塑造了用户行为；病理相关特征可以在等长任务执行期间的6D末端执行器力数据中检测到（健康和中风后特征曲线在力误差和平均力产生方面存在显著差异，达到$p=0.05$）；以及健康的神经运动策略是异质的并且本质上难以表征。我们还表明，我们的基于HMM的模型可以区分健康和中风后的神经运动动力学，而基于协同作用的分解则无法反映这种区分。最后，我们讨论了这些结果对于自适应末端执行器康复机器人的设计的影响，该机器人能够促进不同用户群体更健康的运动策略。

title: Quantum entanglement provides a competitive advantage in adversarial games
summary: Whether uniquely quantum resources confer advantages in fully classical, competitive environments remains an open question. Competitive zero-sum reinforcement learning is particularly challenging, as success requires modelling dynamic interactions between opposing agents rather than static state-action mappings. Here, we conduct a controlled study isolating the role of quantum entanglement in a quantum-classical hybrid agent trained on Pong, a competitive Markov game. An 8-qubit parameterised quantum circuit serves as a feature extractor within a proximal policy optimisation framework, allowing direct comparison between separable circuits and architectures incorporating fixed (CZ) or trainable (IsingZZ) entangling gates. Entangled circuits consistently outperform separable counterparts with comparable parameter counts and, in low-capacity regimes, match or exceed classical multilayer perceptron baselines. Representation similarity analysis further shows that entangled circuits learn structurally distinct features, consistent with improved modelling of interacting state variables. These findings establish entanglement as a function resource for representation learning in competitive reinforcement learning.
tldr: This paper demonstrates that quantum entanglement provides a competitive advantage in adversarial reinforcement learning environments, specifically in a Pong game scenario, by allowing quantum circuits to learn more effective feature representations.
tldr_zh: 本文证明了量子纠缠在对抗性强化学习环境中提供竞争优势，特别是在Pong游戏场景中，这使得量子电路能够学习更有效的特征表示。
summary_zh: 量子资源是否能在完全经典、竞争激烈的环境中带来优势仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。竞争性的零和强化学习尤其具有挑战性，因为成功需要对对立智能体之间的动态交互进行建模，而不是静态的状态-动作映射。在此，我们进行了一项受控研究，旨在隔离量子纠缠在Pong游戏中训练的量子-经典混合智能体中的作用，Pong游戏是一个竞争性的马尔可夫博弈。一个8量子比特参数化的量子线路作为近端策略优化框架内的特征提取器，从而可以直接比较可分离线路和包含固定（CZ）或可训练（IsingZZ）纠缠门的架构。在参数数量相当的情况下，纠缠线路始终优于可分离线路，并且在低容量情况下，能与或超过经典多层感知器基线。表征相似性分析进一步表明，纠缠线路学习到的结构性特征截然不同，这与改善交互状态变量的建模相一致。这些发现确立了纠缠作为一种在竞争性强化学习中进行表征学习的功能资源。

title: Learning from Radio using Variational Quantum RF Sensing
summary: In modern wireless networks, radio channels serve a dual role. Whilst their primary function is to carry bits of information from a transmitter to a receiver, the intrinsic sensitivity of transmitted signals to the physical structure of the environment makes the channel a powerful source of knowledge about the world. In this paper, we consider an agent that learns about its environment using a quantum sensing probe, optimised using a quantum circuit, which interacts with the radio-frequency (RF) electromagnetic field. We use data obtained from a ray-tracer to train the quantum circuit and learning model and we provide extensive experiments under realistic conditions on a localisation task. We show that using quantum sensors to learn from radio signals can enable intelligent systems that require no channel measurements at deployment, remain sensitive to weak and obstructed RF signals, and can learn about the world despite operating with strictly less information than classical baselines.
tldr: This paper explores using quantum sensing probes with a quantum circuit to learn about environments from radio signals for localization, showing potential for intelligent systems that outperform classical baselines with less information.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了使用量子传感探针和量子电路，通过射频信号学习环境信息以进行定位的方法，展示了智能系统可能优于经典基线，并能在更少信息的情况下运行的潜力。
summary_zh: 在现代无线网络中，无线电信道扮演着双重角色。虽然其主要功能是将信息比特从发射机传输到接收机，但由于发射信号对环境物理结构的内在敏感性，使得信道成为获取世界知识的强大来源。在本文中，我们考虑一种智能体，它使用一种量子传感探针来学习其环境，该探针通过一个量子电路进行优化，并与射频 (RF) 电磁场相互作用。我们使用从射线追踪器获得的数据来训练量子电路和学习模型，并在现实条件下对定位任务进行了大量的实验。我们表明，使用量子传感器从无线电信号中学习可以实现智能系统，这些智能系统在部署时不需要信道测量，对弱射频信号和受阻射频信号保持敏感，并且即使在操作的信息严格少于经典基线的情况下，也能学习关于世界的知识。

title: S2D: Sparse to Dense Lifting for 3D Reconstruction with Minimal Inputs
summary: Explicit 3D representations have already become an essential medium for 3D simulation and understanding. However, the most commonly used point cloud and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) each suffer from non-photorealistic rendering and significant degradation under sparse inputs. In this paper, we introduce Sparse to Dense lifting (S2D), a novel pipeline that bridges the two representations and achieves high-quality 3DGS reconstruction with minimal inputs. Specifically, the S2D lifting is two-fold. We first present an efficient one-step diffusion model that lifts sparse point cloud for high-fidelity image artifact fixing. Meanwhile, to reconstruct 3D consistent scenes, we also design a corresponding reconstruction strategy with random sample drop and weighted gradient for robust model fitting from sparse input views to dense novel views. Extensive experiments show that S2D achieves the best consistency in generating novel view guidance and first-tier sparse view reconstruction quality under different input sparsity. By reconstructing stable scenes with the least possible captures among existing methods, S2D enables minimal input requirements for 3DGS applications.
tldr: The paper introduces S2D, a novel pipeline that uses a diffusion model to lift sparse point clouds to dense representations for high-quality 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstruction with minimal inputs, achieving better consistency and quality compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为S2D的新流程，它使用扩散模型将稀疏点云提升为密集表示，从而以最少的输入实现高质量的3D高斯溅射重建，与现有方法相比，实现了更好的连贯性和质量。
summary_zh: 显式3D表示已成为3D模拟和理解的重要媒介。然而，最常用的点云和3D高斯溅射(3DGS)各自都存在非照片级真实感渲染以及在稀疏输入下性能显著下降的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种稀疏到稠密提升(S2D)的新型流程，它连接了这两种表示，并以最少的输入实现了高质量的3DGS重建。具体而言，S2D提升是双重的。我们首先提出一种高效的一步扩散模型，用于提升稀疏点云，从而实现高保真的图像伪影修复。同时，为了重建3D一致的场景，我们还设计了一个相应的重建策略，该策略采用随机样本丢弃和加权梯度，以实现从稀疏输入视图到稠密新视角的稳健模型拟合。大量实验表明，S2D在生成新视角指导和在一流的稀疏视角重建质量方面，在不同的输入稀疏度下都实现了最佳的一致性。通过以现有方法中最少的捕获量来重建稳定场景，S2D为3DGS应用实现了最小的输入要求。

title: PolGS++: Physically-Guided Polarimetric Gaussian Splatting for Fast Reflective Surface Reconstruction
summary: Accurate reconstruction of reflective surfaces remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision, with broad applications in real-time virtual reality and digital content creation.
