Although 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables efficient novel-view rendering with explicit representations, its performance on reflective surfaces still lags behind implicit neural methods, especially in recovering fine geometry and surface normals. To address this gap, we propose PolGS++, a physically-guided polarimetric Gaussian Splatting framework for fast reflective surface reconstruction. Specifically, we integrate a polarized BRDF (pBRDF) model into 3DGS to explicitly decouple diffuse and specular components, providing physically grounded reflectance modeling and stronger geometric cues for reflective surface recovery. Furthermore, we introduce a depth-guided visibility mask acquisition mechanism that enables angle-of-polarization (AoP)-based tangent-space consistency constraints in Gaussian Splatting without costly ray-tracing intersections. This physically guided design improves reconstruction quality and efficiency, requiring only about 10 minutes of training. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets validate the effectiveness of our method.
tldr: PolGS++ improves reflective surface reconstruction using polarimetric Gaussian Splatting with a polarized BRDF model and a depth-guided visibility mask, achieving faster and higher quality results compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: PolGS++ 通过使用偏振BRDF模型和深度引导的可见性掩码的偏振高斯溅射，改善了反射表面的重建，与现有方法相比，实现了更快，更高质量的结果。
summary_zh: 反射表面的精确重建一直是计算机视觉领域的一项基础挑战，在实时虚拟现实和数字内容创作中具有广泛的应用。虽然3D高斯溅射 (3DGS) 能够利用显式表示实现高效的新视角渲染，但其在反射表面上的性能仍然落后于隐式神经方法，尤其是在恢复精细几何形状和表面法线方面。为了解决这一差距，我们提出 PolGS++，一个物理引导的偏振高斯溅射框架，用于快速反射表面重建。具体来说，我们将偏振BRDF (pBRDF) 模型集成到 3DGS 中，以显式地解耦漫反射和镜面反射分量，从而提供基于物理的反射建模，并为反射表面的恢复提供更强的几何线索。此外，我们引入了一种深度引导的可见性掩码获取机制，该机制能够在高斯溅射中实现基于偏振角 (AoP) 的切空间一致性约束，而无需昂贵的射线追踪相交计算。这种物理引导的设计提高了重建质量和效率，仅需约 10 分钟的训练时间。在合成和真实世界数据集上的大量实验验证了我们方法的有效性。

title: Event-based Photometric Stereo via Rotating Illumination and Per-Pixel Learning
summary: Photometric stereo is a technique for estimating surface normals using images captured under varying illumination. However, conventional frame-based photometric stereo methods are limited in real-world applications due to their reliance on controlled lighting, and susceptibility to ambient illumination. To address these limitations, we propose an event-based photometric stereo system that leverages an event camera, which is effective in scenarios with continuously varying scene radiance and high dynamic range conditions. Our setup employs a single light source moving along a predefined circular trajectory, eliminating the need for multiple synchronized light sources and enabling a more compact and scalable design. We further introduce a lightweight per-pixel multi-layer neural network that directly predicts surface normals from event signals generated by intensity changes as the light source rotates, without system calibration. Experimental results on benchmark datasets and real-world data collected with our data acquisition system demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, achieving a 7.12\% reduction in mean angular error compared to existing event-based photometric stereo methods. In addition, our method demonstrates robustness in regions with sparse event activity, strong ambient illumination, and scenes affected by specularities.
tldr: This paper presents an event-based photometric stereo system using a rotating light source and per-pixel neural networks to estimate surface normals, achieving improved accuracy and robustness in challenging lighting conditions compared to existing event-based methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于事件的立体光度系统，该系统使用旋转光源和逐像素神经网络来估计表面法线，与现有的基于事件的方法相比，在具有挑战性的光照条件下实现了更高的准确性和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 基于事件的光度立体方法利用在不同光照下捕获的图像来估计表面法线。然而，传统基于帧的光度立体方法因依赖于受控光照以及对环境光照的敏感性，在实际应用中受到限制。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了一种基于事件的光度立体系统，该系统利用了一种事件相机，使其在场景辐射度连续变化和高动态范围条件下有效。我们的设置采用单个光源沿预定义的圆形轨迹运动，无需多个同步光源，并实现了更紧凑和可扩展的设计。我们进一步引入了一个轻量级的逐像素多层神经网络，该网络可以直接从光源旋转时由于强度变化而产生的事件信号中预测表面法线，而无需系统校准。在基准数据集和使用我们的数据采集系统收集的真实世界数据上的实验结果表明了我们方法的有效性，与现有的基于事件的光度立体方法相比，平均角度误差降低了7.12%。此外，我们的方法在事件活动稀疏、环境光照强以及受镜面反射影响的区域中表现出鲁棒性。

title: Less is More: Decoder-Free Masked Modeling for Efficient Skeleton Representation Learning
summary: The landscape of skeleton-based action representation learning has evolved from Contrastive Learning (CL) to Masked Auto-Encoder (MAE) architectures. However, each paradigm faces inherent limitations: CL often overlooks fine-grained local details, while MAE is burdened by computationally heavy decoders. Moreover, MAE suffers from severe computational asymmetry -- benefiting from efficient masking during pre-training but requiring exhaustive full-sequence processing for downstream tasks. To resolve these bottlenecks, we propose SLiM (Skeleton Less is More), a novel unified framework that harmonizes masked modeling with contrastive learning via a shared encoder. By eschewing the reconstruction decoder, SLiM not only eliminates computational redundancy but also compels the encoder to capture discriminative features directly. SLiM is the first framework with decoder-free masked modeling of representative learning. Crucially, to prevent trivial reconstruction arising from high skeletal-temporal correlation, we introduce semantic tube masking, alongside skeletal-aware augmentations designed to ensure anatomical consistency across diverse temporal granularities. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SLiM consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance across all downstream protocols. Notably, our method delivers this superior accuracy with exceptional efficiency, reducing inference computational cost by 7.89x compared to existing MAE methods.
tldr: The paper introduces SLiM, a decoder-free masked modeling framework for skeleton-based action recognition that combines masked modeling with contrastive learning, achieving SOTA performance with significantly reduced computational cost compared to MAE methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了SLiM，一种用于基于骨骼的动作识别的无解码器掩码建模框架，它结合了掩码建模和对比学习，与MAE方法相比，在显著降低计算成本的同时实现了SOTA性能。
summary_zh: 基于骨骼的动作表征学习领域已从对比学习(CL)发展到掩码自编码器(MAE)架构。然而，每种范式都面临固有的局限性：CL通常忽略精细的局部细节，而MAE则受到计算量巨大的解码器的拖累。此外，MAE存在严重的计算不对称性——在预训练期间受益于高效的掩码，但在下游任务中需要详尽的全序列处理。为了解决这些瓶颈，我们提出SLiM（Skeleton Less is More，骨骼少即是多），这是一个新型的统一框架，通过共享编码器协调掩码建模和对比学习。通过避免重建解码器，SLiM不仅消除了计算冗余，还迫使编码器直接捕获判别特征。SLiM是第一个采用无解码器的掩码建模来进行代表性学习的框架。至关重要的是，为了防止由高度骨骼-时间相关性引起的简单重建，我们引入了语义管掩码，以及旨在确保跨多种时间粒度解剖一致性的骨骼感知增强。大量实验表明，SLiM在所有下游协议中均稳定地实现了最先进的性能。值得注意的是，我们的方法以卓越的效率实现了这种卓越的准确性，与现有的MAE方法相比，推理计算成本降低了7.89倍。

title: MoXaRt: Audio-Visual Object-Guided Sound Interaction for XR
summary: In Extended Reality (XR), complex acoustic environments often overwhelm users, compromising both scene awareness and social engagement due to entangled sound sources. We introduce MoXaRt, a real-time XR system that uses audio-visual cues to separate these sources and enable fine-grained sound interaction. MoXaRt's core is a cascaded architecture that performs coarse, audio-only separation in parallel with visual detection of sources (e.g., faces, instruments). These visual anchors then guide refinement networks to isolate individual sources, separating complex mixes of up to 5 concurrent sources (e.g., 2 voices + 3 instruments) with ~2 second processing latency. We validate MoXaRt through a technical evaluation on a new dataset of 30 one-minute recordings featuring concurrent speech and music, and a 22-participant user study. Empirical results indicate that our system significantly enhances speech intelligibility, yielding a 36.2% (p < 0.01) increase in listening comprehension within adversarial acoustic environments while substantially reducing cognitive load (p < 0.001), thereby paving the way for more perceptive and socially adept XR experiences.
tldr: MoXaRt is a real-time XR system using audio-visual cues to separate and interact with sound sources, enhancing speech intelligibility and reducing cognitive load in complex acoustic environments.
tldr_zh: MoXaRt是一个实时XR系统，它使用视听线索来分离和交互声音源，从而增强语音清晰度并减少复杂声学环境中的认知负荷。
summary_zh: 在扩展现实 (XR) 中，复杂声学环境常常使使用者不堪重负，由于声源缠绕，损害了他们的场景感知和社会交互能力。我们推出了 MoXaRt，一种实时的 XR 系统，它利用视听线索来分离这些声源，从而实现细粒度的声音交互。MoXaRt 的核心是一个级联架构，它并行地执行粗略的纯音频分离和声源的视觉检测（例如，人脸、乐器）。这些视觉锚点随后引导精细化网络来隔离各个声源，分离最多 5 个并发声源（例如，2 个语音 + 3 个乐器）的复杂混音，处理延迟约为 2 秒。我们通过在一个包含 30 个一分钟录音的新数据集上进行的并发语音和音乐的技术评估，以及一个 22 名参与者的用户研究来验证 MoXaRt。经验结果表明，我们的系统显著提高了语音清晰度，在对抗性声学环境中，听力理解能力提高了 36.2% (p < 0.01)，同时显著降低了认知负荷 (p < 0.001)，从而为更具感知力和更擅长社交的 XR 体验铺平了道路。

title: A Robust Deep Learning Framework for Bangla License Plate Recognition Using YOLO and Vision-Language OCR
summary: An Automatic License Plate Recognition (ALPR) system constitutes a crucial element in an intelligent traffic management system. However, the detection of Bangla license plates remains challenging because of the complicated character scheme and uneven layouts. This paper presents a robust Bangla License Plate Recognition system that integrates a deep learning-based object detection model for license plate localization with Optical Character Recognition for text extraction. Multiple object detection architectures, including U-Net and several YOLO (You Only Look Once) variants, are compared for license plate localization. This study proposes a novel two-stage adaptive training strategy built upon the YOLOv8 architecture to improve localization performance. The proposed approach outperforms the established models, achieving an accuracy of 97.83% and an Intersection over Union (IoU) of 91.3%. The text recognition problem is phrased as a sequence generation problem with a VisionEncoderDecoder architecture, with a combination of encoder-decoders evaluated. It was demonstrated that the ViT + BanglaBERT model gives better results at the character level, with a Character Error Rate of 0.1323 and Word Error Rate of 0.1068. The proposed system also shows a consistent performance when tested on an external dataset that has been curated for this study purpose. The dataset offers completely different environment and lighting conditions compared to the training sample, indicating the robustness of the proposed framework. Overall, our proposed system provides a robust and reliable solution for Bangla license plate recognition and performs effectively across diverse real-world scenarios, including variations in lighting, noise, and plate styles. These strengths make it well suited for deployment in intelligent transportation applications such as automated law enforcement and access control.
tldr: This paper presents a robust Bangla License Plate Recognition system using YOLOv8 for license plate localization and a VisionEncoderDecoder model (ViT + BanglaBERT) for text extraction, demonstrating high accuracy and robustness across diverse real-world scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的孟加拉语车牌识别系统，使用 YOLOv8 进行车牌定位，并使用 VisionEncoderDecoder 模型 (ViT + BanglaBERT) 进行文本提取，在各种真实场景中表现出高精度和鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 自动车牌识别（ALPR）系统是智能交通管理系统中的关键组成部分。然而，由于复杂的字符方案和不规则的布局，孟加拉语车牌的检测仍然具有挑战性。本文提出了一种稳健的孟加拉语车牌识别系统，该系统集成了基于深度学习的目标检测模型用于车牌定位，以及光学字符识别（OCR）用于文本提取。对多种目标检测架构，包括U-Net和几种YOLO（You Only Look Once）变体，进行了车牌定位的比较。本研究提出了一种基于YOLOv8架构的新型两阶段自适应训练策略，以提高定位性能。所提出的方法优于现有的模型，实现了97.83%的准确率和91.3%的交并比（IoU）。文本识别问题被视为一个序列生成问题，采用视觉编码器-解码器架构，并评估了多种编码器-解码器组合。结果表明，ViT + BanglaBERT模型在字符级别上表现出更好的结果，字符错误率（CER）为0.1323，词错误率（WER）为0.1068。所提出的系统在针对本研究目的而整理的外部数据集上进行测试时，也显示出一致的性能。与训练样本相比，该数据集提供了完全不同的环境和光照条件，这表明所提出的框架具有鲁棒性。总而言之，我们提出的系统为孟加拉语车牌识别提供了一种稳健可靠的解决方案，并在各种现实场景中有效地执行，包括光照、噪声和车牌样式的变化。这些优势使其非常适合部署在智能交通应用中，例如自动执法和门禁控制。

title: HG-Lane: High-Fidelity Generation of Lane Scenes under Adverse Weather and Lighting Conditions without Re-annotation
summary: Lane detection is a crucial task in autonomous driving, as it helps ensure the safe operation of vehicles. However, existing datasets such as CULane and TuSimple contain relatively limited data under extreme weather conditions, including rain, snow, and fog. As a result, detection models trained on these datasets often become unreliable in such environments, which may lead to serious safety-critical failures on the road. To address this issue, we propose HG-Lane, a High-fidelity Generation framework for Lane Scenes under adverse weather and lighting conditions without requiring re-annotation. Based on this framework, we further construct a benchmark that includes adverse weather and lighting scenarios, containing 30,000 images. Experimental results demonstrate that our method consistently and significantly improves the performance of existing lane detection networks. For example, using the state-of-the-art CLRNet, the overall mF1 score on our benchmark increases by 20.87 percent. The F1@50 score for the overall, normal, snow, rain, fog, night, and dusk categories increases by 19.75 percent, 8.63 percent, 38.8 percent, 14.96 percent, 26.84 percent, 21.5 percent, and 12.04 percent, respectively. The code and dataset are available at: https://github.com/zdc233/HG-Lane.
tldr: The paper introduces HG-Lane, a method for generating realistic lane scenes under adverse weather and lighting conditions, and a corresponding benchmark dataset of 30,000 images, improving lane detection performance in challenging environments.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了HG-Lane，一种在恶劣天气和光照条件下生成逼真车道场景的方法，并构建了一个包含30,000张图像的基准数据集，提高了在具有挑战性环境中车道检测的性能。
summary_zh: 车道线检测是自动驾驶中的一项关键任务，它有助于确保车辆的安全运行。然而，现有的数据集，例如CULane和TuSimple，在极端天气条件下（包括雨、雪和雾）包含的数据相对有限。因此，在这些数据集上训练的检测模型在这些环境中往往变得不可靠，这可能导致道路上严重的、与安全相关的故障。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种高保真车道线场景生成框架HG-Lane，用于生成恶劣天气和光照条件下的车道线场景，且无需重新标注。基于此框架，我们进一步构建了一个包含恶劣天气和光照场景的基准测试，其中包含30,000张图像。实验结果表明，我们的方法能够持续且显著地提高现有车道线检测网络的性能。例如，使用最先进的CLRNet，在我们基准测试上的整体mF1分数提高了20.87%。整体、正常、雪、雨、雾、夜间和黄昏类别的F1@50分数分别提高了19.75%、8.63%、38.8%、14.96%、26.84%、21.5%和12.04%。代码和数据集可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/zdc233/HG-Lane。

title: 4DEquine: Disentangling Motion and Appearance for 4D Equine Reconstruction from Monocular Video
summary: 4D reconstruction of equine family (e.g. horses) from monocular video is important for animal welfare. Previous mainstream 4D animal reconstruction methods require joint optimization of motion and appearance over a whole video, which is time-consuming and sensitive to incomplete observation. In this work, we propose a novel framework called 4DEquine by disentangling the 4D reconstruction problem into two sub-problems: dynamic motion reconstruction and static appearance reconstruction. For motion, we introduce a simple yet effective spatio-temporal transformer with a post-optimization stage to regress smooth and pixel-aligned pose and shape sequences from video. For appearance, we design a novel feed-forward network that reconstructs a high-fidelity, animatable 3D Gaussian avatar from as few as a single image. To assist training, we create a large-scale synthetic motion dataset, VarenPoser, which features high-quality surface motions and diverse camera trajectories, as well as a synthetic appearance dataset, VarenTex, comprising realistic multi-view images generated through multi-view diffusion. While training only on synthetic datasets, 4DEquine achieves state-of-the-art performance on real-world APT36K and AiM datasets, demonstrating the superiority of 4DEquine and our new datasets for both geometry and appearance reconstruction. Comprehensive ablation studies validate the effectiveness of both the motion and appearance reconstruction network. Project page: https://luoxue-star.github.io/4DEquine_Project_Page/.
tldr: The paper introduces 4DEquine, a novel framework for 4D reconstruction of equines from monocular video by disentangling motion and appearance using spatio-temporal transformers and a feed-forward network, trained on synthetic datasets and achieving state-of-the-art results on real-world datasets.
tldr_zh: 论文提出了4DEquine，一种从单目视频中进行马科动物4D重建的新框架。该框架通过时空Transformer和一个前馈网络来解耦运动和外观，训练数据集为合成数据，并在真实世界的数据集上实现了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 从单目视频中对马科动物（例如，马）进行 4D 重建对于动物福利至关重要。以往主流的 4D 动物重建方法需要对整个视频进行运动和外观的联合优化，这既耗时又对不完整的观测数据非常敏感。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种名为 4DEquine 的新框架，该框架将 4D 重建问题解耦为两个子问题：动态运动重建和静态外观重建。对于运动，我们引入了一种简单而有效的时空 Transformer，并结合后期优化阶段，从视频中回归出平滑且像素对齐的姿态和形状序列。对于外观，我们设计了一种新颖的前馈网络，该网络从极少量的图像（甚至单张图像）即可重建出高保真、可动画的 3D 高斯化身。为了辅助训练，我们创建了一个大规模的合成运动数据集 VarenPoser，该数据集具有高质量的表面运动和多样化的相机轨迹，以及一个合成外观数据集 VarenTex，该数据集包含通过多视角扩散生成的逼真多视角图像。尽管仅在合成数据集上进行训练，4DEquine 在真实世界的 APT36K 和 AiM 数据集上实现了最先进的性能，证明了 4DEquine 以及我们的新数据集在几何和外观重建方面的优越性。全面的消融研究验证了运动和外观重建网络的有效性。项目主页：https://luoxue-star.github.io/4DEquine_Project_Page/。

title: Adaptive Active Learning for Regression via Reinforcement Learning
summary: Active learning for regression reduces labeling costs by selecting the most informative samples. Improved Greedy Sampling is a prominent method that balances feature-space diversity and output-space uncertainty using a static, multiplicative rule. We propose Weighted improved Greedy Sampling (WiGS), which replaces this framework with a dynamic, additive criterion. We formulate weight selection as a reinforcement learning problem, enabling an agent to adapt the exploration-investigation balance throughout learning. Experiments on 18 benchmark datasets and a synthetic environment show WiGS outperforms iGS and other baseline methods in both accuracy and labeling efficiency, particularly in domains with irregular data density where the baseline's multiplicative rule ignores high-error samples in dense regions.
tldr: The paper introduces Weighted improved Greedy Sampling (WiGS), an active learning method for regression that uses reinforcement learning to dynamically adjust the balance between exploration and investigation during sample selection, leading to better accuracy and labeling efficiency compared to existing methods.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Weighted improved Greedy Sampling (WiGS) 的主动学习回归方法，它利用强化学习动态调整样本选择过程中探索与研究的平衡，从而相比现有方法实现了更高的准确性和标签效率。
summary_zh: 针对回归问题的主动学习通过选择信息量最大的样本来降低标注成本。改进贪婪抽样（Improved Greedy Sampling，iGS）是一种突出的方法，它使用静态的、乘法规则来平衡特征空间多样性和输出空间不确定性。我们提出了加权改进贪婪抽样（Weighted improved Greedy Sampling，WiGS），它将这种框架替换为动态的、加性准则。我们将权重选择建模为一个强化学习问题，使智能体能够在整个学习过程中调整探索-调查的平衡。在18个基准数据集和一个合成环境上的实验表明，WiGS在准确性和标注效率方面都优于iGS和其他基线方法，尤其是在具有不规则数据密度的领域中，在这些领域中，基线的乘法规则会忽略密集区域中的高误差样本。

title: On The Complexity of Best-Arm Identification in Non-Stationary Linear Bandits
summary: We study the fixed-budget best-arm identification (BAI) problem in non-stationary linear bandits. Concretely, given a fixed time budget $T\in \mathbb{N}$, finite arm set $\mathcal{X} \subset \mathbb{R}^d$, and a potentially adversarial sequence of unknown parameters $\lbrace θ_t\rbrace_{t=1}^{T}$ (hence non-stationary), a learner aims to identify the arm with the largest cumulative reward $x_* = \arg\max_{x \in \mathcal{X}} x^\top\sum_{t=1}^T θ_t$ with high probability. In this setting, it is well-known that uniformly sampling arms from the G-optimal design yields a minimax-optimal error probability of $\exp\left(-Θ\left(T / H_{G}\right)\right)$, where $H_{G}$ scales proportionally with the dimension $d$. However, this notion of complexity is overly pessimistic, as it is derived from a lower bound in which the arm set consists only of the standard basis vectors, thus masking any potential advantages arising from arm sets with richer geometric structure. To address this, we establish an arm-set-dependent lower bound that, in contrast, holds for any arm set. Motivated by the ideas underlying our lower bound, we propose the Adjacent-optimal design, a specialization of the well-known $\mathcal{X}\mathcal{Y}$-optimal design, and develop the $\textsf{Adjacent-BAI}$ algorithm. We prove that the error probability of $\textsf{Adjacent-BAI}$ matches our lower bound up to constants, verifying the tightness of our lower bound, and establishing the arm-set-dependent complexity of this setting.
tldr: This paper studies the best-arm identification problem in non-stationary linear bandits, derives an arm-set-dependent lower bound, and proposes an Adjacent-BAI algorithm with matching error probability, thus improving upon pessimistic, dimension-dependent bounds known for this problem.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了非平稳线性bandit中的最佳臂识别问题，推导了依赖于臂集的下界，并提出了一种具有匹配误差概率的Adjacent-BAI算法，从而改进了该问题中已知的悲观的、依赖于维度的界。
summary_zh: 我们研究了非平稳线性bandit中的固定预算最优臂识别(BAI)问题。具体而言，给定一个固定的时间预算$T\in \mathbb{N}$，有限的臂集$\mathcal{X} \subset \mathbb{R}^d$，以及一个潜在的对抗性的未知参数序列$\lbrace θ_t\rbrace_{t=1}^{T}$（因此是非平稳的），学习者的目标是以高概率识别具有最大累积奖励的臂$x_* = \arg\max_{x \in \mathcal{X}} x^\top\sum_{t=1}^T θ_t$。在这种设定下，众所周知，从G-最优设计中均匀采样臂会产生一个极小极大最优的误差概率$\exp\left(-Θ\left(T / H_{G}\right)\right)$，其中$H_{G}$与维度$d$成比例缩放。然而，这种复杂度的概念过于悲观，因为它源于一个下界，在这个下界中，臂集仅由标准基向量组成，因此掩盖了臂集具有更丰富的几何结构所带来的任何潜在优势。为了解决这个问题，我们建立了一个臂集相关的下界，与之相反，该下界适用于任何臂集。受到我们下界基础思想的启发，我们提出了相邻最优设计，这是著名的$\mathcal{X}\mathcal{Y}$-最优设计的一个特例，并开发了$\textsf{Adjacent-BAI}$算法。我们证明了$\textsf{Adjacent-BAI}$的误差概率与我们的下界匹配到常数级别，验证了我们下界的紧致性，并建立了该设定下臂集相关的复杂度。

title: Semantic Landmark Particle Filter for Robot Localisation in Vineyards
summary:
Reliable localisation in vineyards is hindered by row-level perceptual aliasing: parallel crop rows produce nearly identical LiDAR observations, causing geometry-only and vision-based SLAM systems to converge towards incorrect corridors, particularly during headland transitions. We present a Semantic Landmark Particle Filter (SLPF) that integrates trunk and pole landmark detections with 2D LiDAR within a probabilistic localisation framework. Detected trunks are converted into semantic walls, forming structural row boundaries embedded in the measurement model to improve discrimination between adjacent rows. GNSS is incorporated as a lightweight prior that stabilises localisation when semantic observations are sparse.
  Field experiments in a 10-row vineyard demonstrate consistent improvements over geometry-only (AMCL), vision-based (RTAB-Map), and GNSS baselines. Compared to AMCL, SLPF reduces Absolute Pose Error by 22% and 65% across two traversal directions; relative to a NoisyGNSS baseline, APE decreases by 65% and 61%. Row correctness improves from 0.67 to 0.73, while mean cross-track error decreases from 1.40 m to 1.26 m. These results show that embedding row-level structural semantics within the measurement model enables robust localisation in highly repetitive outdoor agricultural environments.
tldr: This paper introduces a Semantic Landmark Particle Filter (SLPF) for robust robot localization in vineyards, leveraging trunk and pole landmark detections with LiDAR and GNSS to overcome row-level perceptual aliasing, demonstrating significant improvements over existing methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种语义地标粒子滤波器 (SLPF)，用于在葡萄园中实现鲁棒的机器人定位，利用树干和杆状地标检测与 LiDAR 和 GNSS 相结合，克服了行级感知混叠问题，并展示了相对于现有方法的显著改进。
summary_zh:
在葡萄园中，可靠的定位受到行级感知混叠的阻碍：平行的作物行会产生几乎相同的激光雷达观测结果，导致仅依赖几何信息和基于视觉的SLAM系统收敛到错误的走廊，尤其是在地头过渡期间。我们提出了一种语义地标粒子滤波（SLPF），它将树干和立杆地标检测与二维激光雷达集成到概率定位框架中。检测到的树干被转换为语义墙，形成嵌入在测量模型中的结构性行边界，以提高相邻行之间的区分度。GNSS作为一种轻量级的先验信息被纳入，可在语义观测稀疏时稳定定位。
在10行葡萄园中的田间实验表明，相对于仅依赖几何信息的AMCL、基于视觉的RTAB-Map和GNSS基线，SLPF始终如一地提供了改进。与AMCL相比，SLPF在两种遍历方向上分别将绝对位姿误差降低了22%和65%；相对于NoisyGNSS基线，APE分别降低了65%和61%。行正确率从0.67提高到0.73，而平均横向跟踪误差从1.40米降低到1.26米。这些结果表明，将行级结构语义嵌入到测量模型中，可以实现在高度重复的户外农业环境中进行稳健定位。

title: Sublinear-Time Reconfiguration of Programmable Matter with Joint Movements
summary:
We study centralized reconfiguration problems for geometric amoebot structures. A set of $n$ amoebots occupy nodes on the triangular grid and can reconfigure via expansion and contraction operations. We focus on the joint movement extension, where amoebots may expand and contract in parallel, enabling coordinated motion of larger substructures. Prior work introduced this extension and analyzed reconfiguration under additional assumptions such as metamodules.
  In contrast, we investigate the intrinsic dynamics of reconfiguration without such assumptions by restricting attention to centralized algorithms, leaving distributed solutions for future work. We study the reconfiguration problem between two classes of amoebot structures $A$ and $B$: For every structure $S\in A$, the goal is to compute a schedule that reconfigures $S$ into some structure $S'\in B$. Our focus is on sublinear-time algorithms.
  We affirmatively answer the open problem by Padalkin et al. (Auton. Robots, 2025) whether a within-the-model sublinear-time universal reconfiguration algorithm is possible, by proving that any structure can be reconfigured into a canonical line-segment structure in $O(\sqrt{n}\log n)$ rounds. Additionally, we give a constant-time algorithm for reconfiguring any spiral structure into a line segment. These results are enabled by new constant-time primitives that facilitate efficient parallel movement.
  Our findings demonstrate that the joint movement model supports sublinear reconfiguration without auxiliary assumptions. A central open question is whether universal reconfiguration within this model can be achieved in polylogarithmic or even constant time.
tldr: This paper presents sublinear-time centralized algorithms for reconfiguring geometric amoebot structures on a triangular grid using joint movements, achieving $O(\sqrt{n}\log n)$ rounds for universal reconfiguration into a line segment and constant time for spiral to line segment reconfiguration.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了使用联合运动在三角网格上重配置几何变形虫结构的亚线性时间集中式算法，实现了将任何结构通用重配置为线段结构的$O(\sqrt{n}\log n)$轮，以及将螺旋结构重配置为线段结构的常数时间。
summary_zh:
我们研究几何变形虫结构体的集中式重构问题。一组 $n$ 个变形虫占据三角网格上的节点，并且可以通过扩张和收缩操作进行重构。我们关注联合移动扩展，其中变形虫可以并行地扩张和收缩，从而实现更大的子结构的协调运动。先前的工作引入了此扩展，并分析了在诸如元模块等其他假设下的重构。

  与此相反，我们通过限制对集中式算法的关注来研究没有这些假设的重构的内在动态，将分布式解决方案留给未来的工作。我们研究了两类变形虫结构体 $A$ 和 $B$ 之间的重构问题：对于每个结构体 $S\in A$，目标是计算一个将 $S$ 重构为某个结构体 $S'\in B$ 的调度。我们的重点是亚线性时间算法。

  我们肯定地回答了 Padalkin 等人 (Auton. Robots, 2025) 提出的开放问题，即在模型内是否存在亚线性时间通用重构算法的可能性，通过证明任何结构体都可以在 $O(\sqrt{n}\log n)$ 轮中重构为规范的线段结构体。此外，我们还给出了一个常数时间算法，用于将任何螺旋结构体重构为线段。这些结果归功于新的常数时间原语，它们促进了高效的并行移动。

  我们的研究结果表明，联合移动模型支持无需辅助假设的亚线性重构。一个核心的开放问题是是否可以在此模型内以多对数甚至常数时间实现通用重构。

title: Robotic Ultrasound Makes CBCT Alive
summary: Intraoperative Cone Beam Computed Tomography (CBCT) provides a reliable 3D anatomical context essential for interventional planning. However, its static nature fails to provide continuous monitoring of soft-tissue deformations induced by respiration, probe pressure, and surgical manipulation, leading to navigation discrepancies. We propose a deformation-aware CBCT updating framework that leverages robotic ultrasound as a dynamic proxy to infer tissue motion and update static CBCT slices in real time. Starting from calibration-initialized alignment with linear correlation of linear combination (LC2)-based rigid refinement, our method establishes accurate multimodal correspondence. To capture intraoperative dynamics, we introduce the ultrasound correlation UNet (USCorUNet), a lightweight network trained with optical flow-guided supervision to learn deformation-aware correlation representations, enabling accurate, real-time dense deformation field estimation from ultrasound streams. The inferred deformation is spatially regularized and transferred to the CBCT reference to produce deformation-consistent visualizations without repeated radiation exposure. We validate the proposed approach through deformation estimation and ultrasound-guided CBCT updating experiments. Results demonstrate real-time end-to-end CBCT slice updating and physically plausible deformation estimation, enabling dynamic refinement of static CBCT guidance during robotic ultrasound-assisted interventions. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/anonymous-codebase/us-cbct-demo.
tldr: The paper introduces a method to update static CBCT scans in real-time using robotic ultrasound, enabling dynamic guidance for robotic ultrasound-assisted interventions by estimating tissue deformation without repeated radiation exposure.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种使用机器人超声实时更新静态 CBCT 扫描的方法，通过估计组织变形，实现机器人超声辅助介入的动态引导，避免了重复的辐射暴露。
summary_zh: 术中锥形束计算机断层扫描 (CBCT) 为介入计划提供了可靠的三维解剖环境。然而，其静态特性无法持续监测由呼吸、探头压力和手术操作引起的软组织形变，导致导航偏差。我们提出了一种形变感知 CBCT 更新框架，该框架利用机器人超声作为动态代理来推断组织运动并实时更新静态 CBCT 切片。从基于线性组合的线性相关 (LC2) 的刚性精化进行校准初始化的对齐开始，我们的方法建立了准确的多模态对应关系。为了捕获术中动态性，我们引入了超声相关 UNet (USCorUNet)，这是一个轻量级网络，通过光流引导的监督进行训练，以学习形变感知的相关表示，从而能够从超声流中进行准确、实时的密集形变场估计。推断出的形变经过空间正则化并转移到 CBCT 参考，以产生形变一致的可视化效果，而无需重复辐射暴露。 我们通过形变估计和超声引导的 CBCT 更新实验验证了所提出的方法。结果表明，可以进行实时端到端的 CBCT 切片更新和物理上合理的形变估计，从而能够在机器人超声辅助干预过程中对静态 CBCT 指导进行动态精化。源代码可在 https://github.com/anonymous-codebase/us-cbct-demo 公开获取。

title: Neural Field Thermal Tomography: A Differentiable Physics Framework for Non-Destructive Evaluation
summary: We propose Neural Field Thermal Tomography (NeFTY), a differentiable physics framework for the quantitative 3D reconstruction of material properties from transient surface temperature measurements. While traditional thermography relies on pixel-wise 1D approximations that neglect lateral diffusion, and soft-constrained Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) often fail in transient diffusion scenarios due to gradient stiffness, NeFTY parameterizes the 3D diffusivity field as a continuous neural field optimized through a rigorous numerical solver. By leveraging a differentiable physics solver, our approach enforces thermodynamic laws as hard constraints while maintaining the memory efficiency required for high-resolution 3D tomography. Our discretize-then-optimize paradigm effectively mitigates the spectral bias and ill-posedness inherent in inverse heat conduction, enabling the recovery of subsurface defects at arbitrary scales. Experimental validation on synthetic data demonstrates that NeFTY significantly improves the accuracy of subsurface defect localization over baselines. Additional details at https://cab-lab-princeton.github.io/nefty/
tldr: The paper introduces NeFTY, a differentiable physics framework leveraging neural fields and hard constraints for accurate 3D reconstruction of material properties from thermal measurements, improving subsurface defect localization.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了NeFTY，一个可微的物理框架，利用神经场和硬约束，从热测量中准确地进行材料属性的3D重建，从而改进了对地下缺陷的定位。
summary_zh: 我们提出了神经场热层析成像（NeFTY），这是一个可微物理框架，用于从瞬态表面温度测量中定量地重建材料的3D属性。传统的红外热成像依赖于忽略横向扩散的逐像素1D近似，而软约束的物理信息神经网络（PINNs）通常由于梯度刚性而在瞬态扩散场景中失效。NeFTY将3D扩散率场参数化为一个连续的神经场，并通过严格的数值求解器进行优化。通过利用可微物理求解器，我们的方法将热力学定律作为硬约束来执行，同时保持高分辨率3D层析成像所需的内存效率。我们的离散化-再优化范式有效地缓解了逆热传导中固有的谱偏差和不适定性，从而能够恢复任意尺度的次表面缺陷。在合成数据上的实验验证表明，与基线方法相比，NeFTY显著提高了次表面缺陷定位的准确性。更多细节请访问 https://cab-lab-princeton.github.io/nefty/

title: Phase-Interface Instance Segmentation as a Visual Sensor for Laboratory Process Monitoring
summary: Reliable visual monitoring of chemical experiments remains challenging in transparent glassware, where weak phase boundaries and optical artifacts degrade conventional segmentation. We formulate laboratory phenomena as the time evolution of phase interfaces and introduce the Chemical Transparent Glasses dataset 2.0 (CTG 2.0), a vessel-aware benchmark with 3,668 images, 23 glassware categories, and five multiphase interface types for phase-interface instance segmentation. Building on YOLO11m-seg, we propose LGA-RCM-YOLO, which combines Local-Global Attention (LGA) for robust semantic representation and a Rectangular Self-Calibration Module (RCM) for boundary refinement of thin, elongated interfaces. On CTG 2.0, the proposed model achieves 84.4% AP@0.5 and 58.43% AP@0.5-0.95, improving over the YOLO11m baseline by 6.42 and 8.75 AP points, respectively, while maintaining near real-time inference (13.67 FPS, RTX 3060). An auxiliary color-attribute head further labels liquid instances as colored or colorless with 98.71% precision and 98.32% recall. Finally, we demonstrate continuous process monitoring in separatory-funnel phase separation and crystallization, showing that phase-interface instance segmentation can serve as a practical visual sensor for laboratory automation.
tldr: The paper introduces a new dataset (CTG 2.0) and a YOLO-based model (LGA-RCM-YOLO) for phase-interface instance segmentation in transparent glassware, demonstrating its application in laboratory process monitoring.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的数据集（CTG 2.0）和一个基于YOLO的模型（LGA-RCM-YOLO），用于透明玻璃器皿中的相界面实例分割，并展示了其在实验室过程监控中的应用。
summary_zh: 对化学实验进行可靠的可视化监测在透明玻璃器皿中仍然具有挑战性，因为微弱的相界面和光学伪影会降低传统分割的效果。我们将实验室现象建模为相界面的时间演化，并引入了化学透明玻璃器皿数据集2.0 (CTG 2.0)，这是一个容器感知基准，包含3,668张图像、23个玻璃器皿类别和五种多相界面类型，用于相界面实例分割。在YOLO11m-seg的基础上，我们提出了LGA-RCM-YOLO，它结合了局部-全局注意力机制（LGA）以实现鲁棒的语义表示，以及矩形自校准模块（RCM）以细化细长界面的边界。在CTG 2.0上，提出的模型实现了84.4%的AP@0.5和58.43%的AP@0.5-0.95，分别比YOLO11m基线提高了6.42和8.75个AP点，同时保持了接近实时的推理速度(13.67 FPS, RTX 3060)。一个辅助的颜色属性头进一步标记液体实例为有色或无色，精度为98.71%，召回率为98.32%。最后，我们展示了在分液漏斗相分离和结晶过程中的连续过程监测，表明相界面实例分割可以作为实验室自动化的实用视觉传感器。

title: LCAMV: High-Accuracy 3D Reconstruction of Color-Varying Objects Using LCA Correction and Minimum-Variance Fusion in Structured Light
summary: Accurate 3D reconstruction of colored objects with structured light (SL) is hindered by lateral chromatic aberration (LCA) in optical components and uneven noise characteristics across RGB channels. This paper introduces lateral chromatic aberration correction and minimum-variance fusion (LCAMV), a robust 3D reconstruction method that operates with a single projector-camera pair without additional hardware or acquisition constraints. LCAMV analytically models and pixel-wise compensates LCA in both the projector and camera, then adaptively fuses multi-channel phase data using a Poisson-Gaussian noise model and minimum-variance estimation. Unlike existing methods that require extra hardware or multiple exposures, LCAMV enables fast acquisition. Experiments on planar and non-planar colored surfaces show that LCAMV outperforms grayscale conversion and conventional channel-weighting, reducing depth error by up to 43.6\%. These results establish LCAMV as an effective solution for high-precision 3D reconstruction of nonuniformly colored objects.
tldr: The paper introduces LCAMV, a method for high-accuracy 3D reconstruction of colored objects using structured light, addressing chromatic aberration and noise issues without additional hardware or acquisition constraints, outperforming existing approaches by up to 43.6% in depth error reduction.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了LCAMV，一种使用结构光进行彩色物体高精度3D重建的方法，解决了色差和噪声问题，无需额外的硬件或采集约束，并且在深度误差减少方面优于现有方法高达43.6%。
summary_zh: 利用结构光（SL）进行彩色物体精确三维重建会受到光学元件中的横向色差（LCA）以及RGB通道间不均匀噪声特性的阻碍。本文提出一种横向色差校正与最小方差融合（LCAMV）方法，这是一种稳健的三维重建方法，仅需一个投影仪-相机对且无需额外的硬件设备或采集约束即可实现。LCAMV解析地建模并逐像素补偿投影仪和相机中的横向色差，然后利用泊松-高斯噪声模型和最小方差估计自适应地融合多通道相位数据。与需要额外硬件或多次曝光的现有方法不同，LCAMV能够实现快速采集。在平面和非平面彩色表面上的实验表明，LCAMV优于灰度转换和传统通道加权方法，深度误差降低高达43.6%。这些结果证明LCAMV是实现非均匀彩色物体高精度三维重建的一种有效解决方案。

title: ECoLAD: Deployment-Oriented Evaluation for Automotive Time-Series Anomaly Detection
summary:
Time-series anomaly detectors are commonly compared on workstation-class hardware under unconstrained execution. In-vehicle monitoring, however, requires predictable latency and stable behavior under limited CPU parallelism. Accuracy-only leaderboards can therefore misrepresent which methods remain feasible under deployment-relevant constraints.
  We present ECoLAD (Efficiency Compute Ladder for Anomaly Detection), a deployment-oriented evaluation protocol instantiated as an empirical study on proprietary automotive telemetry (anomaly rate ${\approx}$0.022) and complementary public benchmarks. ECoLAD applies a monotone compute-reduction ladder across heterogeneous detector families using mechanically determined, integer-only scaling rules and explicit CPU thread caps, while logging every applied configuration change. Throughput-constrained behavior is characterized by sweeping target scoring rates and reporting (i) coverage (the fraction of entities meeting the target) and (ii) the best AUC-PR achievable among measured ladder configurations satisfying the target. On constrained automotive telemetry, lightweight classical detectors sustain both coverage and detection lift above the random baseline across the full throughput sweep. Several deep methods lose feasibility before they lose accuracy.
tldr: This paper introduces ECoLAD, a deployment-oriented evaluation protocol for time-series anomaly detection in automotive applications, highlighting the importance of constrained execution environments and the limitations of accuracy-only leaderboards.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了ECoLAD，一个面向部署的汽车时序异常检测评估协议，强调了受限执行环境的重要性以及仅凭准确率排行榜的局限性。
summary_zh:
时序异常检测器通常在工作站级硬件上进行不受约束的执行比较。然而，车载监控需要在有限的CPU并行下提供可预测的延迟和稳定的行为。因此，仅关注准确率的排行榜可能会错误地呈现哪些方法在部署相关的约束条件下仍然可行。

我们提出了ECoLAD（异常检测的效率计算阶梯），这是一个面向部署的评估协议，体现在专有汽车遥测（异常率 ${\approx}$0.022）和补充公共基准上的实证研究。 ECoLAD应用单调计算缩减阶梯，跨越异构检测器族，采用机械确定的、仅整数的缩放规则和显式的CPU线程上限，同时记录每个应用配置更改。吞吐量约束行为通过扫描目标评分率来表征，并报告 (i) 覆盖率（满足目标的实体比例）和 (ii) 在满足目标要求的所有测量阶梯配置中可实现的最佳AUC-PR。在受约束的汽车遥测中，轻量级的经典检测器在整个吞吐量扫描过程中都保持了高于随机基线的覆盖率和检测提升。一些深度方法在失去准确率之前就失去了可行性。

title: Spatio-Temporal Attention Graph Neural Network: Explaining Causalities With Attention
summary: Industrial Control Systems (ICS) underpin critical infrastructure and face growing cyber-physical threats due to the convergence of operational technology and networked environments. While machine learning-based anomaly detection approaches in ICS shows strong theoretical performance, deployment is often limited by poor explainability, high false-positive rates, and sensitivity to evolving system behavior, i.e., baseline drifting. We propose a Spatio-Temporal Attention Graph Neural Network (STA-GNN) for unsupervised and explainable anomaly detection in ICS that models both temporal dynamics and relational structure of the system. Sensors, controllers, and network entities are represented as nodes in a dynamically learned graph, enabling the model to capture inter-dependencies across physical processes and communication patterns. Attention mechanisms provide influential relationships, supporting inspection of correlations and potential causal pathways behind detected events. The approach supports multiple data modalities, including SCADA point measurements, network flow features, and payload features, and thus enables unified cyber-physical analysis. To address operational requirements, we incorporate a conformal prediction strategy to control false alarm rates and monitor performance degradation under drifting of the environment. Our findings highlight the possibilities and limitations of model evaluation and common pitfalls in anomaly detection in ICS. Our findings emphasise the importance of explainable, drift-aware evaluation for reliable deployment of learning-based security monitoring systems.
tldr: The paper introduces a Spatio-Temporal Attention Graph Neural Network (STA-GNN) for explainable anomaly detection in Industrial Control Systems (ICS), addressing limitations like poor explainability and baseline drifting using attention mechanisms and conformal prediction.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种时空注意力图神经网络（STA-GNN），用于工业控制系统（ICS）中可解释的异常检测，通过使用注意力机制和共形预测来解决可解释性差和基线漂移等限制。
summary_zh: 工业控制系统（ICS）是关键基础设施的基石，由于运营技术和网络环境的融合，正面临日益增长的网络物理威胁。虽然基于机器学习的ICS异常检测方法在理论上表现出强大的性能，但部署通常受到可解释性差、高误报率以及对不断演变的系统行为（即，基线漂移）的敏感性等因素的限制。我们提出了一种用于 ICS 中无监督和可解释异常检测的时空注意力图神经网络 (STA-GNN)，该网络对系统的时间动态和关系结构进行建模。传感器、控制器和网络实体被表示为动态学习图中的节点，使模型能够捕获物理过程和通信模式之间的相互依赖关系。注意力机制提供有影响力的关系，支持对检测到的事件背后的相关性和潜在因果路径的检查。该方法支持多种数据模态，包括 SCADA 点测量、网络流特征和有效载荷特征，因此能够进行统一的网络物理分析。为了满足运营需求，我们采用了一种保角预测策略来控制误报率并监控环境漂移下的性能下降。我们的研究结果突出了模型评估的可能性和局限性，以及 ICS 异常检测中的常见陷阱。我们的研究结果强调了可解释的、具有漂移意识的评估对于可靠部署基于学习的安全监控系统的重要性。

title: Evaluating Few-Shot Pill Recognition Under Visual Domain Shift
summary: Adverse drug events are a significant source of preventable harm, which has led to the development of automated pill recognition systems to enhance medication safety. Real-world deployment of these systems is hindered by visually complex conditions, including cluttered scenes, overlapping pills, reflections, and diverse acquisition environments. This study investigates few-shot pill recognition from a deployment-oriented perspective, prioritizing generalization under realistic cross-dataset domain shifts over architectural innovation. A two-stage object detection framework is employed, involving base training followed by few-shot fine-tuning. Models are adapted to novel pill classes using one, five, or ten labeled examples per class and are evaluated on a separate deployment dataset featuring multi-object, cluttered scenes. The evaluation focuses on classification-centric and error-based metrics to address heterogeneous annotation strategies. Findings indicate that semantic pill recognition adapts rapidly with few-shot supervision, with classification performance reaching saturation even with a single labeled example. However, stress testing under overlapping and occluded conditions demonstrates a marked decline in localization and recall, despite robust semantic classification. Models trained on visually realistic, multi-pill data consistently exhibit greater robustness in low-shot scenarios, underscoring the importance of training data realism and the diagnostic utility of few-shot fine-tuning for deployment readiness.
tldr: This paper examines few-shot pill recognition under realistic visual domain shifts, finding that while semantic classification adapts quickly, localization and recall suffer under occluded conditions, highlighting the importance of realistic training data.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了在真实视觉域转移下的少样本药丸识别，发现语义分类能够快速适应，但定位和召回率在遮挡条件下会下降，强调了真实训练数据的重要性。
summary_zh: 不良药物事件是可预防伤害的一个重要来源，这促使了自动化药丸识别系统的发展，以提高用药安全性。这些系统的实际部署受到视觉复杂条件的阻碍，包括杂乱的场景、药丸的重叠、反射以及多样化的采集环境。本研究从面向部署的角度，研究少样本药丸识别，侧重于在真实的跨数据集领域偏移下进行泛化，而不是架构创新。采用了两阶段目标检测框架，包括基础训练和少样本微调。模型使用每个类别一、五或十个带标签的示例来适应新的药丸类别，并在一个单独的部署数据集上进行评估，该数据集包含多目标、杂乱的场景。评估侧重于以分类为中心和基于错误的指标，以应对异构标注策略。研究结果表明，语义药丸识别可以通过少样本监督快速适应，即使只有一个带标签的示例，分类性能也达到饱和。然而，在重叠和遮挡条件下的压力测试表明，尽管语义分类具有鲁棒性，但定位和召回率却明显下降。在视觉上真实的、多药丸数据上训练的模型在低样本情景中始终表现出更高的鲁棒性，这突显了训练数据真实性的重要性，以及少样本微调对于部署准备的诊断效用。

title: STM32-Based Smart Waste Bin for Hygienic Disposal Using Embedded Sensing and Automated Control
summary: The increasing demand for hygienic and contactless solutions in public and private environments has encouraged the development of automated systems for everyday applications. This paper presents the design and implementation of a motion- sensing automatic waste bin using an STM32 microcontroller, ultrasonic sensors, and a servo motor. The system detects user presence through ultrasonic sensing and automatically opens the bin lid using a servo motor controlled by the microcontroller. An additional ultrasonic sensor is used to monitor the internal waste level of the bin, while an OLED display provides real- time feedback regarding system status. The proposed system offers a low-cost, reliable, and easily deployable solution for touch-free waste disposal. Experimental evaluation demonstrates fast response time, stable sensing performance, and smooth mechanical operation. The system can be effectively deployed in homes, educational institutions, hospitals, and public facilities to improve hygiene and user convenience.
tldr: This paper presents a low-cost, STM32-based smart waste bin with automated lid opening and waste level monitoring, aiming to improve hygiene and user convenience. It uses ultrasonic sensors and a servo motor for touch-free disposal.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于STM32的低成本智能垃圾桶，具有自动开盖和垃圾水平监测功能，旨在提高卫生和用户便利性。它采用超声波传感器和伺服电机实现非接触式垃圾处理。
summary_zh: 随着公共和私人环境中对卫生和非接触式解决方案需求的日益增长，日常应用自动化系统的开发得到了推动。本文介绍了一种基于STM32微控制器、超声波传感器和舵机的运动感应式自动垃圾桶的设计与实现。该系统通过超声波感应检测用户存在，并使用由微控制器控制的舵机自动打开垃圾桶盖。此外，一个额外的超声波传感器用于监测垃圾桶内部的废物水平，而OLED显示屏则提供关于系统状态的实时反馈。所提出的系统为非接触式垃圾处理提供了一种低成本、可靠且易于部署的解决方案。实验评估表明，该系统具有快速响应时间、稳定的传感性能和流畅的机械操作。该系统可以有效地部署在家庭、教育机构、医院和公共设施中，以提高卫生水平和用户便利性。
